desc-759941:
"Three Kingdoms: The Return of the World" is a new national war SLG mobile game created for Generation Z. Players will completely say goodbye to the long "farming" process in traditional SLG, and enjoy super high benefits and direct access to massive cultivation resources. 
The game innovation adds trading house gameplay, builds a dynamic economic ecology, and fully upgrades the strategic dimension. The battle begins immediately with the rhythm of the classic national war. At the same time, new tactical mechanisms such as nine-square grid formation, special pursuit, and "Wind Forest and Volcano" tactics are added to make the pre-war formation and sand table strategy more layered and game-intensive, truly realizing that "soldiers follow the heart, and methods come from strategies." 
The game's fast-paced design abandons the strong "class flavor" and cumbersome operation experience in SLG, breaks the protracted season cycle, and brings players a new Three Kingdoms battlefield with more characteristics, ease and freedom. [Fierce battle on this server·Cross-server as you wish] 
No more farming, no more paving roads, no more involution! We abandoned the tedious process of land development and focused on creating hearty national war hegemony and cross-server matching gameplay, bringing the protagonist an unprecedented refreshing combat experience and easy development mode. The boring development period is compressed, and the most essential territorial battles, alliance wars, and Luoyang decisive battles are highly condensed, ensuring that every minute you invest is full of strategy and challenges. In addition to the maps of this server, a lot of cross-server gameplay will be launched on a regular basis. You can match top alliances and lords of other servers at any time to test your tactics and strength on a broader stage. There is no "green grass period" here, only the never-ending flame of war. [Arrange formations to win·Strong tactics of war] 
There are secrets hidden in the Nine Palaces battlefield, and the key to victory or defeat depends on your position! The three-dimensional battlefield with the original "Three Lines and Nine Palaces" system is easy to use but hides a variety of strategies. Cleverly triggering the joint pursuit mechanism, the hero becomes a perpetual motion machine on the battlefield, doubling the output efficiency. More innovative "one skill with multiple uses" system - the same skill has multiple effects, active and passive pursuit, different positions, very particular! One skill can be used for multiple purposes, solving the pain point of insufficient development resources in the early stage. Here, every grid is a strategic location, and every displacement can change the situation of the battle, allowing you to experience the real "strategic planning and decisive victory beyond the Nine Palaces"! 
In the sandbox, you can also learn different military tactics such as wind, forest, fire, and mountain. It is no longer just about setting up formations before the battle, but also directly releasing them on the sandbox city or team during the battle. It truly realizes that "soldiers follow your heart, and tactics come from strategies", and you can use exquisite operations to strike a decisive blow. 【Gather the stars and get them after logging in】 
Have you ever repeatedly drawn cards and exhausted resources for a favorite core hero? We have completely removed this barrier. 
Cao Cao, Liu Bei, Sun Quan, Lu Bu, Zhuge Liang, Zhou Yu...all the legendary and peerless generals you are familiar with can be unlocked for free without the need to draw cards randomly. You only need to log in to the game for a certain number of days. Your strategic layout is no longer limited by the depth of the hero card pool. From the first day of the game, you can match up your dream lineup and devote yourself to pure tactical confrontation. [Self-produced resources·Free trade] 
The charm of strategy games should come from wisdom, not wealth. Therefore, all core development resources in the game can be obtained for free and stably through active gameplay. With his excellent strategy and execution ability, the lord can also conquer the world. This is truly a fair battleground for strategists. 
Break the shackles of system pricing and build a dynamic trading market completely dominated by the owner. Some resources can be freely put on the shelves, prices are determined by supply and demand, and opportunities are captured by vision. Whether he is a wealthy businessman who buys low and sells high, or a resource tycoon who specializes in production, each protagonist can find a unique way to survive and develop. Here, wealth does not depend on recharging, but on your business wisdom and courage. [Unfettered and free to join the battle] 
"If they unite, they will gather; if they don't unite, they will scatter." We provide an unprecedented free alliance and even country transfer system. 
Freely create and join alliances under the national camp, cooperate with other alliances in the same country, and confront other countries together. The alliance with the highest contribution can become the country's ruling alliance and command the country's operations. If you are dissatisfied with the national camp, you can transfer to other countries without losing any cultivation and continue the new journey. 
In the cross-server gameplay, you will participate in the alliance as a unit, and experience the changing situation and joyful grievances with your alliance partners. Your belonging is always determined by your will.
devnote-775302:
In Lovania, reunite with memories and stroll through spiritual picture books—— 
This is what the person who comes to see me every day says. 
She said that we can have a wonderful home here, dress up uniquely, chase the stars, and roam the moon that tells stories... 
I heard that when I make enough reservations, I will have the most unforgettable French fries in my life—— 
Just like the memories you share with others, they are precious and long-lasting. 
Meow! You are staring at the glass screen! Come and make an appointment for "Lovania"! 
For my greedy fries, please meow! ——Your silent partner · Studio Cat Supervisor · Lord Xiaoma
devnote-759941:
Hello everyone, I am Brother Xin, the producer of Chengfeng Studio. 
I am very happy to bring you a brand new Three Kingdoms SLG - "Three Kingdoms: The Return of the World". In the past few years, the development of Three Kingdoms SLG mobile games has tended to be somewhat solidified. For example, most of them are sutu like, or improvements to sutu like, and there are fewer and fewer products with obvious differentiation. 
We have been deeply involved in the Guozhan like category, which is obviously different from Sutu like. Sutu like is like Chinese food, traditional and classic, while Guozhan like is like hot pot, hot and piping hot. However, there has never been a national war-like product on the market that is particularly capable of fighting. 
So more than two years ago, we decided to set up a new project - to make significant innovations and improvements to the National War Like, and to solve various existing problems in this category. We also wanted to use this "hot pot" to bring you some different and more fun experiences. At the beginning of the project, we set 3 principles - we must consider the players. 
There must be significant innovation 
It has to be really fun. So far, we have been working on it for almost two and a half years. To summarize our features, we can use six groups of words: 
Low threshold, high benefits, fast pace, strong strategy, presence, and enough freedom. Of course, in the process of game development, we encountered unprecedented difficulties and took many detours. 
Because there are so many new things being tried, there is no mature product that can be "learned from". But we have always had one belief—— 
What we are doing is not fighting for ourselves, but fighting for the players. 
It is this belief that supports us step by step until now. 
We want to build a stage that belongs to the players. As for what you want to dance, it is entirely up to you. Even though the studio is small, we also have our own mission: to live up to the love of players! 
Even if your love is separated by mountains and seas, mountains and seas can still be leveled. From Famicom to arcade, from stand-alone to online games, from web games to mobile games, and then from mobile games back to stand-alone, I have experienced the development of the entire game industry. I know that for games to be fun, they must be innovative. Even if there are risks, you must try boldly, because if you don't innovate, you'd rather die. The name "Riding the Wind" comes from the name of a BGM when going to sea in "Age of Discovery 4". This was one of my favorite stand-alone games when I was young. Only by riding the wind and waves can we reach the distance. 
Only by not forgetting the original intention can the world return to its original intention.
devnote-767998:
A letter to all fighting players: This time, we want to do something for fighting 
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Yaoshi Fighting". 
In those years, we practiced "trick-sticking" in the arcade, survived the "abyss" in front of the computer, and crossed the "extreme operations" on the mobile phone screen. We have experienced the heartbreak of broken equipment, and the ecstasy of breaking out of a magical outfit. We have witnessed the brilliance of side-scrolling fighting, and also witnessed its slow decline. 
Yes, we are kids raised on fighting games just like you. 
So when we decided to make "Yaoshi Fighting", we asked ourselves a question: 
If we were asked to make a fighting mobile game ourselves, what would we want most? 
The answer is simple: I don’t want to be broken anymore, I don’t want to be depressed anymore, I don’t want to play alone anymore. Regarding "I don't want to be broken anymore": 
In "Yaoshi Fighting", we made a decision: the equipment will never be broken and the level will never be lost. 
You can safely improve the equipment from +10 to +20. If you fail, only the materials will be deducted, and the equipment and level will always be there. If you fail, you will also accumulate "charge points". If you accumulate enough, you will succeed next time. Change equipment? The enhancement level is directly inherited, so no money is wasted. 
We call this "healing enhancement" - it doesn't cure anything else but heartbreak. About “I don’t want to be monotonous anymore”: 
Of course, there must be classic professions: swordsman, gunner, assassin, magician, priest, none of them can be missing. But we also wanted to add something fun. 
If you like "one man as an army", you can try the summoner and lead a group of brothers to walk sideways. If you like "crushing with fire", you can drive a mecha and use a giant steel fist to teach monsters how to behave. There are more job transfer branches waiting for you to discover. 
Combat style should not be limited by profession, but should be defined by your imagination. Regarding “I don’t want to look at faces anymore”: 
We understand the feeling of refreshing the dungeon hundreds of times and not even seeing a single shining shadow. So we introduced a new attribute - the higher the stack, the more realistic the explosion rate. 
Moreover, the dungeons are divided into layers: in the early stage, there are high-explosion dungeons to help you quickly take shape, and in the later stages, there are high-difficulty group copies to challenge the limits. No matter you are a casual player or a hardcore player, you can have a blast and have fun! Regarding “I don’t want to work in vain”: 
Equipment, materials, cards... almost everything can be put on the shelves for trading. The handling fee is so low that it is almost negligible, and the market automatically regulates prices to prevent speculation. 
The brick-and-mortar party can rely on hard work in exchange for income, and the big boss can directly collect equipment and graduate - everyone gets what they need, a virtuous circle. Regarding “I don’t want to be alone anymore”: 
The guild is not just a chat group, but also your logistics department and comrade-in-arms group. 
Sign in, donate materials, complete tasks, and your contribution value will directly add attributes. Guild battles, auction dividends, everyone makes money together and becomes stronger together. Cross-server matching brings the flames of war to the entire server. 
We want to make the word "comrade" meaningful again in the game. Regarding "I don't want to just spell out the numbers": 
Like pure spelling operation? In 1V1 qualifying, the values ​​are completely fair, it just depends on your reaction and awareness. Like teamwork? 3V3 team battles, professional matching, skill connection, and tacit understanding are tested. Like big scenes? Cross-server guild battles let the whole server hear your name. 
We want fair competition and passionate group fights. After writing so much, I actually just want to say one thing: 
"Yaoshi Fighting" is a game we made for our past selves and for you now. 
It may not be perfect at the moment, but it must be done with care. It carries our love for fighting, and also carries our promise to players - no cheating, no cheating, and no loneliness. Now, reservations are open. If you are willing to give us a chance and give yourself a chance, then come. 
The time and space battlefield is ready, and the fighting soul is waiting for you to ignite. We are waiting for you in "Yaoshi Fighting". ——All developers of "Yaoshi Fighting" 
Yours sincerely
desc-386208:
Don't try to come to me. I'm somewhere you can't reach yet. 
Presumably, Tianyue City is still the same as usual. The life between people and moon spirits is always noisy and bustling. 
No matter how long it takes, you will still feel the magic of Yueling. These little things around us can always surprise us. 
To be honest, I miss those days in Tianyue City and the rice roll stall downstairs. 
I heard that our store name was also changed to "Everything is OK". It was probably Little Rabbit's idea, and it's not bad. 
Having him by your side makes you feel more at ease. 
I hope you haven't forgotten what I once taught you. 
After all, the "Door Disaster" will become more active. Existences such as "Law Jin Gate" and "Chaos" that ordinary people cannot see are our enemies. 
You will also see more and more of the world behind the door, and you will encounter difficulties and doubts. But go explore and experience as much as you want, you still have a long way to go. 
Don’t be alarmed, there are actually many “hermits” like us in the world. 
You will always encounter it later, maybe you have seen it before. After all, they are just like you, hiding behind the city with different identities. 
Do one last thing for me. Go and keep a very important item for me. 
It will be delivered to express locker 2238 at 14:58 on the 25th. "Wang Yue" is a Chinese urban open world pet-catching RPG independently developed by Star Studio. The story takes place in a world where humans and moon spirits coexist, and "chaos" is silently eroding the city. As a hermit with special abilities, you find partners hiding under urban occupations. Purify the moon spirit, explore and manage the city together, and find the way to the future.
desc-775302:
"Have you noticed? Those things you take for granted have quietly disappeared in life without knowing it." They leave and float to all things, turning into the flash of stones, the fluttering wings of butterflies, and the dreams of birds. 
They are forgotten far away, in light years further than the stars. 
Therefore, there is "never forget homeland". "One" Who will awaken my heart 
I woke up on a grassland made of wool, with cotton slowly falling from the blue sky. 
Later I found out that we were in the belly of a huge manta ray, swimming quietly with this small bag-like world. The little star with big ears woke me up, and its light gave me the answer. 
Together they saved me, gave me a broken glass jar, and told me unexpectedly that this was my heart. "Why is it empty?" 
"It will help you hold the really important things." "Two" Days of wandering through memories 
According to legend, 
Most of the memories of "never forgetting home" are forgotten and dispersed into a galaxy invisible to the eyes; 
There are also some that grow naturally and condense into moons of different shapes. Little stars accompany me and visit the moon. 
With my lamp, I can catch kites stranded in the sea of clouds, and I can also fish out light butterflies lost in the shadows of trees; 
I take the piano and roam around with music. Not only can I play my favorite ditties, but I can also collect the murmurs of plants and trees. 
I floated on the river, slipped into the gap between the stars and the moon, and traveled into the world of memory. 
I met a miniature fairy, was involved in a light fantasy, and made friends who were both ordinary and legendary. "Three" incredible magic power 
I weave the weft threads of memory into creations: soft quilts, paper-flavored picture books, sofas that have been repeatedly baked by the dusk and sunset... 
I make my home in the world of Budai: crossing the boundaries of memory, living in the rainforest, under the sea, or in a dream that transcends reality... 
My resident friends who create memories and spend time with me. My home, the giant manta fish, taught me to place my heart. 
I have collected more and more memories, everything is fine and I am no longer wandering. "Four" Friends who exchange memories 
The law of time is the meeting and separation of the tide and the moon. 
When I gazed at the moon again, I was no longer the doll without memory. I was a traveler who "never forgets home", with the color of the jar of my own heart. Together we return the stars to the night sky: 
Those small, distant, dim, and connected dazzling rivers of stars in the sky fall into our eyes again. 
And those past, beautiful, regretful, sad, cherished, forgotten, 
Eventually, 
Meet in beautiful memories.
devnote-386208:
Hello everyone, we are the production team of Star Studio's "Watching the Moon". 
We have received a lot of "urges" from players, "why hasn't it been updated yet", "when will the second test be launched"... First of all, we are very grateful to the spiritual shareholders of "Wang Yue" for their continued attention and support. The test at the beginning of this year exposed many problems, such as unsatisfactory overall art performance, a sense of familiarity in a small workshop, insufficient character design, a lack of distinctive plot and worldview, and fun gameplay but a strong sense of stitching... This series of problems spurs us forward. We also often ask ourselves, can "Wang Yue" gain a foothold in the highly competitive open world circuit? 
It is better to make drastic changes than to make small changes. From the end of testing at the beginning of the year to now, "Wangyue" is undergoing the largest product iteration in history. 
Can’t “Small Factory” make an open world? The less favored you are, the more you have to prove yourself. Either don’t do it, or do it to the best of your ability without leaving any regrets. A determined challenger 
After testing in early 2025, the underlying gameplay received enthusiastic responses from players, and also received a lot of discussions on art performance. Frankly speaking, there was a big gap between art and first-line products at that time. After that, the team had a clear and thorough discussion. What kind of product is "Wang Yue" going to be? 
In the past, most open city products were designed based on foreign cities. With the spread and popularity of Chinese culture at the global level in recent years, national cultural confidence has continued to increase, and overseas countries have also maintained a certain degree of attention to related content. The rise of Chinese culture is a trend at the global level. Consumer products based on national culture and intangible cultural heritage content are becoming popular all over the world, and games should also become one of the important carriers for spreading Chinese culture. 
Therefore, in the design of the game, we thought about why the carrier of the open city cannot be our own native city. The inheritance of Chinese culture, the introduction of modern thinking, and the blending of the past and the present have created a flavor that is unique to modern China, close to life, and uniquely Chinese. Showing the charm of Chinese cities and Chinese culture to domestic and overseas players is what we and the "Wang Yue" project hope to do. 
"Wang Yue" is the team's first content-based product, and it started relatively late, but this does not hinder our determination to make "Wang Yue" a fun game with high-quality art, advanced gameplay, and a showcase of Chinese cities. 
Take the attitude of a challenger and work hard to improve your products. We will make "Wang Yue" a good game and make it one of the representatives of Chinese games and appear on the world stage. This is our determination. Perseverant gamer 
The R&D team has more than doubled, reaching more than 600 people, and continues to expand. There are many like-minded partners who have joined the research and development team of "Wang Yue". 
Revolutionizing our lives is the perseverance of our determination. While maintaining the underlying gameplay of China's open city of symbiosis of humans and souls unchanged, we have comprehensively improved the quality of art and gameplay. 
Firmly adhere to the Chinese city and the symbiosis of humans and souls, scientific research and development, and co-creation with players to establish the gameplay standards, content standards, and art standards of "Watching the Moon"; focusing on the core label of "City + Moon Spirit", iterate and polish the product in an orderly, stable, and step-by-step manner. 
A small point is that in addition to the core practitioners of the "Wang Yue" project, we also have a player research team of more than 100 people. Our characters, moon spirits, scene design, etc. are all produced under their joint polishing. Each character will produce 6-8 versions of prototype design, and gradually refine the circle. This measure ensures that the game content is objective and in line with player preferences. 
Will there be such a large-scale iteration in the future? The answer is, no. Will Mochizuki stop? The answer is also, no. Mochizuki’s evolution will not stop. 1. Iteration of worldview 
In addition to the art, the most criticized thing among players in the first test is the design power of the entire game in terms of world view. This time we are reshaping the entire worldview. We are building a story about a Chinese urban hero and a moon spirit companion who resist fate, a world where humans and souls coexist. 
1) Chinese cities and urban ecology 
If we want to build a Chinese city, we must think about how China makes people feel - it has both historical origins and five thousand years of cultural heritage, as well as a world power, top-notch modern technology and quality of life. Guangzhou is a city that blends the past with the present: it has both an old city that is a heritage and a new city that keeps pace with the times. What is it like to live in a Chinese-style city? Different from Japanese and European styles, the feeling of Chinese style is fireworks and vitality. We have created the impression of China into Tianyue City, including the old city, new city, dock, ecology and amusement park. It is divided into Nanyue District, an old city with a fusion of old and new and a strong urban atmosphere; Zhonglin District, an all-encompassing modern city; 
2) Design around the city. The city is the underlying design concept of "Wang Yue" 
We don’t want to be a “one-size-fits-all” character, that’s our rule. 
It revolves around occupation. They have their own daily occupation, but when a crisis occurs, they will transform into urban heroes to protect the city. Born from occupation, the character's daily life and combat performance are derived. For example, Lin Long, whom you all saw today, is a clerk in Mochizuki's flower shop in "Listening to Flowers". She gained the ability to heal when she was on the verge of death. Her weapon is a pair of giant gardening shears. 
In addition to Lin Long, there will be a large number of characters with Chinese characteristics in the future, including rising sports superstars and shopkeepers inherited from ancient trading houses. These people represent inheritance and the future of modern China. 
Meanwhile, in "Watching the Moon", the moon spirits are a race. Different moon spirits engage in different professions in the city according to their own habits. It is a happy place where humans and spirits coexist. Human beings and Yueling live together in Tianyue City, and each has their own occupation. Players need to purify and subdue the Chaos Moon Spirits that appear, making them their partners in resisting evil. At the same time, because of their habits, different moon spirits will have different effects in urban management and urban gameplay. 2. Iteration of art 
1) Upgrade of rendering pipeline 
"Watching the Moon" is a game made with Unity engine. There are many products in the industry that are made with Unity and have excellent artistic performance. While striving for smooth performance on the mobile side, we enabled the HDRP rendering pipeline and modified the relevant code in this iteration to make up for Unity's own engine performance disadvantages and improve the art quality of the game on the PC side. With the refresh of art standards, we have moved from the flat approach of comics in traditional second games to the 3D-based art expression and materials of 3A games, moving closer to better light and shadow levels and more realistic rendering materials. In addition, we have a TA technical team of dozens of people to ensure that the entire product can be optimized to the extreme, so that more players can play smooth and high-quality games. 
2) Upgrade of model design 
We have comprehensively improved our model production standards, and the overall quality is aligned with the highest level in the industry. Lin Long, Lai Lai, and the male and female protagonists will meet you first in the content released this time. They represent the basic standards of character quality in "Wang Yue". The overall character design and model quality are still being polished. The future test versions are worth looking forward to. 3. Evolution of gameplay 
In this exposure, although the gameplay part is not the protagonist, it does not mean that the gameplay part has not been upgraded. 
It’s fun but a bit tacky, and this feeling has been further optimized during our iteration process. We have established the foundation of the gameplay and development system with "symbiosis of humans and souls" as the core. Here is a first pass, a comprehensive upgrade of the gameplay content will be announced before the subsequent second test. With outside development, inside combat, and urban gameplay, "Wang Yue" will provide players with a subversive and free Chinese urban open world pet-catching RPG game. We are building a different Chinese open city. Okay, I believe this iteration of content will be loved by everyone. I would also like to once again thank all spiritual shareholders for their continued support of "Wang Yue". A new test will also be launched in the near future, and the fun "Wang Yue" can be expected in the future!
devnote-718446:
Welcome to the Millennium, the 50th anniversary of humanity’s journey into the universe! Our convoy is about to set off for an adventure on an alien planet where the Beast-Ears live! 
The earth is in a beautiful golden age, the crisis of world war has been eliminated forever, and the endless emergence of new technologies has made life dazzling. A sound sleep in the cradle is sweet enough, why look at the cold stars in the distance? 
But some people are dismissive of Shen Mian, such as you, a young veteran. As far as the eye can see, the brightest thing in the night sky is the Earth's companion star - "Knox". This "green planet" that is as far as the eye can see is the tomb of space exploration, where the glory and glory of the previous era are buried. 
If you don’t want to be swallowed by the abyss of nothingness, why not set off towards the turbulent distance? Embark on the road to the universe, visit the wilderness, settlements and hills of alien planets, and lead your lovely comrades to victory! 
…And the times will move forward again!
devnote-378464:
*About inspiration: 
"Rookie Dreamer" originated from a set of pictures we created under the Xiaohongshu account "Ruky". Many Diamondback fans hope that we can make a simulation decoration game based on the illustration style of Diamondback. After careful research and planning, our team decided to start making this game. The starting point of our team's production of this game is mainly to create a virtual companion "little rookie" for players in the virtual world, giving players a feeling of being healed. Diamondback is a character who is both naive and fun-loving, but always full of positive energy for life. He is both our companion and an emotional embodiment of ourselves. In this world where there are all kinds of rookies everywhere, everyone has a question, that is, "Where do rookies come from?" With this question, the player will play a "graduate of rookie sociology" and come to live in Caicai Town to find the origin of rookies. In the process, players will make friends with NPCs in the game, learn their stories, and decorate their homes*About game features: 
1. The degree of freedom in decoration is very high. There is no need to follow a grid, and it can also be flipped from all sides (it is a real flip that can be flipped after placing the furniture on the sofa). Furniture can be placed outdoors or even the house can be removed and placed directly on the foundation. 
2. The NPC stories are interesting and rich, and all plot stories are adapted from the players’ real experiences. 
3. All NPCs can conduct AI and dialogue, and in the future they will have the ability to deeply socialize with players (such as taking the initiative to visit your home). *About social gameplay: 
In the future, social gameplay will be designed around the point of "celebration". The idea is that players can celebrate any event in their lives in the game, from getting married or graduating to putting on beautiful makeup today. You can decorate your house and style as you like and invite friends to your home to celebrate any event in your life. *About the team: 
Most of our team members are animators and designers born after 1995 from the Academy of Fine Arts. We love IP and the game industry, and hope to make a casual game that has both "visual" and "gameplay" so that players can celebrate every day of their lives without any burden. Therefore, we collected thousands of user questionnaires in the early stage and are committed to making a game that is co-created with players. At the same time, this game is also full of challenges for us. If you are interested in our games, you are more than welcome to communicate with us.
desc-718446:
"Cedar" is a military-themed real-time tactics game. 29 years ago, human astronauts landed on the Earth’s companion star, Knox. There are residents who have animal ears and can use a mysterious power called "EGO". In order to enhance international prestige and internal cohesion, the two major forces from the earth launched a fierce space race, vying to invest huge amounts of resources in Knox, allowing this planet with only the technological level of the seventeenth century to accept the baptism of modern civilization. However, five years ago, the "Alliance", one of the two powerful forces, finally couldn't bear the huge burden of the space race and disintegrated. The various forces that rose on the corpse of the giant launched a brutal civil war. The other side, the "entente", also lost the external enemies it relied on to unite its internal forces and fell into chaos and incompetence. Orderly and fair competition no longer exists, and the earth has become more turbulent and confused. At the same time, without the blood transfusion from the earth, the industrial system and modern social life that had begun to take shape on the planet Knox were also difficult to operate. The winners and losers of the two planets are equally miserable. Some people on Earth began to place their hopes on Knox: Perhaps the mysterious EGO skills of the Knox people could bring change and development to the earth; or at least, they could find a new way of life on this largely virgin planet. So, you, a young veteran who is a survivor of the Alliance Civil War, are sent to Knox to collect the research results of EGO in the Alliance era: the legendary "legacy" that can inspire the astonishing power of EGO to move mountains and reclaim seas. And your next choices will ultimately determine the fate of both planets. ◆Game features 
Innovative strategic gameplay - easy to use, deep, control the battlefield in real time with your fingertips, and experience hundreds of thrilling battles in different terrain environments. 
Multi-dimensional tactical deployment - position construction, infantry and tank coordination, fire bombing, create your own winning tactics. 
Accompanied by charming characters - Get along with dozens of cute female comrades with different personalities day and night, delve into each other's inner worlds and become their irreplaceable people. 
The charm of the times reappears - feel the interaction between the native culture of the planet Knox and the millennium culture of the earth on the carefully crafted alien stage. 
Full Russian dubbing - the first 2D mobile game in China with full Russian dubbing, a unique audio-visual enjoyment.
desc-755604:
"Sea of ​​Forgotten" is an ocean adventure open world RPG self-developed by NetEase Joker Studio. You will become a puppet captain with "water in your head" and embark on a free, fantastic and imaginative adventure journey on the sea. Listen, my captain. 
Elsewhere, you're busy saving the world and making a name for yourself. But here? In addition to searching for gold and silver treasures on the sea, you also have to find your lost "brain". 
You are not alone, your partner, the clever girl named Ace, calls herself a genius adventurer. But apart from some weird inventions that only explode in her pocket, she's not much better than you. Because like you, she is also an unlucky person who has forgotten all about the past - obviously she doesn't think so. In short, welcome to "Sea of Oblivion"! Want freedom? There is no such word as "rules" in this ocean! 
Want to be One Piece? What are you waiting for? Go beat up every guy you don't like! Take the helm and set off, every sea area and every island here is waiting for you to explore! Search for the treasures hidden in the sea, and then return to Otopia to splurge! Want a crew? There are so many talented weirdos here! 
This sea is full of weird but powerful guys like you and Ace: tailors who get inspiration from dreams, decadent slackers who were once legendary pirates, warship officers who betrayed a noble family... Let’s try to get along with them first. As for whether to become partners with them, or be thrown into the sea to feed the fish, who knows! Want to fight? Show off your fully armed warship! 
Explore the vast island and remember to bring your most reliable partners to form a team to fight against the enemy. To provoke the giant monsters on the sea, you have to show off your fleet's strongest armor and most sophisticated cannons! Have you ever seen that gorilla carrying a cannon? It's just an appetizer in many fierce naval battles! Want to have fun? Let’s go shopping in the city of Otopia! 
The real treasure is hidden in the happy hours of playing mahjong, behind the dim and mysterious lights of the dark alley night market... Whether it is in the city of Otopia or a small camp on the island, you can catch chickens, set rings, play chess, or mahjong, you can play whatever you want! Why are they all puppets? Haha, we forgot too! 
Come on! It’s time to set sail towards the sea of oblivion and find our lost memories together!
devnote-621548: Welcome everyone, I am Mac, the art director of "Blue Front". Although you may not be familiar with me yet, I believe that as time goes by, we will gradually become friends. "Blue Front" is not only the fruit of our hard work, but also a brand-new invitation to adventure, waiting for brave captains to explore unknown seas and experience unique maritime battles. I am here, as a developer and as a journey guide, to reveal to you this wonderful journey that is about to begin. Although competition in the field of naval combat games is fierce, we believe that Blue Frontline’s unique features will attract players who are looking for freshness and strategic depth. Our games combine exquisite historical research with innovative game mechanics to create a game world that is both historically faithful and modern. I hope this introduction can arouse your curiosity and make you eager to join this unknown sea adventure. In the world of "Blue Front", every wave carries a story, and every battle is a test of wisdom and courage. Now, let us set sail together and head towards the world of "Blue Front"!
desc-621548:
"Blue Frontline" is a classic naval battle-themed mobile game with a hard-core realistic style. It adopts the innovative gameplay mode of "Strategy + TPS", which covers the formation of fleet ship types, the capture of strategic points, the formulation of combat strategies, and the control and command of single ships. It is included in the game. It has acquired hundreds of famous historical warships, and can carry out various modifications and upgrades to the warships according to their own needs. The same warship will have different performance under different modification strategies. There is no absolute "formula" development mode, and the high-freedom development mode will give players a rich gaming experience. 【Product Features】 
1. Really restore classic naval battle scenes 
Really depict classic naval battle scenes, making players feel like they are in a war-torn ocean. The game uses high-quality 3D graphics to finely present the appearance and details of well-known battleships, including battleships, cruisers, destroyers, etc. Each battleship has been carefully modeled and strives to restore its true appearance. At the same time, the game also simulates the real ocean environment, with rough seas and unpredictable weather, bringing players an immersive gaming experience. 
2. The perfect combination of TPS and strategic gameplay 
The game perfectly combines TPS (Third Person Shooting) with strategic gameplay to bring players a brand new gaming experience. In TPS mode, players can personally control the warship, use main guns, secondary guns and other weapons to shoot, and experience the real thrill of combat. At the same time, the game also focuses on strategy. Players need to reasonably arrange the tactical layout of the fleet, make use of the characteristics and skills of different warships, and formulate effective tactical plans in order to win in the battle. 
3. Diverse sea area conquest experience 
Players play the role of commander and expand their territory by continuously conquering new ports; dispatching governors, developing ports, establishing routes, and managing a huge maritime empire. In addition, the game also has various challenging missions, such as escort missions, ambush missions, etc. Players need to use strategies and skills flexibly to complete these missions and obtain generous rewards.
desc-378464:
"Rookie Dreamer" is a moderate simulation casual mobile game. The core gameplay is to allow players to collect various types of furniture and then decorate their own houses. The highlight of the game is to build the world view and gameplay of the entire game with the Xiaohongshu Internet celebrity IP "Diamond Dreamer" as the core. "This is a world where people and noobs live together. You can see various noobs and noob shops everywhere on the road. Noobs have the same independent consciousness as humans and like to make friends with humans. Every child has the opportunity to become a partner with a noob when he is 7 years old. As for how noobs came to be, there are various hypotheses, but there is no conclusion yet. I only know that they have coexisted with humans since the beginning of history (I heard that there is a noob history museum, which contains historical relics of noobs living together with humans) 
There are 7 types of chickens, namely, baby chicken, baby spicy chicken, baby chicken, baby chicken, baby mushroom chicken, baby chicken, and baby chicken. Different chickens have different personalities. "In the world of rookies, everyone has one question, that is, "Where did rookies come from? "With this question, the player will play a "graduate of rookie sociology" and come to live in Caicai Town to find the origin of rookie. In this process, players will make friends with NPCs in the game, learn their stories, and decorate their homes. Featured gameplay: [Super high degree of freedom + true four-sided flipping] 
The degree of freedom in decoration is very high. There is no need to follow a grid, and it can also be flipped from all sides (it is a real flip that can be flipped after placing the furniture on the sofa). Furniture can be placed outdoors or even the house can be removed and placed directly on the foundation. [Virtual Pet-Unique Diamondback Gameplay] 
All the background stories and gameplay in the game revolve around Diamondback (for example, some couriers need to go to Diamondback Station to pick up the goods. When you pick up the goods, Diamondback may take the wrong package from you, and he will send you another courier as compensation). At the same time, you can also dress up your Diamondback. [Featured NPC system] NPC stories are interesting and rich, and all plot stories are adapted from the players’ real experiences. All NPCs can have free conversations, and in the future they will have the ability to have deep social interactions with players (such as taking the initiative to visit your home) [Sandbox Time System] 
The flow of time in the game is the same as in the real world. After you spend a certain amount of time in the game, the game map and NPCs will change (for example, the trees on the map will grow with the time you log in, and the NPCs on the road will have corresponding hidden plots). [Residential Moving System] 
In this game, every time your level reaches a stage, you can unlock a new community. The higher the level, the larger the room type and the more high-end it will become. 【Block system】 
Most of the auxiliary functions in the game, such as "suites", "mini-games", "luck draws" and other functions, will exist in physical form in the neighborhood. [Contact us to learn more about game news] 
[Contact us to learn more about game news] 
Official Xiaohongshu account: Xiaohongshu Ruky, Xiaohongshu Dreamer
devnote-748031:
Hello everyone! We are the "Imo" project team of Paw Print Studio. 
With the first exposure and "paw test" of "Imo", we received a lot of attention. This enthusiasm from everyone surprised and moved us, and it also strengthened the reason why we wanted to make this game in the first place: 
We often ask ourselves over and over again: "What kind of game do we want to make?" 
Our answer is always the same - 
"Make every plant and tree in the world real and feel, allowing players to immerse themselves in it." 
"Let every Yimo have fresh life and soul" 
"Be eclectic and build a free, interesting and warm world" 
"Relaxation, healing, love, if there is emo, there will be no emo" 
So, "Imo" was born! (Yes, our pet’s name is Imo~ In this big world, you will meet all kinds of Imo: 
The fluffy little charcoal dog, the star mage in a cloak, the cloud sheep as soft as a cloud... 
We carefully polish each Emo, not only do we want them to be cute, but we also want them to be real. The texture of hair, the touch of skin, and the small details of decoration, we all hope to make everyone feel their true existence. 
But for us, what is more important than their appearance is their inner soul. 
Each Yimo is an independent existence. 
They have their own characters and their own way of life: 
For example, shy otters like to go to the beach to jump on the "trampoline" made of sea anemones during the day, and sleep in a ball in their habitat at night; 
Different races may also quarrel and fight over trivial matters. 
They are not a tool for self-expression, nor a means to please players. We hope from the bottom of our hearts that these imoos will be happy, ordinary, and live a wonderful life in this world. We hope you can slowly discover these cute and interesting details during your journey. When enough trust is established between you and Imo, you can open the "connection". 
"Connection" not only allows you to use Yimmo's skills in battle, but also solves puzzles during exploration: 
Dig into the ground with the flower bud crab to escape attacks, "drift" on the beach on the shell star, use the flame of the little charcoal dog to light the vines to get the treasure chest... 
What's even more special is that "Connection" can also allow you to truly "become Imo". 
Use their eyes to see the world, use their ears to listen to the wind and birdsong, and even blend into their tribe, experience their daily life, and accept commissions from "same kind"... 
When you truly stand in their perspective, maybe you will understand: they are not your appendages, they are your friends and partners. After testing the "Paw Raise Test", we received a lot of opinions and suggestions from everyone. 
These suggestions and opinions are very effective in helping us quickly find new directions for modification and design. 
We have optimized and adjusted various modules such as characters, scenes, lighting, combat, special effects, and game performance. 
Add more interesting and sustainable new ways to play, 
We also designed more brand-new Yimos and created corresponding habitats and ecology for them. 
Let the world of "Imo" become richer and more exciting, 
Now, the new world of "Imo" has been prepared. 
The Immos are also "waving their claws" waiting to meet everyone. We sincerely hope that we can embark on a gentle and free fantasy adventure with you. 
Here, you can meet your own Imo and witness their growth; 
You can also explore side by side with real friends, or get to know more like-minded travelers. 
We are not a relationship between "developers" and "players" - we are you and we are players! 
We love the Imo we design and believe they are real. 
We hope that this world of Imo is created by all of us. 
We believe that every imo, every encounter, every connection, 
They will all become a warm and firm "paw print" in this world. 
So, please wave your paws with us to welcome the arrival of the second test! 
Welcome to the world that we all long for—a world where people and pets coexist! ——The production team of "Imo" by Paw Print Studio
desc-748031:
"Imo" is a multiplayer online pet-catching RPG in a large world. You will encounter various magical creatures-Imo on the vast continent of Adel. By uniting with them, you can also experience the beauty of the world with a new perspective and ability. You can also come to the near-future city floating in the sky, meet other adventurers, exchange travel experiences or feel the charm of competition. Come take your Imo and start an adventure in the world beyond your imagination! This won’t change! Connect to become an adventure and explore the wonders of the world 
During the adventure, you will unite with Imo and make use of Imo's various abilities: complete puzzles in the world, win every battle, and solve any problems you encounter! No longer limited to human speed, vision, and abilities, experience for yourself the coexistence of rationality and wildness. You can clearly hear the whisper of the wind passing through the grass blades, and feel the faded and bursting flames flowing gently in your blood. "Connect" with Yimo and experience the world with a new identity! This is so much! Morphological branch evolution, filling your illustrated book 
Little Imo has so many faces! Living area, weather conditions, evolutionary branches... there will be different imo! The flower bud crabs in the beach area will protect themselves with coconut shells. In the beach form, they are decorated with colorful gems. In the bay form, they are addicted to basking in the sun, and their bodies turn ripe red... When the off-key grass grows up, will it turn into a witch grass that sings distorted sound waves? Or is it a giant "squatting at home"? Encounter and cultivate different forms of Imo, fill in the illustrated book step by step, and become a walking Encyclopedia of Mo! This time there will be many new Imo Clubs to meet with you! This Mo Ling! Material expressions and movements, vivid and within reach 
Or fluffy fluff, or hard armor... Various realistic materials and rich action expressions allow your eyes to penetrate the screen and touch the flexibility of life. The docile shy otter will charge with a shell shovel, the flower bud crab with thick claws is actually a coward, and the brave fire wolf will also enjoy the tranquility of the campfire at night. The small movements and sense of contrast they inadvertently show are what makes them charming and cute! When they tap on the screen, it’s a signal to act coquettishly! This is strange! Listen to ethnic stories and recount the ups and downs of love 
Various magical creatures-Imo, live and dance together on the continent of Adel, and each race continues its unique racial ecology and community story. The shy otter in the Whale Falls shoal likes to be naughty and push its companions into the water from high places; the whistling gull family likes to join in the fun, playing occasionally funny music with a high-pitched and bass ensemble. The ecosystem of the sea, land and air where various creatures overlap, every corner is a natural and exquisite idea; every sound records the echo of life. More new stories will be revealed to you soon! Wherever there are people, there is warmth and warmth, and where there are Imo, there are stories! This is so cool! Real-time battle capture, endless fun in grabbing eggs 
The new "Egg-Grabbing Battle" is coming. Obtain rare pets with friends, and compete with other players for rare Imo eggs... Who can grab the most precious Imo egg? Go alone or team up to win the treasure, and join in this adventure about luck, strategy, and gaming! Experience the thrill of real-time free pet-catching battles! Back attacks, combos, traps, surprises... When the method of capture is no longer single, every moment when the puzzle cube is thrown is full of surprises; when there is no need to wait in the battle, smooth movement, precise strikes, waiting for opportunities, or wandering around, every moment is full of excitement! This is so warm! When traveling in an RV or home, Imo is always with you. 
Each adventurer has an exclusive RV on the vast continent of Adel, parked in the big world camp, where he can meet, communicate with other players, and display their personal layout. It is not only a mobile base for adventurers in the big world, but also a small entrance to a private home. 
When you return home, you and Imo can plant crops, build decorations, freely arrange the space, and create a life scene that is unique to you. What’s even more interesting is that you can deeply combine production facilities with play experiences: Carousel mills, miniature Ferris wheel spinning wheels and other devices allow you and Imo to play and produce at the same time; friends work together and Imo helps to make the whole home a warm, interesting and interactive immersive paradise!

desc-732739:
【Game Introduction】 
"Sea Beast Restaurant" is a restaurant management game that integrates store opening simulation, ocean exploration, and animal cultivation. 
Escape the hustle and bustle of the city, bid farewell to 996, join hands with your childhood best friends, and start a new life adventure in the "Sea Beast Restaurant"! 
"Sea Beast Restaurant" is a dream restaurant located on the polar seaside. It not only has blue sky, white clouds and snow-white ice fields, but also countless cute employees and guests, waiting to weave a warm and interesting story with you. 
※Cute characters will melt your heart - from the lively restaurant staff to the picky yet cute guests, each character has been carefully designed and pops up on the screen with a super cute image, adding infinite vitality and laughter to your restaurant. 
※ A culinary feast, a carnival of taste buds - from classic home-cooked dishes to exotic meals, from desserts to seafood feasts, there are a variety of delicious dishes for you to research and unlock. 
※Multiple operations, strategies to win - from staff training to dish development, from menu design to exploration of guest preferences, various types of business gameplay are waiting for you to challenge. Use your wisdom and creativity to create a unique restaurant brand and attract customers from all over the world. 
※Sea exploration, fishing adventure - take a submarine and sail to the mysterious sea area that has not been fully explored. Here, you can enjoy fishing, collect rare ingredients, and even discover hidden treasures and adventures. Every time you go out to sea, it's a new adventure. 
Sea Beast Restaurant welcomes you!
desc-773812:
"Uto"——Your exclusive character life theater and story engine▷Core introduction◁ 
"Uto" is an immersive creation platform that combines in-depth character customization, free home decoration and intelligent plot generation. For character (original character) lovers and story creators, we have created an intelligent digital stage that can bring fantasy into reality. ▷Main gameplay and features◁ 
1. [Soul Shaping: All-round Character Editor] 
■ In-depth setting: Comprehensively define the character's gender, background, talents, numerical values, personality (such as lively, cautious, arrogant, etc.), hobbies and complex interpersonal relationships. 
■ Soul Endowment: Based on in-depth settings, the intelligent agent gives a new, free, and unfettered soul to create a completely independent personality. 
■ Exquisite appearance: Create the character's visual image through a high-degree-of-freedom face pinching system and hundreds of clothing accessories. 2. [World Building: Immersive Home Decoration] 
■ Dress up as you like: From facial expressions and expressions to clothes, various accessories, and movements, you can dress up as much as you like. 
■ Free decoration: Match a large number of styles and theme furniture as you like to create a home that perfectly fits the character's story. 
■ Dynamic interaction: Your character will live, rest, and interact in your home, bringing static scenery to life. 3. Intelligent dynamic planning self-driving engine 
■ Exclusive universe construction: Input the character background, world view and plot stage you set into the system, and the agent will automatically integrate the character image, home scene and complex personality to generate a highly customized and logically consistent narrative deduction. 
■ Animation content generation: Based on the planned content, intelligently drives character performances, scene interactions and lens language, automatically generating animation clips with emotional tension and story-telling, making each imagination "visible and sensible". ▷Technical Highlights and Commitments◁ 
Advanced generative intelligence and decision tree models are used to ensure that the plot deduction is logical and full of surprises. 
Data privacy is strictly adhered to, and the copyright of your settings and stories will always belong to you. 
The continuously updated content library and algorithm optimization make the creation tools increasingly powerful. ▷Calling all creators◁ 
Whether you want to "audition" for a character in your own novel, want to build an immersive parallel world, or simply enjoy the fun of creating a "life" from scratch and observing its story, "Uto" is the toolbox, stage and cinema prepared for you. ▷A curious explorer of all smart innovative experiences◁ 
Here, every character has a life, and every choice drives destiny. 
Now, start creating your first character and watch the story grow on its own. Ready to unleash your creativity? Download Uto and get started today!
devnote-773812:
When I wrote this letter, it was 3:17 in the morning. 
The only sound in the office was the sound of my keyboard, and outside the window was the city of Hangzhou sleeping. I thought about it and decided to use this time to tell you something from my heart - because for more than a year, what I am most familiar with is the night at three o'clock in the morning. Last March, we decided to make a game for OC creators. 
At that time, there were nine people in the team, crowded into a rented office. There were not enough chairs to sit on cardboard boxes, and the door was opened for ventilation when the air conditioner was broken. Most of our employees have just graduated, some have given up their original stable offers, and some have told their families that they "have found a job," but in fact they are earning a monthly salary that is not even enough for rent. It's not because I'm stupid, it's because I heard that I was going to make a game about OC, a game about intelligent agents, and everyone couldn't move. 
"OC people understand OC people!" A colleague held my hand that day and shared her OC's 10,000-word settings in a gushing manner. 
This sentence later became the starting point of "Uto". But we really didn’t expect that this road would be so difficult. 
You know, we have overturned this game four times. 
The first time was because of technology. I found that the artificial intelligence produced was too rigid and did not look like an OC with a soul at all. The second time was because of the gameplay, I felt it wasn’t warm enough or healing enough. The third time, the fourth time... I have lost count. Every time I tear it down and start over again, watching months of hard work turn into a pile of useless code, the whole office is so quiet that you can hear breathing. Some people secretly wiped away tears, some people went out to smoke a cigarette and came back to continue writing, and some people stood up and said, "It's okay. If you try it again, it will definitely work this time." 
And then we do it again, and again, and again. 
In those days, the lights in the office never went out before two o'clock in the morning. Some people just put a yoga mat under their workstation as a bed, some people haven't spoken to their roommates for a month (because they have gone out while their roommates are awake, and they have already fallen asleep when they come back), and some people are the first ones to arrive the next day after posting "I can't bear it anymore" in the group. The Spring Festival of 2026 is a day for family reunion. 
There is a group among several of our producers and core colleagues called "Uto·The Meeting Room that Never Disappears". On the night of New Year’s Eve, the group was still sending messages—not to express New Year greetings, but to discuss how to optimize the logic of a certain agent. My mother came in with dumplings, saw me holding my cell phone and making a voice call, and asked me if I was crazy. I said no, we just want to make a game that makes the creator gods feel warm. 
She looked at me for a long time and said, "Are you warm yourself?" 
I don't know how to answer. In fact, we have received a lot of questions this year. 
"Only the 9 of you can make a game with artificial intelligence+?" "Did the function delay? Did it run away?" "Do you not understand OC at all?" 
We've all seen it. Saw every one of them. 
But I also received more warm private messages—— 
"Waiting for you, my daughter has prepared a new home." "I wrote her story in a memo, and I will copy it into the game when it comes online." "It doesn't matter how long it takes, because I know you really understand." 
Someone sent us his OC setting collection, which is over a hundred pages of text. Someone wrote a long comment on the forum, saying that this is the first time someone is willing to make a real game for OC creators. Someone sent us a private message and said thank you for making me feel like I’m not alone. 
To be honest, every time we see these, we feel that no matter how hard it is, it is worth it. Now the team has slowly grown to 30+ people. Still young, still inexperienced, still chased by various bugs and problems every day. But we know better than we did a year ago what we are doing, and how far we are from that ideal world. This version, to be honest, is still a long way from the most perfect state in our minds. 
Its functional experience has problems with the hand, its gameplay has problems with the logic that is not that smooth, its art has problems that do not express diversity enough, its intelligence is not "personalized" enough, and there are many gameplays that you are looking forward to that have not been included, and... 
It is still far away from the "Uto" in our minds. 
Every time we look at the feedback in the test group, Xiaohongshu, and TapTap, we are touched and anxious at the same time—what is touching is that there are people who really value our OCs as much as we do, and what is anxious is whether we can produce works worthy of this cherishment. But, in the end, we decided to release this version first. 
Not because it is good enough, but because we promised everyone that after one year, we would give an explanation to all the creation gods who are waiting for "Uto". 
It is also an explanation for us developers - this year's nights have not been in vain, this year's arguments have not been in vain, and this year's love deserves to be seen. 
It is also an explanation to the investors behind us - we have not stopped and have been running. It's just that the road is a little longer and more curved than expected, but we are still moving forward. 
I would also like to thank you for every feedback, every suggestion, and every "continue to wait after scolding" this year. Really, we all saw it and wrote it down in our notebooks. Many features were added after listening to your suggestions, and many bugs were discovered because of your repeated attempts. You are the most important non-staff members of this team. By the way, there is one more little detail I want to tell you. 
There is an employee in our team who has a picture posted next to her workstation - it's her own OC. She said that every time she worked overtime until she collapsed, she would turn to look at her and ask her: "Do you think this is okay?" Then she would answer for her: "Come on, just change it again." 
We laugh at her for being stupid, but in fact we are the same. Some people have set OC as their mobile phone wallpaper, some have written OC’s name on the back of their work badge, and some have set OC’s birthday as a project countdown. 
You see, we are also OC creators. So we understand. 
I understand why you would write a biography of tens of thousands of words for a non-existent character, I understand why you turn over and over again late at night thinking about his or her day, and I understand why you want a place where he can truly live. 
We really do. So "Uto" is not good enough right now, but we promise, it will get better little by little. 
Because we love OC as much as you do. 
Because we also want to give our adopted children a real home. 
Thank you for your willingness to leave your OC in our care. ——From a group of gamers who are still trying to pursue their dreams 
(As well as their family members and investors who silently support them) 3:47 a.m. in 2026, in the office with the lights still on
desc-833213:
As the class monitor, Zhu Mi walks through classrooms, corridors and on the way home from school every day. His life seems to be imprinted on a fixed track, stable but also suffocating. Her life was supposed to be the same. But after unexpected collisions, ripples quietly appeared. She discovered that everyone around her seemed to be hiding their own secrets. Her childhood sweetheart who is about to go away to participate in competitions, the bespectacled guy who is always silent in the class, the enthusiastic senior who helps her, the transfer student who is introverted and lonely and obsessed with creating stories, the sports student who shows up at night with injuries and a dangerous smile... This is a story about youth, distance and choice. You will meet different people and hear different emotions between the desks, on the corners of the stairs, on the playground at dusk and under the lonely night sky. In the end, you will weave your own fibers. 
Game content: 
"Fiber" is a visual novel game with the theme of Chinese campus and Chinese family. Players will make choices in every seemingly ordinary interaction and lead to different endings. 
Character introduction: Zhu Mi: has a strong sense of responsibility and doesn’t like to cause trouble to others. It is easy to be anxious and internally consumed, and often fall into self-doubt. Lin Muyang: Zhu Mi’s childhood sweetheart, a competitive student with a gentle personality. He is good at solving problems but not good at expressing emotions. He can only hide his thoughtfulness in clumsy apologies and restrained concern, trying to find a balance between dreams and bonds. Li Ziyu: Zhu Mi’s good friend. Lively, good at dealing with people, likes the second dimension, loves girl bands, and dreams of forming a band with Zhu Mi. He may seem careless, but he is actually very delicate on the inside. Chen Zhe: A somewhat mysterious transfer student. He always wears ill-fitting school uniforms, holds a notebook, and peeks at the world from behind his bangs. Zhang Chuan: A sports student from the school next door. There is a dangerous cynicism in his smile, and scars and lies are his norm. But beneath his frivolous appearance, there may be an obsession and self-esteem that he doesn't want to show. Zhou Wenqian: The bespectacled man in Zhu Mi’s class. He is steady, likes programming, and is used to keeping a distance through observation and analysis. Always provide rational support to Zhu Mi at critical moments. Shen Liuyun: A senior whom my best friend met at the club's open day. He plays the guitar very well and is very enthusiastic about the people around him.

desc-810743:
"Codename: Frontline" is an alliance survival masterpiece built with the UE5 engine. It perfectly integrates open world construction and hundreds of people's scale alliance battles. It focuses on "being able to be tough, being able to farm and attack cities", and has a high degree of freedom in gameplay. It all depends on your preference. 
Here, you can start from scratch, freely explore the vast map with your partner, collect resources, build your own home, and unlock a variety of powerful graduation costumes. Through a high degree of freedom in matching skills and weapons, you can create your own heaven-defying Build, combine it with silky combos, and operate the ceiling to impress the audience. And all the efforts are for the truly free 100-man battlefield in the later stage. You can personally build tactical fortifications, arrange defensive towers, and perform various tricks in fierce battles with flying skills. Whether you are leading the charge, sneaking around behind, or leading a team to cut into the flanks, there are no restrictions on the battlefield. It all depends on how you show off. Of course, playing a perfect combo with your teammates, following the instructions and executing the tactics in place will make victory easier, and the team battle experience will be fully maximized. "Codename: Frontline" wants to bring you not only the fun of farming and building, but also the sense of team accomplishment of planning, collaborating, and fighting with a group of people, and ultimately winning honors and generous rewards. Come and gather together, let’s go up together!
desc-810791:
The yin and yang eyes can see ghosts and discern good or bad luck. 
What would happen if these eyes fell on ordinary people? After ten years of darkness, the light came back to light thanks to donations from others. 
From then on, the world completely changed in her eyes. 
There is an unnoticed figure in the cramped corner, and my heart is entangled with a growing obsession. 
Escape or resolve will become a dilemma. When disaster is predicted to come, will you warn everyone, or remain silent? 
But besides the choice, there is a third way. 
It hides the true desire deep in the obsession, and is also connected with the nightmare that has not been awakened for many years.

(Hands over) (Bow) This time I bring you the story of a blind girl who regained her sight but unexpectedly saw a ghost.
