devnote-799414: Dear office investigators, thank you very much for your attention. We are the development team of "Prism 2033". "When the development of science and technology is beyond control, and out-of-control artificial intelligence and viruses spread, where will we go?" This questioning and imagination about the future ignited the initial spark of the birth of "Prism 2033". In the game's world setting, the Earth is on the verge of collapse - out-of-control artificial intelligence and a devastating virus outbreak have dragged civilization into the abyss of chaos. In order to gain a chance of survival, some humans follow the super artificial intelligence EVA and embark on an interstellar journey to find a new home. During the long journey into deep space, EVA built a huge virtual universe - Prism 2033. This is a digital sanctuary created to protect the human spirit, providing comfort and hope in the interstellar void. The prism universe we aspire to build for everyone is not just a virtual space for exploration, but an ecosystem with irregular textures. The environment in the game will undergo natural changes, such as the growth and withering of trees and the changes of the four seasons. The residents here have realized their five senses through information field technology. When faced with events such as fires, they will react differently like real people. We hope to create a living universe that breathes, grows, and is waiting for you to leave your footprints. When countless parallel worlds are flourishing in the same universe, the crisis under the shadow is also quietly spreading. As the new investigators of the firm, you will face the dark forces that breed in the dimensional rifts, and through missions one after another, you will uncover the truth hidden behind the multidimensional world. The door to the Prism World has been opened to you, and the mysteries buried deep behind the parallel world are waiting for you to explore in person. Thank you for your attention and support, and you are welcome to put forward your ideas and suggestions at any time.
desc-751315:
"Subnautica: Below Zero" will be launched on overseas iOS and Android platforms on March 10. 
On an alien planet, dive into frozen underwater adventures. The story of "Under Freezing" takes place two years after the original "Deep". Return to Planet 4546B and uncover the truth behind the deadly cover-up. Build pressurized chambers, craft tools, survive harsh conditions, and dive deep into the world of Subnautica. 
Below Zero is an underwater adventure game set in an alien ocean world. It is a new chapter in the Subnautica universe developed by Unknown Worlds. 
Players are immersed in a new sub-zero adventure in the Arctic region of Planet 4546B. Arriving with only your wits and some survival gear, you're determined to find out what happened to your sister... 
After a mysterious accident, Alterra left in a hurry. This area is dotted with abandoned research stations. What happened to the scientists who lived and worked there? Logs, items and data storage scattered among the wreckage paint a new picture of the accident. You have limited resources and must improvise to survive on your own. 
Swim beneath the blue-lit bow of Twisty Bridge. Obsessed with the dazzling giant crystals of the Crystal Cavern. Climb snow-capped peaks and venture into the ice caves of Glacial Basin. Move flexibly between the gushing Thermal Vent and search for ancient alien artifacts. Below Zero presents a brand new environment for players to survive, learn and explore. 
Build a large number of pressurized cabins, scavenge for resources, and craft equipment to survive harsh climate conditions. Drive the Snowfox flying motorcycle and fly across the snow-covered tundra. Ride a modular Seatruck through fascinating and dangerous biomes. 
Unknown beings lurk around every corner. Swim past the giant Titan Holefish, encounter the haunting Shadow Leviathan, and visit the adorable Pengwing. Stay alert. Not all creatures in this strange world are friendly. 
Jump in, the water is warm. Subfreezing temperatures in the Arctic pose new threats. New weather conditions blanket the pressurized chamber above ground. Make yourself warm and cozy in the cold weather by sipping on a piping hot cup of coffee and staying close to the Thermal Lily to warm up against the cold. 
What happened to my sister? Who are the aliens who have been here before? What is their purpose in visiting this planet? Can we find solace in grief from the truth? "Below Zero" expands the plot of "Subnautica" and deeply explores the mysterious world of the original game. 
"Below Zero" is being developed by Unknown Worlds, a small production team whose history can be traced back to 2002's "Half-Life: Natural Selection" mod. The original "Subnautica" was also produced by this production team. Team members are located all over the world, from the United States, the United Kingdom, France, Russia, Austria, Australia, Canada and other places. 
This game contains flashing lights and may not be suitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other light-sensitive conditions. Players are advised to play with caution.
devnote-810743:
Hello everyone, I am "Little Tiger Neighbor", the developer of "Codename: Frontline". 
A game enthusiast who has "been in jail" and "went to heaven" in various games. I have played many games in the past, but the top one has to be the kind of multi-player team battle game that can "open black" and "pull". You can communicate with a group of brothers crazily through voice, and use tactics and operations to win every tough battle - whether it is a big charge or a big battle. Shouting "press on" is still the same as yelling "give me a sip and I can still show off" when I am still alive. This kind of excitement on the spot and the sense of belonging to the team, as well as those who have turned from "net friends" into real friends who can go out to dinner together and "make money" from each other in reality. This is the most "top" experience that the game can give me. 
But now, this experience is so hard to find. 
Either you interact with NPCs throughout the whole process, or you play a passerby game where the system randomly matches you, and then you leave after playing, without any sense of belonging. I have also tried some strategy games that focus on "large-scale team battles", but seeing the icons on the board bumping around and then a series of battle reports popping up... it's really not fun enough. What we want is to rush into the battlefield in person, have the skills and special effects blur our faces, and have the immersive feeling of hearing teammates shouting in our ears. 
So, we made Codename: Frontline. 
Without further ado, I’ll just tell you what you might be concerned about: 
There are no restrictions on how to play, and the main theme is "I want it all" 
In the early stage of the game, you can treat it as a survival construction (SOC) cooperative game: explore the map, collect resources, build strongholds, and cooperate with teammates to respond to crises. Here, players can concentrate on building infrastructure and building a rear home for their own squad or legion. Of course, all this accumulation is in preparation for the real goal in the later stage: a super-large-scale city attack and defense battle. At that time, offensive and defensive battles between hundreds of people were a daily routine, and the goal was to compete for key cities in the open world. 
Weapons are not only built, but also "transformed" 
We designed a complete transformation mechanism for the weapon. It's not a skin change, it's a real form switch. Here, you can rely on your own understanding of the weapon's tactical positioning and skills, freely disassemble and assemble skills, allocate attributes, and build combinations, and you can also carry multiple weapons at the same time and flexibly switch between them. We want to give you the feeling of "can this thing still be like this?" both visually and operationally. 
Teamfighting is not about "fighting for value", it's about "fighting for coordination" 
When the game enters the later stage, the core experience will shift to macro strategic confrontation. It is no longer a wild encounter between several teams, but a battle for resources, multi-line advancement and epic city attack and defense with legions as units on a vast map. The offensive and defensive sides can freely build siege and defense facilities, and cooperate with on-the-spot command to create various tactical arrangements. You need to work with your teammates to listen to the command, cooperate, and execute tactics. Whether you are "pressing forward" to attack from the front, or "stealing" from behind, or even being a key player and "taking down the turret" in a desperate situation, every operation you make may affect the situation of the battle. Here, awareness, cooperation and on-the-spot decision-making are more important. Of course, the game is still in the early stages of development, has limited content, and is still rough in many places. But we want to find those players who still miss the "large-scale, strong coordination, heavy operation" team battles, and polish it together in the test. If you are interested in this type of gameplay, or have ideas about "transforming weapons" and "freely building offense and defense", you are very welcome to try it and give us the most direct feedback. 
Together, we can turn this into a game worthy of being on top. 
See you in testing!
desc-35:
"Angry Birds: Classic Returns", as the continuation of the largest mobile game in history "Angry Birds 2", is about to return to the Chinese market! 
The game is created by the official original team of Rovio and published by Kingsoft World Games in mainland China. It aims to evolve the slingshot gameplay into the 2.0 era. It inherits the simple and interesting touch screen operation method, but brings richer strategy and destruction fun through 3D engine technology, dynamic random levels, new characters and new magic props. 
The battle mode has been fully upgraded. Players can freely choose the order of the birds, formulate personalized attack strategies, fill up the destruction meter and get additional birds. New blizzards, peppers, golden ducks and other cool magic are added to help you fight against pigs. 
Taking full advantage of the 3D engine, it creates an ultra-clear world that integrates dynamic scenes, swaying trees and flowers, storms, thunder and lightning, and special light and shadow. There has never been such a stunning scene on Piggy Island. 
The many levels are endlessly interesting. The game contains more than 3,000 completely different random levels, full of unknown mechanisms and traps. 
The pig BOSS challenge has been upgraded. The pigs are no longer just bullies for you to bully. Powerful BOSS-level pigs such as King Pig, Chef Pig, etc. will bring huge challenges. 
Easy to get started and endless fun! "Angry Birds: Classic Returns" is suitable for players of all ages. Come join this global slingshot game storm!

A healing adventure RPG where you can easily raise a dragon! One day, you accidentally picked up a dragon egg and hatched out a proud and greedy dragon cub. From that day on, you and it embark on a journey to train a dragon - you are responsible for using your brain to match tactics, and it is responsible for working offline to make money. When you wake up, it will be waiting for you to return with full harvest. It’s too late to explain, so grab your dragon cub and start the adventure together! We are an independent game team composed of a group of overseas students. "Summer of Longmian" is an independent game that we developed in our spare time in the past half a year. In the game, you will play a child living in Longmian Town and spend a pleasant summer in this nostalgic town. We hope that this game can bring some simple happiness to players without having to be exposed to complicated systems and cumbersome values. We just want to relive the summer in our childhood memories with everyone. 
Player communication QQ group: 116919354
devnote-255926:
About the original intention of creating "The Summer of Dragon Sleep": 
First, we want to choose to make something that we are more comfortable with when we still have a choice, and deliver some feelings to players that can be described as beautiful. 
At the same time, we also want to make Chinese-style things, but we feel that Chinese style is not just about the Tang, Song, Yuan, Ming and Qing dynasties, but the era we live in also has its own style.

desc-242575: "Project Rene" is the latest work from "The Sims" developer Maxis, and the game's codename may eventually become "The Sims 5." According to the developer, "Project Rene" will allow players to play solo or collaborative games on various devices and support multi-terminal interoperability. It will also make the building phase of the game more social, with the purchasing of items and home-building phases being playable with multiple players. Friends can join right in Project Rene and decorate a room together. The build phase is also fully cross-platform, and during the preview a player was seen browsing the furniture catalog and decorating a room on mobile, then modifying details on PC.

Dear islanders of Chicken Island, you have been waiting for a long time! 
First of all, thank you all the islanders of Xiaoji Island for your patience. We will pay attention to and refer to every inquiry and suggestion from the community. During this period, everyone's attention and support have become the confidence and motivation for us to polish our products. 
After repeated polishing during this period, we can finally tell you clearly: "Wu Liuqi: Shadow Clash" will soon start a round of small-scale technical testing and recruitment. The core purpose of the test is to hand over our optimization results during this period to everyone for inspection as soon as possible to further verify the rationality of the optimization direction and test the stability of the version. Precisely because it is a technical test, the number of places will be relatively limited, so please understand it~ 
We sincerely hope that everyone can go to the island to experience it for themselves and feel all the new changes this time. As for more information related to this [technical test], you can pay more attention to our community posts and other social media. 
At the same time, in the follow-up, we will definitely organize larger-scale and more content-rich experiential tests. 
"Don't be afraid, don't shrink back, because I have someone to protect!"
devnote-784122:
Hello everyone, this is "Shine!" Lumi" project team. 
There are not too many gorgeous words, and there are no promotional words. More, I just want to talk to everyone about the original intention of this game. As a game development team, we are also part-time workers in the new era. After dragging our exhausted bodies after a long day of work or study, we are too tired to do anything. At the same time, we have to constantly think about "What kind of game are we going to make?", I really want to find a place to relax myself. In this process, perhaps everyone in the project team has reached a certain "tacit understanding." 
——We hope that this game will no longer add any burden to everyone, but create a place where people can truly relax. The game itself is a way of entertainment. It should bring us happiness, rather than daily routine and liver copying day after day. It should be more in line with your current state. You can play when you want to play or not play if you don’t want to. There is no burden. 
Our original intention of making games also comes from here. But having said that, a relaxing and unburdening game cannot be a green eye-protecting screensaver! This world should be colorful, we have to fill it! 
What if there were a group of little pets that could heal you, or even little abstract monsters that could make you relax and smile? 
——Well... Just do it! 
But the pet theme has really become popular in recent years, and can our "utopia" of easy healing have its own unique characteristics on this basis, so that you are willing to stop for us? Therefore, we have also made several key decisions that are “unshakable”: 
First, we don’t follow the trend and make RPGs that explore large maps. For us, "small but beautiful" and an exquisite world where all the beauty can be seen at a glance can make people calm down more. 
Second, we are determined not to make designs that are both offensive and costly. Here, there is no daily pressure forcing you to clock in every day. Every Lumpy you own can be obtained for free through the game process. We want you to be able to play at your own pace and feel comfortable, no matter what stage you are at. 
Third, we want to give all players a stage to showcase themselves. You may be a builder who likes to quietly decorate his home, or a collector who likes to unlock illustrations, or a strategy player who is keen on studying card combinations, or you just come here to take a look and be in a daze - no matter what, we hope you can play here comfortably and find your own fun. Because of these ideas, we finally created Lumi's world. It may not be grand enough, but it is warm enough; it does not pursue excitement, but hopes to keep you company for a long time. 
We know that the game still has many shortcomings, but because of this, we need your suggestions. We will read and think about every comment carefully. If you are also expecting one: 
You can put it down at any time and come back at any time. 
Can truly relax instead of adding to the burden, 
Fill the small world of fragmented time with warm companionship. 
Then "Shine!" Lumi" is willing to be your warmest companion. 
Together with all Lumi, we are here waiting for you. Looking forward to meeting you in Lumi’s world! ——"Shine!" Yours sincerely, the Lumi development team
desc-784122:
"Shine!" "Lumi" is a casual and healing pet catching and management game. The game combines the gameplay of pet cultivation and simulated management. You will play an adventurer, explore the world of hand-drawn cartoons, and encounter hundreds of cute and charming Lumpies of different shapes. You can manage and decorate your home island with your Lumi friends, or you can embark on an adventure, collect Lumi illustrations, and cultivate a powerful team. [Fresh and healing hand-painted world] 
Immerse yourself in fairy tale picture books to heal your tired soul. In a world built with soft colors and smart lines, every frame is like a breathing dynamic illustration. Follow the brisk background music, stroll through starlit forests and floating islands in the sky, let your busy thoughts settle quietly in the healing beauty, and find the long-lost peace and beauty. [One-click adventure with massive partners] 
There are hundreds of Lummies that are all the same, so you can easily collect all the illustrations. Just tap the screen to start a dream adventure, and meet cute and cute Lumpies with their own characteristics in various scenes such as rainforests, deserts, volcanoes, etc. The simple capture mechanism combined with the rich illustration system makes collection easy and fun, satisfying every player's desire to collect. [Fair competition and casual battle] 
Use your lineup to defeat the enemy and win without taking any actions or adding value. There are no complicated combo requirements here, and there is no numerical crushing caused by paying. Cultivate and evolve your Lumi, deeply explore the strategic fun of attribute restraint and skill matching, form the strongest lineup, and experience the pure joy of winning with your mind in a relaxing and enjoyable battle. [Layout as you wish, accompanied by cuteness] 
Lumi works part-time while I collect vegetables and decorate the home island with great care. On your exclusive floating island, you can freely plan the layout, place and adjust buildings, and create a personalized home with different styles. The cute mummies will become your right-hand assistants, automatically taking care of home production, allowing you to enjoy the peace of mind and satisfaction of "growing steadily even offline". 【Play and stop anytime, no need to choose the model】 
It doesn’t take up space and doesn’t take up time, so you can use it anytime, anywhere. The game's ultra-small package and excellent performance optimization allow even a thousand-yuan phone from ten years ago to run smoothly. Make full use of fragmented time such as commuting and lunch breaks, and enjoy a relaxing and stress-free gaming experience in just a few minutes. Catching pets can be easy!
devnote-774226:
Hello everyone, I am Qian Fan, the producer of "Three Kingdoms: Hundred Generals" from Seven Star Studio. Today I want to put aside all the gorgeous packaging for a moment and sincerely talk to you about our original intention and heart in making this game. 
As a "social animal" who commutes, works overtime, and takes a break every day, and is also a "player" who deeply loves card games, I know that everyone's time is being cut into more and more pieces. Sometimes on the subway or while waiting for a meal, I want to play cards at any time, but I am often "dissuaded" by the complicated rules and long games. Therefore, we came up with an idea: Can we make a casual competitive card that truly fits the rhythm of modern people? The rules are simple, the battle begins immediately, and the outcome is determined within a few minutes, but there are still strategies, surprises, games, and moments that make people smile. At the same time, we also hope to create a fair skill-playing environment so that everyone can enjoy pure happiness in the game. ‌ Based on this idea, we constructed "Three Kingdoms: Hundred Generals" step by step: 
1. Mechanism: Easy to get started, but full of variables 
We use the familiar national card rules as the basis, and incorporate unique military commander skills, as well as more random gameplay such as famous horse boosts and the endgame "Sword Show" mechanism, so that luck no longer determines everything. You can use these mechanisms to create more possibilities in every game, ensuring that your every experience will not be repetitive or boring. You can score steadily by relying on routines, or you may be surprised again and again because of a clever strategy or a reversal of the identity of the "Light and Dark Master" - this is the most primitive joy of card games. 2. Rhythm: three minutes per game, relaxed and stress-free 
We hope that whenever you want to relax, you can open the game without any burden. Quick matching, fast start, clear strategic ideas, and you can "point out the country" just by intuition. A complete, exciting, and satisfying game can be completed in three minutes. At the end of the game, you can either put it down with satisfaction or choose to continue immersed in it. 3. Generals and skills: multiple choices, endless possibilities to try 
Each famous general of the Three Kingdoms has its own unique skills. You can "hoard cards" in the early stage to create more choices for yourself; you can also deceive the enemy's key cards, and then use skills to change the cards to take them away; you can even use skills to directly "discard" the cards in your teammates' hands to win... If you don't get the "human rights card" that guarantees a win, you can boldly try different lineups, explore your own play style, and play wonderfully with the characters you really like. 4. Fairness: generals do not draw cards, and their strength does not involute 
In order to allow everyone to really put down their worries and concentrate on playing cards, we have completely deleted the general card drawing system and adjusted it to commercialization. Almost all generals can be obtained through free exchange or direct purchase through playing cards. The "Road to the Stars" and the "Golden Pie" given out by missions will be launched later. Generals can also be unlocked, with no routines and low thresholds; at the same time, the balance of generals will be adjusted on a regular basis, rejecting supermodel generals, warehouse management generals, and forced krypton routines. It will be paired with resource bankruptcy protection and daily free compensation, so that every player can compete fairly and have a safe experience. We will continue to iterate to maintain fairness and fulfill the promise of "generals will not draw cards or tear cards, making the Three Kingdoms game fair again." ‌In addition, we pay special attention to protecting every player’s experience. There is a resource bankruptcy protection system in the game, and there are a certain number of free compensations every day, so that novices and players obsessed with honing their card skills can safely immerse themselves in the game and compete fairly. 
‌ 
If you are also looking forward to a game like this: 
The rules are simple and easy to understand, one game every three minutes. 
Relaxed but full of strategy, short and fast but full of excitement. 
Fair and with a little surprise, 
"Three Kingdoms: Hundred Generals" is the product we are working hard to achieve this vision. 
This is not just a game, but we want to hand it to everyone in your busy life, a fishing artifact that you can click at any time, get happiness at any time, game with peace of mind, and compete fairly.
desc-730107:
"Wu Liuqi: Shadow Clash" is a 2D pixel-style horizontal version adventure RPG mobile game developed by the official company and integrating original animation and creative gameplay. 
【Game Features】 
"Party competition: don't fight hard, fight hard instead of "mind-minded" " 
Don't worry about your weak hands or slow reaction times. Here, operation is not the only way out. We have prepared a large number of imaginative prop mechanisms. Rather than fighting for skills, we recommend that you work on your "mind". As long as the routine is deep, even random punches can kill the master! Whether it's the highlight of the counter-attack or the hilarious laughter, this is not only a duel, but also a large-scale party. "Refuse to go to jail: We want innovation, but also happiness." 
On Chicken Island, no one forces you to brush until you are bald just for that random entry. We hope to focus on a more pure fun experience, eliminate those tedious and redundant random entry pits, and make the road to becoming stronger clearer and more targeted. Giving time back to happiness is our stubbornness as "cross-border newcomers". "Original story: Familiar formula, spiced plot" 
Is the main plot completely reproduced? That's so boring. While we use pixel style to carefully restore classic scenes, we also quietly buried many clues to fate that are intertwined with animation but lead to different directions - familiar scenes hide unseen stories. Prequel additions to classic characters, undeveloped plot developments in the original work, and the "Daily Life on Chicken Island" that everyone wants to see the most - all are arranged! "Pixel Art: A little surprise that makes you smile" 
We rebuilt the world of Chicken Island using pixel style. There are also a lot of easter eggs and small details buried in it, waiting for every fan and player to discover. Whether you are a long-time fan or a handsome guy who just got into the game, after pushing pictures to pass the levels, taking your time to dig out these hidden little ideas is also a kind of collecting fun that is very unique to Wu Liuqi. "Various tricks: Implementing the "567-style" humor" 
Since it is Wu Liuqi, the only thing that is not serious is serious. From Ah Qi's ability to control scissors with energy to the skills of various strange characters, every move has a nonsensical gene. Go to "Dabao Manufacturing" to make some weird inventions, or practice a set of "mental techniques" with unique painting styles. We strive to infuse every detail with the kind of "Wu Liu Qi" humor that makes you smile. Chicken Island welcomes every visitor, regardless of origin. There are wonderful stories, exciting battles and diverse gameplay waiting for you here. 
At present, the reservation has been officially opened. Come and click to make a reservation and have fun with your friends on Xiaoji Island without talking about martial arts!

Reject a single gameplay, and use multiple modes to meet different needs! You can play pure card-playing in a fast-paced three-player game, or you can stage an "acting" showdown in a five-player light and dark identity field. You can also team up with friends to play black and white and achieve exquisite cooperation, or you can go through the PVE mode and challenge the level puzzles that advance layer by layer. Until that afternoon, a mysterious girl whose appearance was extremely inappropriate for her age broke into his unchanging daily life. 
Because of an amusing misunderstanding, he had an intersection with this girl named Su Youqing. Lin Mo gradually discovered that this venomous, arrogant, childish-looking girl seemed to be hiding many secrets that were inconsistent with her appearance.

devnote-766061:
Dear strategy game fans: 
Hello everyone! We are the development team of "Gem Wars". Today I want to talk to you about our original intention and philosophy of making this game. 
First, we wanted to make a different elimination game. It is not a simple match-3 game, but a new experience that deeply combines strategic cards and elimination gameplay. Here, every time you eliminate gems, you are accumulating energy for your cards, and every skill release needs to be carefully calculated. 
About game features: 
We have designed 38 characteristic kingdoms, each with a unique adventure experience 
More than 1,600 cards, each with exclusive professional attributes and skill effects 
Season-based PVP ladder allows every player to find the fun of competition 
Rich resource copies ensure that players always have content to play 
In particular, we adhere to the concept of "fair game": 
✓ No physical limit, you can play as long as you want 
✓ All cards can be obtained through games 
✓ Union system allows players to help each other 
✓ Free resource benefits every week 
We know that what players hate most now is "forced to spend money". So we promise: 
Never set levels that require money to pass 
All paid content is just icing on the cake 
Players like Gan Emperor can completely dominate the ladder by relying on their skills. 
Finally, we would like to say: "Gem Wars" is a game that requires a lot of brainpower, but it is definitely worth your time. Here, strategy is more important than gold, and skill is more critical than luck. 
Looking forward to seeing the wonderful performances of all tactician masters in the game! 
Sincerely, the development team of "Gem Wars"

You have been chosen by fate to be the protagonist in charge of your own life.

devnote-795243:
Hello everyone, Summoners, I am the planning king. "Game of Kings" is a Q-version Chinese-style game that combines Roguelike random events and auto-chess strategic battles. Each game strives to bring you a brand new strategic experience! 
Regarding some of the issues raised by everyone, I would like to take this opportunity to hear my quibbles (not). 
1. Why is TapTap still testing when other platforms have been launched? 
---This is caused by the characteristics of different platforms, but files will not be deleted no matter where they are, and accounts and servers are also interoperable. 
2. If you don’t recharge, you can’t get XXX generals, and if you don’t recharge, you can’t reach XXX rank. 
---The generals in the game are unlocked through ranks, and they can be obtained through recruitment after reaching the corresponding rank; there are many posts on the forum about the King of Zero Krypton unlocking all generals, you can refer to them and exchange them. To be continued, I will read the forum posts and everyone's comments. You can also join the official group by clicking "More" in the game. Everyone is welcome to communicate and discuss! 
Thank you for your support of the game, I hope you can have fun~!
desc-319303:
The Chinese-style stand-alone business simulation game "Gu Town Home" is inspired by the production team's childhood rural life experience. The busy and high-pressure city life makes people miss the peaceful and comfortable time of childhood. Get to know the neighbors in the ancient town, plant fruits and vegetables, breed animals, build houses, create your own farm, search for strange wild fruits and medicinal materials in the mountains, study Chinese cuisine, and regain the simplicity and happiness of life. ——Feel the magic of nature as the four seasons change in the ancient town—— 
The ancient town is built around a centuries-old lychee tree, hence the name Lychee Town. It has significant seasonal changes, with different scenes in different seasons. The culture you love is popular, and whenever festivals come, there are also exciting activities! In addition to the quaint town, there are also rich natural landscapes to explore in the surrounding area, including bamboo forests, maple forests, birch forests, beaches, etc. Hundreds of unique wild animals and plants can be discovered, and more possibilities are waiting to be discovered! ——Hundreds of crops and flowers, a paradise for farming enthusiasts—— 
There are more than 60 kinds of crops in the ancient town, and you can choose crops to plant in different seasons. Crops can be sold, processed as food, or given to residents. This is also a paradise for flower gardening enthusiasts. Not only can you buy various flower seeds in the town, but you may also find unique varieties in the wild. The vines that happen to be planted next to the cabin will also climb all over the cabin to add color! ——I am the most stylish in building farms. No one is more beautiful than me—— 
Clear wasteland, cultivate fields, make agricultural tools, plant crops, raise livestock and poultry, and build a farm that best suits your style from scratch. You can also buy or collect materials to DIY furniture, decorate your own cabin, and match it with some plants and flowers. In addition, of course you have to dress yourself up, try different clothes and decorations, and become the most beautiful person in the ancient town! ——Exploring the ultimate mystery of human beings: interesting interpersonal relationships—— 
There are dozens of residents in Lychee Town, all with unique personalities and lives, waiting for you to make friends, chat, play, and treat guests to dinner. There are more than 10 single residents among them, with whom you can have in-depth interactions, develop romantic relationships, and even start a family, manage the farm together, and enjoy a happy life. ——They are very good at raising animals. When they see pandas, they say they are fat—— 
You can raise a variety of animals including chickens, cows, sheep, etc. on the farm. If you give them appropriate feed every day, they will grow up slowly and continue to produce eggs and milk. There are many stray animals in the town. If you give them food, they will become good friends with you, go home with you, and live with you. One day you may even see the national treasure giant panda, and there will be even more unexpected surprises! ——Making authentic Chinese food, maybe dark cuisine—— 
Want to know how authentic Chinese food is made? Let you start a journey of exploring Chinese food from the stove! No recipe? This is nothing! Rice + eggs may be delicious egg fried rice, or it may be a dark dish, it just depends on how rich your imagination is! Ingredients can be grown or purchased, or obtained in the wild. There are more than 40 species of seasonal fish living in the surrounding waters. The fish you catch can be used to study dark cuisine and enjoy fishing.
devnote-835638: To my dear you: Zhan Xinan. We are Mint Rabbit Studio, a new small B-game factory in Hangzhou. Compared with traditional B-games, Mint Rabbit is committed to creating a different immersive plot experience - a real world full of love, and a world of sadistic short dramas full of human conflicts. Sweet and warm love, as well as the pleasure of tearing apart malice, will be presented to you. Our exploration goes beyond romantic relationships and explores the many facets of human nature. Each sadistic world will correspond to a common human weakness, accompanying you on your journey through time and space to find yourself and grow together. Foolishness and filial piety, excessive love-mindedness, credulity in others, cowardice, etc... You are in a world of sadistic literature in a parallel time and space, and you are tortured all over your body because of these weaknesses. They need your salvation, you are the only light from the real world. As the only heroine of the game, you will pick up a naughty kitten that belongs to you on a warm afternoon, and start a journey between reality and sadistic stories. During this journey, you are not alone. The four male protagonists with vivid personalities will always be by your side. Fu Chenyan, the capital helmsman who controls the business landscape and is cold on the outside and warm on the inside. What kind of shy, scarred heart is hidden under his cold mask? Su Jingxian is the one who attracts the most attention under the spotlight, but who only gives you your preference and retreat. What kind of determination and stubbornness that would rather die than surrender is hidden under his cheerful appearance of pursuing freedom and doing whatever he wants? They have been together since childhood, hiding their tenderness and preference in the years. What kind of repressed and twisted possessiveness is hidden behind his considerate and warm eyes? Yan Chen, a genius professor who is deeply involved in academic circles and favors you very much. His eyes can see through the good and evil in people's hearts, and this pain makes him want to fight and reshape the world. Only you are the little sun that can soothe his crazy throbbing. Love is the gentlest salvation. They will accompany you to break the shackles of abusive memes and form a bond that transcends time and space and reaches the bottom of your heart while going through difficulties together. Maybe you have had such a moment, in the tired night, can't help but wonder - if you had made another choice, would your life be different? Come and open the door to a new world. There are countless "yous" hidden in countless worlds of abuse. They are trapped in their own sadistic destiny, waiting for you, the light, to come, waiting for you to make a new choice-which will ultimately bring about a new destiny. As a small team, we don’t have too many fancy things, and we just want to put the purest joy and initiative in your hands. We don’t have gorgeous promotions and packaging. We just want to devote all our time and efforts to polishing the core plot and game experience that you care about most - making a unique game that truly understands you and allows you to play it to the fullest and enjoy your time. We will polish every detail of every plot with the most sincere intentions. We pay special attention to every player's experience, attach great importance to customer service, and try our best to carefully review every feedback, respond patiently to every question, and treat every appeal with heart. (Please supervise us according to this standard) May you accompany yourself in the parallel world out of trouble and gently reconcile with yourself on this journey full of love. Getting along with the four male protagonists may make you slowly see that love never has a fixed appearance. The side by side in the trough, the tolerance when confused, and the preference and determination in ordinary days are all its most touching appearances. We are willing to be your haven when you are tired and accompany you through an unforgettable time. I hope that the bonds and warmth hidden in the story will quietly stay in your heart and become a soft and powerful foundation when facing life in the future. Thank you for your trust and companionship. We want to write every story in the future with you. ——Mint Rabbit Studio Team Sincerely PS: 1. "Codename Heroine" is only a temporary name for testing. Please wait for the specific name of the game to be announced later. 2. The operation method will follow a conscientious route, without routines, no pressure, and full of benefits. 3. We look forward to your feedback, whether it is good or bad, we will take it very seriously and use it to make the game better. 4. The first round of testing is about to begin. The testing quality does not represent the final quality. 5. It is prohibited to create corrupt works, to sculpt the male protagonist, to attack the male protagonist or excessively spoof the image of the male protagonist, to refine the character and image of the protagonist, to maliciously troll, to spread rumors, to take quotes out of context, to provoke fights, and other bad behaviors. Please understand!

devnote-808126:
To every migrant worker who doesn’t want to be a “little pig demon” 
Dear kings, your letter is like your face: 
When we were children and watched Journey to the West, we all felt that we would be the Monkey King, with our feet on the auspicious clouds and lawlessness. 
When we grow up, we realize that we are actually just the little pig monster in Langlang Mountain. 
He was scolded by the commander every day, urged by the king, went bald in order to make ten thousand arrows, and was finally used as a brush to clean the pot. 
What if...the identities are swapped? 
If you were sitting on that chair covered with tiger skin, looking at the group of trembling little demons below, would you be a benevolent leader, or would you become what you hate the most? 
The original intention of making this game is very simple, just to let everyone "vent". 
In reality, we only write weekly reports and memorize KPIs; 
Here, you can strike hard and let the little monsters experience what "social beatings" mean. 
You can promote a toad who only knows how to flatter you to a supervisor; 
You can throw the bull spirit who is tired every day into the alchemy furnace; 
You can shout at the little monsters working all over the mountains and fields: "I treat you as brothers, but you want overtime pay?!" 
Of course, this is just a game. 
I hope that after all the kings have finished the "black-hearted boss addiction" in Langlang Mountain, they can turn off their mobile phones and still face tomorrow's life with a smile. 
After all, life is not only difficult, but also the electronic mustard we have prepared for you. 
—— Sincerely, the production team of Langlang Mountain’s First Black Heart King Congress
desc-834338:
Slime Rancher 
Game introduction 
Slime Ranch tells the story of Beatrice LeBeau, a brave young rancher. She went to the "distant star field" thousands of light years away and tried to make a living by raising slimes. [Explore a vibrant alien world, capture and care for adorable slimes, and bring your once-abandoned ranch back to life! ] Game Features 
- Play as a curious and adventurous woman trying to get her newly acquired Slime Ranch back on track. - Use your trusty vacuum backpack to collect adorable slimes in the wild. Each type of slime has its own likes, dislikes, and sometimes special needs that must be met in order to take good care of them! - Discover new hybrid species! - Explore the vast and colorful distant star field. Find slimes and collect resources! - Wander the sandy beaches of dry reefs, explore the moss carpets of wild flora, and marvel at the sparkling crystals of the indigo quarries while digging for hidden treasures! - Earn coins through daily tasks or market transactions to expand your ranch: decorate your estate, fence your slimes, grow crops and build chicken coops to feed them. - Earn coins through daily tasks at the Ranch Exchange or by selling Poofs at the Poofs Market. Then decorate your ranch cabin, expand the slime enclosure, and feed them by planting a garden and building a chicken coop! - Craft and upgrade your vacuum backpack and tools to make ranching more efficient! - Three different game modes, allowing you to follow Bea's journey at your own pace! Adventure mode allows you to experience real ranch life and feel the ups and downs. You can also choose casual mode for a more relaxed experience, or challenge yourself to achieve success faster in sprint mode!
devnote-237561:

In this fictional near-future world, a civilization on the verge of collapse is waiting for your rescue. You can freely switch between ground and aerial battlefields through exquisite horizontal movement and vertical movement. At the same time, you can cooperate with the tactical coordination of your teammates to perform hearty combos and conquer powerful opponents with different characteristics. In addition to the passionate battles, the game also prepares horizontal levels with rich levels: from light puzzle solving to in-depth exploration, from regular collection to "hardcore" hidden content, the diverse gameplay will be gradually unlocked as the plot progresses. We also always pay attention to the balanced design of game difficulty - ensuring that every player can fully experience the main plot and enjoy the core content of this world. desc-808126:
Congratulations, you have officially taken over this mountain due to the "poor management" of the previous king who was saved by a physical stick from the monkey. There is no passionate westward journey of the four masters and apprentices here, only a black-hearted factory in the demon world that is on the verge of bankruptcy. From today on, you are no longer the passerby drifting away in the wind, you are the Chief Executive Officer (CEO) here! [Joining a job is a blessing, and your resume depends entirely on it] 
It starts with a ruined temple, and the employees rely entirely on "physical persuasion" in the wild. Whether they are "airborne soldiers" who want to go to the West to gild gold, or "old fritters" who only know how to fish, we will capture them all to fill job vacancies! Here, 007 is the basic welfare, and not paying wages is the corporate culture. Quotations from the King: "Work hard. Although the company has no money to pay wages, the King will definitely marry you a beautiful sister-in-law next year!" [Refuse to fish, accurate portrait] 
The little demon has a weird personality? That’s because your KPI assessment is not in place! 
-Juan Wang Xiaoyao: This high-quality asset must be arranged to go to the mining area for continuous rotation. As long as the rotation is fast, gold can be dug out of barren veins. 
-Spiky-headed Little Demon: Like to peek at "Journey to the West" at your workstation? Send him directly to guard the mountain gate, or... send him to the alchemy workshop for further study. Always monitor the little demon's mood and physical strength, and remember: only living cows and horses can create residual value. [Physics "Graduation", Waste Utilization] 
When the life of the little demon is about to expire and the output efficiency is low, as the king, you need to show your wise decision-making power. We have introduced the most cutting-edge "talent optimization system" in Heaven - the alchemy furnace. Throw in those employees who can no longer create value, and it will turn into a golden cultivation elixir in just three minutes. This is not a disappearance, this is their final sublimation of value to the company. [Step on the heaven, thunder washes your feet] 
When you have accumulated enough demon elixirs and violent assets, it is time to form your "Salary Avengers Alliance". Not only must we guard against malicious poaching from the hilltop next door, but we must also always keep an eye on the hairy-faced monk who always wants to come and "demolish" the property. This time, we are not only going to be survivors under the knife, but we are also going to attack Lingshan and transform the Great Thunder Sound Temple into the largest foot-washing city in the demon world!
desc-237561:
Huge erosion rifts tore the sky apart, bringing with it a huge natural disaster called "The Great Erosion." Nearly 90% of the world's land was contaminated by the phenomenon called "erosion," making it impossible to survive. The remaining humans could only escape into several fortress cities in order to survive. 
If the situation is allowed to develop, there will be only one final result - the end of human civilization. 
Now, as the captain of the special operations team of the Erosion Management Bureau, you will go to the all-devouring rift and shoulder the mission of closing the source of the disaster. When you step into it, you may see the cold light of a sharp blade from the medieval era, the roar of an ancient dragon breaking through the sky, or the electromagnetic light cannon whizzing past with a dazzling light. You will listen to the reverberations of other civilizations echoing through time and space until you get to the heart of this disaster... 
Is it to revitalize human civilization and resist fate, or to become a lonely sigh in time and space with this world? 
Officer, all the decision-making power is in your hands.

devnote-194039:
Adventurers in the eternal realm, welcome: 
The mobile game "Don't Starve: New Home" (formerly Don't Starve: New Home) has opened pre-orders for all platforms, and we sincerely invite you to join. Bring food and torches to explore the world of hungry wilderness. Before we go, we’d like to give you a brief introduction to Starved Wilds and answer some questions you might be interested in. 
1. What kind of game is "Hungry Wilds"? 
"Don't Starve Together" is a multiplayer survival adventure mobile game authorized by Klei, with "Don't Starve Together" (hereinafter referred to as DST) as the core gameplay. Players need to overcome countless difficulties such as hunger, temperature, humidity, enemies, etc. in a randomly generated sandbox world, strive to survive, and gradually explore wider unknown areas. 
2. So, what is the difference between "Hungry Wilderness" and the PC game? 
We are well aware of the unique charm that famine has brought to everyone in the past ten years. During the survey, the most popular voice we heard from fans was: "I want to play DST with friends on my mobile phone!" During the research and development period, we and Klei have been discussing the design of the mobile game and the similarities and differences with the PC game: we hope to bring you a classic Don't Starve experience, while also making the product more suitable for mobile operations, making it easier for new players to get started, and with more new content. So the gameplay of "Don't Starve", as its name suggests, includes three parts: the original Don't Starve game, Homeland, and new gameplay: 
① The original Don’t Starve game: Currently we have transplanted most of the content of DST as of the end of last year (excluding character rework, special events and quality of life patches). The limited furnace and gluttony gameplay in the original game will also return to the mobile game. 
②Home: Home is the safe zone where players are when they go online. Materials obtained during the adventure can be brought back to the home for construction and decoration. 
③New gameplay: We have prepared multiple new civilizations: including new plots, resources, creatures, bosses and rewards; the game also provides gameplay suitable for team formation; during the adventure, players can grow, customize skill sets, and unlock new plots. 
3. Can I play the original character? 
Different from the original work, in "Don't Starve", players can create their own Don't Starve character. Explore and grow in "Don't Starve". The original characters will also continue to appear in the game as surprise NPCs. Players can play them in some specific levels to complete unique survival challenges. We also plan to add more original character usage scenarios in the subsequent seasons! Special gameplay, so that you can have more opportunities to use those familiar characters and satisfy everyone's expectations for reuniting with "old friends". 
4. If my character dies in the sandbox gameplay of the mobile game, will it be deleted? 
Don't worry. Although the sandbox world in the mobile game will be reset like the original game, your character will be retained and the items in your backpack will be returned home intact. 
"Hungry Wilds" is still under development. We are working hard to improve the game content and hope to bring you the best gaming experience. At the same time, we also hope that with the help of this product, more players will know about Famine, understand Famine, and fall in love with this survival game that is still full of charm after ten years. If you have any questions or comments, please leave us a message in the community. Thank you all in advance. Looking forward to officially meeting all adventurers in the world of hungry wilderness!
desc-133568:
The mobile version of "Ark: Survival Evolved" is a large-scale survival exploration sandbox mobile game. It was developed by the original European and American team of Wildcard Studio. It relies on the Unreal 4 engine and restores all the gameplay of the PC game with ultra-high quality. The story tells the story of a group of people who wake up and appear on a mysterious beach. Faced with hunger and cold, you must find resources, make crafts, grow crops, research technology, and even build shelter according to dynamic weather changes (scorching days, freezing nights). Exploring this ancient open world for survival, you'll need to use your wits and resources to kill or tame the gigantic dinosaurs and other primitive animals that roam the land, and team up with or hunt dozens of other players to survive, dominate... and escape! The PC version of the PC game has achieved unprecedented success. In June 2015, "Ark: Survival Evolved" was released on Steam. It sold 200,000 units in 48 hours and led the Steam sales list. It was popular among players around the world and topped the list many times in the following year, ranking first on the Steam list for 14 weeks. The total sales volume has already exceeded 10 million. Wildcard also won the "GDC2016 Best New Studio" award for "Ark: Survival Evolved". The sales of ARK PC game alone reached US$400 million. [Use Unreal 4 to transplant PC games] 
It was actually quite difficult to remake a large-scale client game that had been successful on PC into a mobile game. It took nearly 2 years to achieve almost 100% porting. Compared with other sandbox mobile games, Ark may pay more attention to image quality performance. Fully built on the Unreal Engine 4, the game can be displayed in detail on the mobile phone, ranging from light and shadow, weather, water flow and object reflection, to textures and skins. [Sandbox means freedom] 
With only your hands and a pair of shorts, you can face various challenges from the unknown virtual world. Survival issues such as keeping warm, hungry, and escaping from beasts are all tests that players must go through in the game. In addition, extremely free settings such as resource collection, tool making, house building, and tribe establishment also allow players to truly experience the charm of sandbox mobile games. In the game, players can witness prehistoric behemoths walking in gloomy jungles and strange swamps, which is undoubtedly a novel experience that subverts the senses. At the same time, with the in-depth experience of players, from the initial nakedness to the stone and iron age of slash-and-burn farming, and then from electrified mechanical weapons to the laser armor of the sci-fi future, a new experience spanning human civilization, reversing the future is freely created by players. 【Realistic tribal battle】 
Games and reality are on the same latitude, and it is common to be woken up in the middle of the night to defend the tribe. Ark's GVG is very close to real war, including combat preparation accumulation, reconnaissance, infiltration, attack and defense, plunder and other aspects. Players need to perform their respective duties and cooperate closely. Rich aquatic and flying creatures add a three-dimensional sense to the battle, and with the combination of terrain and architectural elements, strategies and tactics will never be the same! 【Encyclopedia of Dinosaurs】 
The uniqueness of the game is that it realizes the fantasy of players and dinosaurs living in the same time and space. In the game, we will see Giganotosaurus, Aeolian Pterosaur, and even a huge Brontosaurus. There are currently more than 100 creatures of various shapes, and these are all based on real historical data, bringing the "Jurassic Era" to life before our eyes. At the same time, almost all dinosaurs can be tamed by you and become your personal belongings. Whether it is building a home or attacking a city, different dinosaurs will bring you different experiences.
desc-779303: I was reborn. I was reborn at the beginning of my business. In my previous life, due to poor management, my milk tea shop was eventually crushed by my opponent. . . Standing at the door of the store, the sweet smell of condensed milk mixed with memories poured into the blood, and endless power boiled in the veins. In this life, I want to make the four words "Ice Castle Sweet City" a nightmare in the milk tea world. Run your own milk tea shop with your friends, place tools, set prices, and become the best shop on the street.

devnote-775906:
Hello fellow players, two years have passed by in a blink of an eye, and before I know it, the Hero project has come a long way with everyone’s company. Looking back, the road ahead has been full of twists and turns, and it has not been perfect. Fortunately, everyone's encouragement has given us, an "elderly start-up team", a rare opportunity for re-employment, and we have barely established ourselves in the gaming field where the new generation is surging. Thank you very much to all the fans for their attention and support for me and Daxia! Regarding Legend of Heroes, it is true that there are many shortcomings due to lack of experience. At the beginning of the release, we expanded the main body through high-frequency versions. Later, although the pace slowed down, we also regularly tried more content, art, gameplay, etc. in the form of DLC... During this time, we also gradually realized that some underlying design issues in the game are difficult to completely solve through tinkering. Even if the crux is clear, changes may cause more uncontrollable problems. 
This patching development model also affected the team's creative enthusiasm. We still hope to continue to explore new possibilities for the Hero IP, so at the beginning of this year we finally made a decision: 
——It’s time to start a new adventure to make up for the existing regrets! The new project is officially named "The Legend of Heroes". As the name suggests, it is a spin-off of the same worldview and spin-off of the previous game. It has the same buy-out system as always, and the same line of martial arts and knight-errants brings a brand new adventure about conflicts and self-choice. Currently, the game has opened a store page on the Steam platform: 
The web link side story has been developed for some time. Although the specific arrangements have not yet been determined, it is expected that it will be available on the PC side in 2026. For more development plans, you can also follow my personal Weibo, or the studio’s Bilibili and Little Black Box accounts. In the future, I will continue to report development progress and new news to you in the Steam community; if you have any ideas about side stories, you can discuss with us face to face in the Q group!
devnote-737471:
Dear adventurers: Hello everyone, I am the producer of "Ragnarok RO: Protect Eternal Love 2". "Ragnarok" was a very popular game in the golden age of online games around 2000. Its cuteness attracted many cute players. 
As players who love this world as deeply as everyone else, we have always dreamed of letting more people experience the unique charm of "Ragnarok". In 2017, we took this dream and created "Guarding Eternal Love". For many years, "Keeping Love" has been leading the highest quality of the "Ragnarok" series of games. I still remember that in 2017, "Keeping Love" had just been launched, and we met for the first time at the south gate of Prontela. 
At that time, we made a "ten-year promise": we would take risks together for ten years. 
In the blink of an eye, "Keeping Love" has accompanied you for eight years. 
The adventures we have taken over the past eight years have long become our precious memories together. Today, I want to introduce you to a brand new continent called Midgard! 
In this brand-new land, adventurers can finally run, jump, and climb freely—climb the walls of Prontera and explore every corner of Giffin Tower. 
You can soar in the sky on an airship, dive into the deep sea of ​​Isrud to explore the secrets, and count the shooting stars and make a wish on the top of Mt. Malani. 
All this will be achieved in a seamlessly connected world. The new next-generation MMORPG created by Xindong Bgemao Studio - "Ragnarok RO: Protecting Eternal Love 2" is here today to start the adventure! We know that the most beautiful scenery in MMORPG is never just the land itself. 
It is every player who makes this world full of love and warmth. 
Every encounter, every battle side by side, and every moment of emotion make Midgard shine with its unique brilliance. This is a loving world and a lovely world. 
Whether you are a new friend here for the first time or an old player who has been with us for many years, there is always the cutest smile waiting for you here. Let us hold hands and embark on this big adventure of love and courage! "Ragnarok RO: Protect Eternal Love 2" development team
desc-775906:
"The Legend of Heroes" is a new pixel-style martial arts RPG game. It is also a spin-off of the previous game in the same world and as a side story. The martial arts and chivalry come from the same line, bringing a brand new story about disputes and choices in the world. The story takes place after the timeline of the previous game. The new dynasty was founded in the flames of war. Old hatreds and new resentments grew secretly with the entangled forces... You will play the role of a passionate young man who comes from a wealthy family. He does not want to be trapped in a four-corner study and yearns for the vast world. When you resolutely leave home and embark on this treacherous world, your journey begins. 【Game Features】 
●A martial arts storybook written by you 
There is no fixed "martial arts template" here. Whether you are a great chivalrous person who sticks to the right path, or a rogue who acts willfully, your choice is yours every step of the way. 
They will all define a unique way of survival and inadvertently change the fate of others and even the trajectory of the world. ●Light combat with various strategies 
Continuing the classic turn-based system, with the addition of the special "shield-breaking combo" and "partner joint attack" systems, it has both a sense of strategy and enjoyment like a chessboard game. ●The world is where there are people 
Join hands with multiple partners with completely different identities and personalities. They have their own secrets and missions, and also have unique skills to help you at critical moments. ●The light of the sword and the shadow of the sword, the world of fireworks 
The comic-style original painting presents more real details of the pixel world, integrates light, shadow and particle effects, and depicts a splendid Jianghu scroll full of fireworks.
devnote-779303:
The mobile version does not have any optimization and is very difficult to operate. The mobile version is packaged at the request of players. Currently, the main development content is on the official version. There is no time to optimize the mobile phone. For a good experience, it is recommended to play the PC Steam version. 
Have you ever thought about owning your own milk tea shop? In "Milk Tea Shop Simulator - Reborn as a Store Manager in Ice Castle Sweet City", you and your friends will become partners in a milk tea shop and start a business adventure that coexists with warmth and strategy! 
SteamDemo link (8 people can be online): Web link 👥Collaborative management, division of labor creates fun 
Up to 4 Players Online Co-op: Open your single-player sessions to other players and friends to play with. You can also join the game from the lobby and make milk tea with others. 🧋Beverage preparation system: 
Each cup of milk tea is prepared by you personally - from selecting the tea base, adding ingredients, adding sugar and ice, to finally placing the order, you are involved in the entire process. A blast of orange or all watermelon? The soul of this cup of milk tea is in your hands. 🧱Decoration and space layout: 
Flooring, wallpaper, cabinets, lighting, machines...all can be changed! You can even drag the counter position with your own hands to place dolls, small green plants, hanging paintings, etc. If you decorate it carefully enough, it may also increase the popularity of the store~💰Checkout system: 
Every time a customer places an order and checks out, they will hear a "ding~" sound, and the moment when the gold coins float into the air is particularly healing. Support players to perform manual checkout by themselves! ✏️Customized store name: 
Are you still using the common name "milk tea shop"? We support players to customize store names! From "Yidiandian" to "Hot Pot Flavored Milk Tea Factory", every name will appear on your signboard and be imprinted in the memories of customers. 🥵Multiplayer cooperation mode: 
You can run the same milk tea shop together, divide labor and collaborate, and even compete for each other's operating desks. More gameplay expansions will be supported in the future. 🧋Unlock new recipes 
There are dozens of recipes to unlock in the game, so go ahead and find those recipes! 🥊 Beat up customers with bad reviews 
When faced with an unreasonable guest - you can really choose to hit him on the head with a stick! 📝 Customized price list: 
You will have your own pricing power! Whether a cup of watermelon juice sells for 9.9 yuan or a cup of pearl milk tea costs 199 yuan, it all depends on your market perspective! Customers also give different feedback based on price. 💖 NPC favorability system 
A group of NPCs with unique identities will appear in the city, each with their own personality, dialogue, and "favorite milk tea." Interacting with them repeatedly and giving them your favorite drinks or gifts can increase their favorability. 💡After the favorability reaches the standard, they will give you exclusive formulas or furniture drawings as rewards. 🌟 Hundreds of exquisite products are waiting for you to choose! 
Here, you can find hundreds of unique products: not only wallpapers in various styles, but also high-definition mobile wallpapers specially designed for mobile phones, as well as other exquisite and practical small items. Whether you like fresh and simple, dreamy and cute, or cool personality, here you can meet your preferences. Each one has been carefully selected to make your daily life more exciting! 🏪 Expand your store to meet more possibilities! 
Starting with a small store, you will gradually expand and unlock more space and functionality. As your store grows, you'll not only be able to stock more products, but you'll also attract more customers. Every step of upgrading, decorating, and furnishing makes your store more personalized and distinctive. Watching it grow from a humble shop to a large and popular store will be your proudest achievement! 🧍 Diversified customer models 
From migrant workers, old ladies, trendy teenagers, to girls with cat ears who love to clock in. Not only do they have a more distinctive appearance, they also bring more personalized needs. 🚶‍♀️Street exploration and NPC interaction: 
You can walk out of the store, walk through the streets of Ice Castle Sweet City, say hello, visit stores, and trigger side plots🎨Character custom appearance system 
You will be able to customize your character's appearance. We plan to support customization: hairstyle, skin color, apron style, accessories, and even different styles with friends when online. Do you want to sell milk tea in school uniform, or play the villain store manager in sunglasses? All arranged! 🔥 Popularity system and tipping mechanism 
The better the service and the more perfect the milk tea is - the more customers there will be - the more tips the customers will give, and some wealthy NPCs will even give excessive rewards! We believe that a "relaxing and healing" milk tea game is not just about ordering and selling milk tea, but also a simulation of your own life - communicating with NPCs, remodeling stores, and running operations with friends. This cup of milk tea may be a story or an emotion. "Use the temperature of a cup of milk tea to save this sweet universe that is about to collapse" 
Now click [Open Now], Bingbao’s tail has shaken into a propeller!
desc-722349:
Welcome to Parktown, please be sure to adhere to the following guidelines: 
1. Don’t open the game easily, be prepared to be addicted for two to three hours; 
2. You can mow the grass anytime and anywhere. If you really don’t have time, we also have an on-hook system; 
3. The first priority of the game is to have fun! Don’t be superstitious about the happy ways promoted by other games, come here and be happy and that’s it! ▶My pixel cute pet is so beautiful! Can fight! 
Boy, did you lose this cat school girl or this iceberg sister? Well, I also have yandere princesses, hot girl goddesses... dozens of pixel battle pets with different styles, there is bound to be one you like! Not to mention that each of them has unique skills, such as treatment, damage output, shield, and damage increase. They are not like the vase of other games! ▶I’ll spend 100 million with one knife, and I’ll get it! So cool! 
It's a brother, come here... (Sorry, I went to the wrong station)! Mowing grass is common, but the experience of nuclear explosion output is not common! You can instantly clear the screen with one hand, drop treasures while swiping, and collect a magical outfit in minutes to easily achieve a small goal! ▶My endless adventure, pioneering! Treasure hunt! 
Tired of the repetitive brushing experience? Don't worry, there are thousands of different maps here for you to explore freely! Unique scenes, strange monsters, and rich and random treasures are just waiting for you to start this fun-filled adventure! ▶My style is ever-changing and constructed! Match! 
There are quite a lot of sets, skills, runes, pets, and structures that can definitely satisfy your fantasy of a treasure farming game! But we have also made some targeted optimizations. Although the drops are relatively random, there is no one style that is better than others. As long as you use your strategy to match, you can have a very enjoyable experience! ▶I have on-hook benefits and resources! Enough! 
I never thought that I could be the boss! I run canteens, steal food from farms, and open museums. In the real world, I move bricks for my boss, but in the game world, they all work for me! Gold coins, physical strength, and materials are all there when you wake up. Becoming stronger shouldn’t be too easy! ▶I don’t do season system, I don’t roll! Preserve value! 
Have to replay every season? I don't want it! Here there is only the pure joy of "swishing" anytime, anywhere, rejecting involution and anxiety, and you can have fun even fishing! After all, you are the one playing the game, don’t let the game control you!
devnote-722349:
Dear brave men, do you still remember the days when you played a dark game for the first time and repeatedly spawned monsters on the map for the best equipment? The anticipation of racing heart and the ecstasy at the moment of explosion are the purest and most original gaming fun! 
Like you, as a group of game fanatics, we decided to create a pixel-style RPG that can recapture this pure joy - "Run!" Parker" was born! ​ 
Here, "brushing" is the most enjoyable way to play! Every map is a treasure house full of surprises. As long as you dare to challenge, you will have the opportunity to fill the screen with glittering equipment! And as the levels continue to advance, higher-quality equipment is hiding in the dark, waiting for the real brave to get them. Maybe one second you were cheering for a piece of blue equipment, and the next second the purple divine equipment will drop without warning. This unknown surprise is the most primitive happiness we want to bring you! ​ 
In addition to the pleasure of brushing equipment, the skill system is also a highlight that we have carefully polished. As the level increases, a variety of powerful skills will be gradually unlocked. Whether it is cool range magic or swift melee attacks, you can unleash your power in battle. What’s even more interesting is that the rune system injects unlimited possibilities into skills! When the fireball skill is paired with the "Split Rune", a fireball can turn into a rain of fire; when the sprint skill is paired with the "Teleport Rune", you will shuttle through the battlefield like a ghost. Here, there are no fixed genres, only combinations you can’t think of. Every skill modification is a brainstorm exclusive for you! ​ 
During the development process, we also encountered many challenges. In order to make the randomness of equipment drops full of surprises while maintaining a reasonable acquisition rhythm, numerical planners repeatedly tested hundreds of versions; in order to make the combination of runes and skills rich and balanced enough, the programmer and the planning team argued fiercely for countless days and nights. But every time I see test players sharing in the group, "The divine outfit I just got is so powerful!" or "This combination of runes is amazing!", all the fatigue disappears. 
Next, we have prepared a lot of exciting content! A new map level will be opened in the future, which contains more powerful BOSS and unique legendary equipment. Of course, we will always pay attention to everyone's feedback during the development process and make "Go!" Parker" is getting better and better! ​ 
If you also miss the purity of "swiping it is the best", eager to experience the excitement of explosive costumes in the pixel world, and want to explore the infinite possibilities of skill modification, then join "Rush!" Parker"! Every adventure here is a legend written by you! ​ 
Looking forward to meeting you in the game! ​
desc-737471:
This is a new next-generation work of the classic MMORPG "Ragnarok RO", produced by Xindong Bgemao Studio, and the sequel to "Guarding Eternal Love". 【Midgard in a Dream】Farewell loading, reject the air wall! 
With super mobility, adventurers can reach every corner of Midgard - the seamlessly connected continent of Midgard is here! From Prontela to Feyan, from the underwater temple to the top of Myulani Mountain, a new immersive adventure is waiting for you to explore! [Rich and restored occupation system] There are many classic occupations such as swordsmen, magicians, servants, archers, merchants, etc. ~ Explosive stab, ice and thunder method, bird hunting bomber, riding toucan, mecha photon cannon, all restored! With the support of the new action system, adventurers will experience a richer action system and combat mechanism. Don't forget, the monsters have also been completely strengthened, Tiger King will slam dunk meteors, and Tianbo will rain candy. Adventurer, danger! [Relaxing and lovely love atmosphere] We like to chat in the chat room on the crowded street~ We like to sit on the ground and chat! 
Now we also sit on the roof and chat, chat on the boli balloon, and lie down to chat after the group is destroyed. You have to dress up beautifully and chat cutely every time~ There are many classic costumes, headwear, and hairstyles - angel hair rings, gothic skirts, and sexy bunny ears. We conquer the RO world with our cuteness! [The most loving guild] The guild is my home! 
How do cute adventurers fight against powerful gods and giants? Complete guild commissions together, work together to challenge MVP, build a guild home together, share photos with each other, and create our memories. Of course, there are also intense GVG, gorgeous metal battles, and peak showdowns to let the flag fly in Prontera! >>>None of the above is cake! The development is still in the early stages, please look forward to the community’s follow-up news! <<<“Post Ragnarok” world view: 
After Ragnarok, the World Tree died, and the gods and giants lost their homes and wandered to the human continent - Midgard. 
The gods turned into various animals, the giants mostly turned into elemental beasts, the elves and dwarfs began to try to integrate into human society, and the dragons chose to sleep at the bottom of the lake, isolated from the world. All races are adapting to changes in the new world rules and looking for new hope. 1,000 years later, all parties discovered fragments of Ymir's Heart, which contained energy comparable to divine power. As a result, various forces began to research and pursue - and a new story began, unfolding in front of the adventurers. In Feiyang, you will join hands with the lovely Seniya to light the torch of courage; in Monrok, you will get to know the heroic six-person team and understand the belief that you will stick to the last moment. And deep in the ancient ruins, you may be able to hear the call deep in the tree of heaven and earth and touch the truth of destiny. Hope you like it!

If you like it, please support us by clicking on your wish list ~ Web link
