devnote-782938:
Hello fellow soul masters! We are the production team of "Douluo Dalu: Zero". After more than 2 years of polishing, we are finally ready to meet you! There is no preset destiny here, only passion and unknown adventures waiting to be ignited. As developers, we want to present not only a game, but also an epic journey of "rising from scratch" that belongs to every soul master. "Zero" is the starting point and infinite possibilities. 
We have restored the classic scenes in the novel - the youthfulness of Shrek Academy, the danger of the Star Dou Forest, and the majesty of the Spirit Hall, but we hope you can write your own legend with your own hands. Whether you are exploring ruins in the fog, or forming a bonded lineup to challenge the peak showdown, every choice you make will affect your growth trajectory. "Zero" is pure and the ultimate fun. 
We insist on the combination of "easy exploration" and "hot-blooded strategy": smooth positioning combat with fingertips, radar exploration with surprises, soul beast hunting with sect cooperation... You can even run a leisure business in the academy, plant fairy grass, forge weapons, and enjoy a leisurely and passionate soul master career. The battle for power in the Douluo world will make the excitement of "Decisive Battle at the Spirit Hall" never end. "Zero" is the original intention and also growth together. 
During the development process, we polished the details countless times just to make your eyes shine when you enter the game. Every part of this continent carries our love for "Douluo Dalu" and our persistence in "immersion". Whether you are a lone ranger or a sect leader, there is always a battlefield for you to become a god. But we also know that there are still shortcomings. If you find bugs or creative ideas during the adventure, please feel free to leave a message. Every feedback is motivation to move forward! "May we start from scratch and eventually become a legend."
desc-179247: The story of Naughty Goose takes place in a peaceful and quiet farm. On a sunny morning, you play the role of a naughty goose. Your task is to run into human houses and cause all kinds of chaos, such as stealing the gardener's keys, hiding his tools, bathing humans with sprinklers, stealing food, etc.
desc-813133: Welcome to Kind City. This is a third-person open world shooting game with beautiful graphics and a touching story. The people here are simple and the people are outstanding. If you meet any strange guy, he may have come from "Back to School". Welcome to Kind City. This is a third-person open world shooting game with beautiful graphics and a touching story. The people here are simple and the people are outstanding. If you meet any strange guy, he may have come from "Back to School".
desc-832010:
"Building cities with joy and enlightening new voices" 
In this world where gears and auras intertwine, you are the only synaesthetic musician who can play the melody and cast the building. 
The city is not born, it is rebuilt on the wasteland by music, faith and heartbeats. Please go to the city that collapsed due to the disaster and rebuild its glory from scratch. 
The story begins from this point, and rushes non-stop to its golden age. [In charge of urban construction, free to plan the grand scenery of the jurisdiction] 
This is not a decorative display. From the porters' union to the material warehouse, from the train station to the musical instrument store, every plot of land involves real logistics and supply and demand. You need: 
- Arrange material transportation: Building materials and commodities will not go to the city by themselves. Plan transportation and storage so that the raw materials flow like blood. 
- Set up professional blocks: as a service building, the clock tower will have a beneficial effect on similar buildings in the area 
- Dealing with the relationship between people's livelihood: citizen families need bungalows and apartments, Grameen needs tents and squares - ignoring either party will trigger a chain crisis 
Your city is a precision instrument. And you are the musician who tunes it. [Manage the manor and build a solid foundation to ensure production] 
The foundation of the city-state is in the countryside. Plan the land, roads and number of workers to establish a vertical industrial chain from plantations to processing plants: 
- Sugar cane field → Sugar factory → Donuts in the kitchen → Dessert shop items 
- Rabbit nest → Wool processing factory → Rabbit fur slippers → Urban consumer goods 
- But the soil will be poor, workers will go on strike, fishing moratoriums will come from time to time, agricultural products will burst into storage, and shortages of raw materials will shut down factories. 
There is no "one-click harvest" here. Every decision affects the economic lifeline of the estate and the jurisdiction. [Explore and collect, unlock fantasy adventure notes] 
From deep paths to jagged stone pillars, some corners are only open to you with a spirit of adventure: 
- Read the diary of the residents in the ruins of Reunion Village and fulfill the promise of "no matter how long, we will wait until we meet you again" 
- Crisis lurks behind the miasmatic thorns. Defeat the foreign objects in the forest and learn about the past of the antler hunter until your backpack is full of courage and the gramophone can be repaired. 
The forest platform was once the last light for the Dispersed, and every page of the codex you unlock completes the glory before the cataclysm. [Meet famous friends, listen to past events and record anecdotes] 
Wandering around the streets, you bring back more than just landscaping props: 
- Rhythm: obtained regularly every day, and can be consumed to collect travel notes and travel points 
- Listen to your heart: Watch residents chatting for more anecdotes or intel 
The progress of Street View exploration is directly related to the unlocking of the gramophone, which determines your jurisdiction space. When you finally get the first batch of supplies arriving in the precinct to build houses, when the conveyor belt delivers the iron ore to the smelter on time, when the once wandering Gramlin becomes a journeyman with technical expertise... you will understand the true meaning of synesthesia: not magic, but the ability to accurately transform the reconstruction blueprint into reality. 
As for those secrets that the aura has kept secret or unclear, about why you chose to come here after the disaster, and about the real reason why the Glowing Land chose you—— 
The answer lies in the sound of the City of Glow's day and night movement. Listen carefully. 
Wherever you go, there will be light. And you never stop moving forward. Administrative Officer, please begin your audition.
devnote-832010:
You're not just slowly creating a world, it's more like caring for a living miniature bonsai. 
Every work in the manor is to cultivate soil and moss for it; to cast buildings with flowing music is to prune its branches and vines, so that this small world can gradually grow into the shape in your heart. 
You can plan as you like, watch the streets unfold naturally, and watch the Lilliputian-like neighbors walking freely; you can also stop at any time, touch the kittens on the roadside, chat with everyone for a while, or just sit on a bench filled with sunshine and be in a daze, looking for your own corner of peace here. 
As for the trivial matters of watering, don't bother - it rains here all the time anyway.
devnote-840944: We are an independent team focused on interactive storytelling, committed to using innovative methods to integrate Eastern culture and interactive experiences. In 2019, it was users who accompanied "The Invisible Guardian" through the BAFTA glory, which convinced us that good interactive narrative can make the story live in people's hearts. In the past few years, we have plunged into the ancient times and brewed a brand new story. "The Queen's Game: The Golden Age" not only presents the "fatal" aesthetics of oriental intrigue, but also brings a court game that tests wisdom and courage. Two works, different stories, and the same original intention. I hope that users around the world can once again feel the charm of traditional oriental culture while playing. It will become a bridge across cultures and bring a new experience to every player who supports interactive film and television works. In "The Queen's Game: The Golden Age", you will personally experience the growth of a generation of empresses. The Mei Niang chapter of "The Queen's Game: The Golden Age" focuses on the starting point of her legend - watching how she grew from an unknown girl to a crisis-ridden palace, and survived the dangerous confrontation of power with her wisdom and courage. In the Empress Chapter, you will face a more cruel court game as a chess player. Make strategic plans, check and balance the ministers, create a prosperous era in the turbulent times, and write your own prosperous world with your own hands! (Original authorization from Chengguang & thanks to Chengguang Music for its support)
desc-840944:
Have you ever dreamed of truly controlling the destiny of a dynasty? 
This time, you are no longer a bystander, but the protagonist, entering this real-life interactive palace survival film and television work! The new chapter of the globally acclaimed hit "The Queen's Game: The Golden Age" - the Empress Chapter will be released soon! 
This time, you will break free from the shackles of fate, step through the thorns and intrigues, and step onto the dragon chair that symbolizes supremacy. Facing the turbulent court, the secrets of the harem intertwined with taboos, and the emotional game of life and death... How will you write your prosperous world? Everything is decided by you! ● Inheriting the good results of "Mei Niang Chapter" and continuing the palace legend 
The Mei Niang chapter of "The Queen's Game: The Golden Age" has won the love of the majority of users. 
Now, "The Empress Chapter" has officially opened its Steam page. Add it to your wish list immediately. You are invited to lock in this thrilling court game in advance and look forward to the legend of the Eastern Empress reaching a new peak! ● 4K movie-level texture, reshaping the oriental palace aesthetics 
The whole process is performed by real people and built on real scenes, using the light and shadow scheduling of 4K movies to recreate the majestic atmosphere of the Oriental Palace with ingenuity. From the delicate textures of Chinese brocade and gold hairpins to the shocking Chinese-style soundtrack, the ultimate oriental classical aesthetics is demonstrated in all aspects. It is starred by famous actors such as Guan Hong, Huang Yi, Yao Chi, and Lin Xiaozhai. With a more realistic and thrilling experience, more magnificent scenes, and more delicate character portrayals, the prosperous era not only exists on the screen, but actually unfolds before your eyes. You will personally experience the feast of oriental aesthetics that "rules the world"! ● From the nuns of Ganye Temple to the legendary empress, you can write your script! 
Fed up with being held hostage by your fate? In this game, you will experience the most thrilling palace intrigue game! From being a nun in a temple with a sense of gratitude, to breaking through the constraints of many forces, and finally reaching the pinnacle of power. Feel the emperor's wisdom in strategizing and balancing the government and the opposition. This road to becoming emperor, which can change your fate and change your destiny, is yours to step on! ● Approximately 1,000 minutes of real-person interpretation content, immersing yourself in the life of an emperor 
Approximately 1,000 minutes of carefully shot real-life chapters lay out a magnificent picture of the prosperous times for you. Faced with the turbulent situation in the court, every move and every line of dialogue you make will trigger a chain reaction that affects the whole body. High-octane twists and turns, lots of suspense... Take control of the world in Bu Bu Jing's heart, and rewrite the fate of the dynasty with your own hands! 
Help rank the characters you have a soft spot for or who you love to hate. It's all under your control who will top the global popularity list. ● Say goodbye to watching and truly experience “I am the world” 
Abandon boring click-to-click dialogues, and the in-depth interactive gameplay has been fully upgraded! Power is no longer just a line of dialogue, but a practical game of governance at your fingertips: 
[Reviewing Memorials]: With a tap of your fingertips, you can review a mountain of memorials. Balancing aristocratic families, with one final stroke, is the image of the country. 
【Imperial Decree】: Weigh the pros and cons and decide the pattern of the government and the opposition. Is it to implement strict laws or to show kindness to a benevolent king? Demonstrate the power of the emperor amidst constraints and realize the grand plan of Haiyan Heqing! ● What type of emperor are you? Exclusive personality test report upgrade 
At the end of the story, you will also get an upgraded version of the exclusive emperor test report! An in-depth analysis of your Machiavellian style, crisis decision-making and management methods. Is it the "Desperate Crane Crown Red" who has both power and emotion, the all-round and exquisite "Desperate Crane Crown Red", the "Feng Yue Mandala" who is passionate about sex and goes through fire and water, or the ruthless "Juan Wang Jieshou Qing" who is determined to win the throne? At the end of the story, see your truest self and share your exclusive Empress illustrated book with the world!
desc-830301:
Thousands of people in aerial combat, demons duel, Shengqu and NCsoft jointly create the first "Aion" official mobile game. Let us set foot on the vast continent of Atrea together, experience the thousand-year fateful dispute between the heavenly clan and the demon clan, and write your own immortal epic and glory in the boundless magical world. 
A new classic, an epic beginning! The original IP is restored with originality, the vast world is panoramically presented, the guardian star, the bow star, the magic star... eight major professions are gathered together! Choose freely from a variety of professions and control the battle situation in the battle between the demonic camps. 
Thousands of people fight together, and the situation changes! Feel the ultimate duel between the heavenly clan and the demon clan. Every charge you make may rewrite the fate of Atrea. [Change the world again, Aion mobile game] 
Jointly created by Shengqu Games and NCsoft, the classic is renewed and the epic begins! The genuine IP is restored with great ingenuity and the vast world is presented in a panoramic manner, continuing the century-spanning legend of Atrea for you. 
[Eight classic professions, start the passionate battle immediately] 
Guardian star, bow star, magic star... eight major professions gathered together! Choose freely from a variety of professions, control the battle situation in the battle between the demon camps, and show your true qualities as a strong player. 
[Thousands of people are fighting on the same screen, a fateful showdown between gods and demons] 
Thousands of people fight together, and the situation changes! Large-scale team battles are smooth and stable, and you can feel the ultimate duel between the heavenly clan and the demon clan. Every charge you make may rewrite the fate of Atrea. 
[Free three-dimensional air combat, dominate the entire sky] 
Ling Yun fights and breaks through the limits! Fly freely in the vast airspace, break through with precise tactics, and dominate the situation with absolute power. 
[Classic dungeon restored, team passionately pioneering wasteland] 
Return to the secret realm and go to eternity together! Rich adventure scenes and multiple challenges, the BOSS mechanism is original, teamwork and strategies are full, and you can regain the glory of the mainland with your comrades.
devnote-830301:
Hi, I'm Journey, the producer of the "Aion" mobile game. 
As I type these words, my heart is full of anxiety and anticipation - I am finally here to officially say to all the players and friends who are still waiting and wondering "when will Aion be released as a mobile game": We are here! 
The "Tower of Aion" mobile game is an official mobile game officially authorized by NCsoft and jointly developed with our Shengqu Games. From the first day the project was launched, the team set a goal: to remake a classic. We want to bring the classic that is engraved in the youth of players to the mobile phone intact. 
What we want to do is never a simple transplant, but a youthful reunion. The thousand-year confrontation between the two worlds of heaven and demons, the most familiar feel of the eight major professions, the free and smooth flight across the sky, the burning flames of the fortress above the abyss, the blood and blood of fighting for the race and brothers every time... We want to restore these memories engraved in the players' bones bit by bit on the mobile terminal. Let every guardian, whenever he takes out his mobile phone, instantly step back into that familiar and exciting world. 
If you ask me, why do I have to make the mobile game "Aion"? 
In fact, the answer has always been with you. 
We went through every memory in the community and read every question and wait in the comment area. Those debates about Elysium and the Demon-Conquering Palace; those shadows of wings passing over the abyss; those days and nights fighting side by side for the race and comrades; and those crying, laughing, passionate moments... We know better than anyone else that "Aion" has never been just a game. It is our common youth and the irreplaceable Atrea in the hearts of countless people. 
This years-long wait is too heavy and too precious. In order to live up to this persistence, the team worked hard to polish the product. We are both excited and apprehensive at the same time - we are excited because we are getting closer and closer to our reunion; we are apprehensive because can we be worthy of everyone's persistence for so many years? 
The answer may lie in the public beta period in the future, but during the development process of the "Aion: Classic" mobile game, we have always been firm on two things and never wavered: 
First, stick to the original flavor. Confrontation between demons, eight major professions, free air combat, abyss fortress battle, classic dungeons... All of your core memories of the game will not be missing; 
Second, do a good job in mobile adaptation. Every operation feel has been re-polished for mobile phone touch screens, making skill release smoother and the sense of strategy purer. 
Now, the game is gearing up for its upcoming beta. Whether you are an "eternal veteran" who has fought bloody battles in the abyss, or a new guardian who is about to step into Atrea for the first time, we would like to solemnly extend an invitation to you: 
Please let us fight to change the world again! 
We always believe that you are the true masters of Atrea. In the subsequent tests, we look forward to the return of every guardian. We will carefully listen to every piece of feedback, every suggestion, and every complaint you have and modify it carefully. Let us work together to make our world a better place. 
Protect eternity with holy light, and rewrite destiny with darkness. 
Atrea, waiting for your return.
devnote-839915: We like and love pixel games and zombie pop culture. We hope to make a different zombie shooting search and rescue game. We hope everyone will like it~
desc-839915:
"Death Plunder" is a game that combines doomsday survival and construction, 2D shooting, search, attack and retreat. You will play the role of an ordinary person who takes desperate risks for wealth and survival opportunities. You will go deep into the isolated zombie island town, search for various high-value trophies and supplies, rescue various NPC characters, and unlock new features of the camp. 
In the game you can: 
Customize your character: 
Choose your character background, choose your talents, allocate attribute points, and build your character's advantages. Whether you are a sharpshooter, a strongman, or a sneak attacker as fast as the wind, everything is up to you. Arm your character with: 
Rich equipment system, each piece of equipment has visual changes and has different protective effects on parts. Please protect yourself to welcome the deadly attacks of zombies. Modify your weapons: 
With a variety of basic firearms and melee weapons, you can modify and maintain your weapons. Excellent predators should always maintain their weapons. Various types of zombies: 
From ordinary zombies to specially dressed zombies to mutants, different zombies have different abilities. Some are numerous, some are as fast as the wind, some are as solid as a rock, and some are extremely deadly. Explore dangerous restricted areas: 
Houses, apartments, police stations, supermarkets, different scenes will have different material distribution, and contain some secrets. Plan your action route according to your needs and evacuate safely. Run your base: 
Collect materials to expand and upgrade your camp, build workbench, planting box, hunting ground, water purifier and other facilities to obtain survival necessities. Make various tools to help you survive on this dangerous island. Changeable weather: 
Full Moon & Rainy Night: Because the moonlight of the full moon is relatively bright and the vision is relatively clear, it is a normal weather. Occasionally it will rain or rainstorm. 
Lunar eclipse: Because the moonlight is blocked, the entire area is shrouded in darkness. If you don't rely on lights, you will not be able to see anything. You don't know what dangers are hidden in the night! 
Blood Moon & Blood Rain: The blood-red full moon dyes the whole world a hellish color, and sometimes it rains blood. Under the influence of the blood moon, all zombies will become more bloodthirsty, move faster, and do more damage. Be careful, it is very dangerous to go out during the blood moon!
desc-792661:
"King's Fleet" strategic naval battle innovates the core gameplay of "strategy + 5V5 naval battle", unlocking the multi-dimensional gaming fun of fleet formation, key points contention, and tactical formulation! By including hundreds of well-known historical warships, you can unlock differentiated combat power. The unfettered free development system makes every naval battle full of freshness and exclusiveness, and immersively restores the charm of bloody naval battles! [The fierce fighting does not stop, the welfare does not stop] 
The game has opened famous warships from the United States, Britain, Germany, France, etc., and ships of other series will also be launched one after another. World battles and many welfare activities continue to increase. Legendary warships will be given as soon as you log in. The powerful functions and rich content are continuously updated, with top quality and super high playability, allowing you to immersively enjoy the carnival of naval battles! [Legendary ships, assembled and on standby] 
Hundreds of warships around the world have been fully realistically restored, and all five major ship types including battleships, destroyers, cruisers, aircraft carriers, and submarines are on display. Hard-core combat power combined with swarm charges creates an indestructible maritime army! [Peak showdown, ship finger glory] 
World battles allow captains to work together with teammates to dominate the world in addition to exciting naval battles. They can use strategies and map layout to predict the enemy's actions and achieve the goal of defeating the enemy. [Fast-paced, 5V5 naval battle] 
Guided weapons, thunderous assault, anti-ship armor, hard-core enemy defense, and automatic close-in firepower! The ultimate game of offense and counterattack, with all cutting-edge equipment available. Fast-paced modern naval battles with full firepower, victory or defeat is decided in milliseconds, immersive and endless sense of unlocking the ocean hegemony
devnote-792661:
Hello to all captains who love military martial arts and card strategy! 
As a group of developers deeply involved in military culture, we have always believed that excellent war-themed games should not only respect history, but also create fun. This is the original intention of the birth of "King's Fleet" - to allow every player to not only touch the historical temperature of the battleship, but also feel the thrill of strategizing in card battles. 
During the development process, we reviewed a large amount of historical materials and ship design drawings, and used digital modeling to restore the soul of each classic warship: from the control of the proportions of the hull line, to the historical study of the deck painting, to the reproduction of the details of the gun barrel caliber and shipboard equipment, we strive to make the cards at the player's fingertips a precise model carrying historical memories. We know that the ultimate pursuit of details is the starting point of immersion. 
In terms of gameplay, we break the numerical constraints of traditional cards and integrate naval battle strategies into the core of card construction: camp bonds echo historical battlefield alliances, and skill linkage restores the tactical coordination of ship types. There is no shackles of "only rare cards come first" here, only infinite possibilities for tactical combinations. Blue and purple cards can also counterattack the battlefield with unique mechanisms. 
We hope that "King's Fleet" is not only a game, but also a bridge connecting military enthusiasts. When you build a fleet, you can think of the legendary ships that rewrote the history of naval battles; when you plan a battle, you can feel the commander's pride in winning a thousand-mile victory. 
Now, the fleet is ready to go, and we sincerely invite you to join this maritime showdown across time and space, control the warship with strategy, and write a new legend with love!
desc-842221:
"Abyss Adventure Group" is a cute and dark auto-chess roguelike adventure game. 
You will lead a group of contrasting cute ghost characters such as the ghost bride, the little witch, and the mad doctor to form an adventure group and go deep into the strange abyss and lonely forest. Unique auto-chess battle: chessboard-style automatic battle, the cute ghosts will charge into battle on their own, and strategic matching determines the outcome. 
Dark-style treasure farming system: Massive random equipment drops, like "Diablo", crazy equipment and affix equipment to create the ultimate build 
Rich character development: Each ghost has unique talents, skill trees and exclusive equipment, which can be freely mixed and matched to form the strongest team. 
Diverse home construction: blacksmith shop, research institute, tavern, commission board... gradually build your own abyss stronghold in the dark 
High degree of freedom roguelike: Each exploration is a new map and challenge. After death, you can inherit part of the strength to continue the challenge. It looks bloody and cute, but the gameplay is extremely over the top. 
In the abyss, you not only have to enjoy the ultimate pleasure of brushing up divine equipment, but also carefully match your auto-chess lineup to become the strongest adventure group step by step! 
Make a reservation now to get the "Abyss First Arrival Gift Pack" + a limited ghost avatar frame!
devnote-842221:
Hello everyone, we are the production team of Abyss Adventure Group. 
We have combined the cutest ghosts and the most hardcore dark treasure hunt together. 
On one side is the Ghost Bride shyly holding a rose, on the other side she is tearing the enemy to pieces on the Auto Chess battlefield; 
On one side is the little witch waving her broom cutely, on the other side is she brushing out a legendary weapon with three affixes... 
What we want to do is the kind of game that looks a little scary but is also cute and perverted when played. 
The strategic combination of auto chess + the thrill of collecting treasures like Diablo! 
Hope you find some fun with double tops here. 
The abyss is ready... 
Your ghost adventure group still lacks a leader who can form a team. 
Come on, let’s go down to the abyss and blast the divine outfit together!
desc-770529:
Steam's official transplanted mobile game "Song of the Eternal Tree: Creation" will be officially launched in the Q2 quarter of 26th! As time passes, many of Aleria's worlds have faded away. And the eternal tree, which carries all worlds with its countless branches, is now just a seedling, and its glory has faded from human memory. No one else knows the secret of making it grow - but you. You can distinguish the joyful song of the sun passing through the sky, and hear the words of the heavy rain sweeping over the earth. You are the last Eternal Warlock, and you have a mission passed down from generation to generation - let the Eternal Tree flourish and protect it from danger! 【Game Features】 
Explore a vibrant, one-of-a-kind world...at your own pace and pace 
Visit mysterious locations and discover incredible flora and fauna, all driven purely by exploration instinct and game mechanics. How do you want to pass the time? Whether you go fishing and picking flowers, catching insects and stones, or exploring caves and solving puzzles...it's all up to you! 【Cultivate your own world】 
Practice the art of creation, make world seeds, and create a new world with different characteristics. Take good care of the worlds you create, watch them transform and witness the birth of new properties! You can generate unique worlds of grasslands, deserts, glaciers, and... well, actually... Creation is not an exact science after all, and some seeds may contain unexpected surprises. [Meet new people and create a community] 
Meet a variety of interesting characters in the game, listen to their stories, and lend a helping hand when they need it. There are many ways to bring happiness to people, such as finding them a place to live, helping them find their ideal job, or giving away various accessories and furniture. 【Building the town of your dreams】 
"Growing Story: Song of the Eternal Tree" has designed a variety of cute buildings and facilities for players to choose from. Place your personalized building however you like and create the feeling of home! [Beautiful original sound] 
The soundtrack of this game is composed by the famous game and animation composer Kevin Penkin, which is extraordinary. 【Discover the unsolved mysteries】 
There are various ruins, caves, and secret places everywhere in the world... Explore the mystery at the heart of the Eternal Tree and recover the long-lost old knowledge.
desc-830533: What should I do if I travel to a decadent dynasty? Inherit the ancestral home, cultivate a child prodigy with full level buffs, overthrow the rule or establish yourself as king, it's all up to you! You can join politics and dominate the government; you can do business and become rich and powerful; you can cultivate immortality and seek immortality; you can freely choose from various life paths. Not only can you raise cubs, you can also open a teahouse, build a theater, form an army, revive your family, and become famous all over the world!
devnote-830533: Easily raise babies in the cloud, become parents without pain, and participate in major decisions in life. The prime minister wants to accept him as his son-in-law, the general regards him as his son, and the national master wants to use him to make elixirs... Whose banquet will you let him attend tonight?
desc-759959:
[Wizard's Road] is a dark tower defense treasure hunting game. After the disaster where the stars and seas meet, magical energy emerges, and the dead bodies that were eaten by vultures on the ground slowly stand up. The person who gave birth to these dead corpses is called a "necromancer". The "Wizards Association" discovered that there is an abyss of ancient gods under the ground that swallows civilization. As a blessed "survivor" during the abyss adventure, you have a chance to understand the power of the star sea and advance to become a "Necromancer" who summons the dead, a "Grand Wizard" who controls the elements, a "Demon Hunter" who integrates magic into weapons, and other branches. You need to build a magic defense line in the cracks of the abyss, and construct different BDs through [Skills] + [Gems] + [Equipment] to resist monster attacks. Each layer of the abyss presents a different environment, and the corresponding monsters have environmental resistance. You need to adjust your skills and strategies at any time. Over-reliance on a single attribute will trigger the evolution of the monsters in the corresponding layer, causing unimaginable disasters. 【Xinghai System】 
The six star sea nodes are divided into basic attributes (strength/agility/intelligence), small star sea, core star sea, auxiliary star sea, cornerstone star sea, and specialized star sea. 
The talent star sea is a giant talent tree. Players can freely explore the entire star sea system from the starting point and build their own style. 【Free to create】 
Thousands of outfits, never the same shirt 
Equipment is all dropped, and each piece of equipment has a special entry. After unlocking the entry library, you can build it into any equipment according to your own preferences. You can create your own exclusive equipment with thousands of outfits. 
Gem inlay, element linkage 
Each piece of equipment can be equipped with different gems, and the combination of each gem will form a different BD effect, which is ever-changing [Gem System] 
Gemstones are divided into four categories: red, yellow, blue, and green. Each gem has different effects, and there will be linkage between gems. 
For example, rubies: attacks have a burning effect + topaz: attacks trigger immobilization effects = trigger "Lava Confinement" dual effects of burning + immobilization. 
For example, emerald: summon undead skeleton +1 + ruby: cause area damage after summoned unit dies = trigger "undead army" summoning + corpse explosion double effect [environmental change] 
Each layer of the Abyss of the Ancient God presents a different environment (such as: lava/ice cave/poison swamp/thorns/void). Each environment will have different environmental effects. The wizard needs to choose a restrained style according to the environment to make the game more strategic.
desc-240310:
"New Star Football World" is a football world exclusive to you, where you can create your own, unique club! From business management to player training; from tactical arrangements to signing bonuses, everything is up to you. ☀You are the Chairman of the Board! 
Whether it's how to make money and spend money, or how the club will develop in the future, you have to figure it out. It's like running a football club. How to build a training base, who to buy and sell players, there are many ways to do it, and every decision affects the fate of the club. ☀ Explore new stars to raise calves! 
You can mold players into the shape you want, just like making clay figures. Design a super cool character for him, plus unique skills, and even the hairstyle and appearance can be customized according to your ideas. Tap their potential, turn it into strength bit by bit, and become a shining star! ☀Tactical management and strategizing! 
You are the ultimate championship coach and the brains of the team. You have thousands of tactical ideas and arrange the players clearly. Interception, movement, diving, fouls, penalties, red cards, everything is possible. Use tactical thinking to win everything! ☀Rich competition content! 
League, Champions League, FA Cup, every competition is a new adventure. The league is like a long marathon, you have to stay in shape; the cup is like passing through levels, each level has new challenges; the championship is the battle of the kings! You have to lead the team to make decisions back and forth in these games, and you can't stop when you encounter all kinds of opponents! ☀This is your club! 
You are the club president, team coach, youth training director, chief scout, or even the team's business manager and massage therapist. You have the final say on what the club is called, what the team logo looks like, how the home court is designed, and even the team culture. Let it shine with incomparable charm and carry all your football dreams and passions.
devnote-240310:
I am very excited to announce the long-awaited news to you: 
"New Star Football World" has successfully obtained a version number! Thank you all for your continued patience and support. 
Currently, we are working hard to make final preparations for the official launch. It is planned that the game will be available to everyone in the second quarter of 2026. 
During this period of time, we will focus on optimization and repairs based on the issues and suggestions reported by everyone during the previous testing period. At the same time, we will further improve the game content and experience, and strive to present you with a more complete, stable, and more anticipated version when we meet. 
-------------------------------------------------------- 
As a game developer who loves football, I always want to do something for football. "New Star Football World" is a project we are developing. If you want to run a club of your own, but most of the products on the market sell star drawing cards, we will make the simulation management more pure. Stars are cultivated by the players themselves. Then form your own team to compete with other players in League Cup and other competitions. desc-757799:
Synthesize magical food and build a starry sky treehouse! 
"Cat and Soup: Magic and Food" healing synthesis mobile game! Simply drag and drop to synthesize radish, honey and other ingredients, unlock 300+ magic recipes, and earn stars to upgrade the starry sky tree house! Every time the tree house is upgraded, you can summon new cats and unlock gorgeous decorations - starry sky hammock, aurora wallpaper, magic crystal lamp...Create a cat paradise as you like! There are also 50+ cute cats waiting for you to feed, change their clothes, pet them and listen to their purring to heal them all day long~ Light up the tree house with stars and witness the transformation of the dilapidated wooden house into a dreamy starry sky tower. Core gameplay: synthesis × construction × cat raising, triple happiness!

Simply drag and drop to combine basic ingredients such as radish and cabbage to unlock 300+ recipes and cook fantasy dishes such as "Starlight Cake" and "Rainbow Soup"! The higher the treehouse level, the more cats you can summon! Create your own cat world in the dreamy starry sky treehouse!

200+ decorations to freely match! Decorate the treehouse with magic carpets, floating potted plants, and cat costumes to make every kitten unique. Healing Interaction: rua cat party paradise!

devnote-757799:
Dear gamer friends: 
I am the producer of "Cat and Soup·Magic and Food". Our team is a group of people who are surrounded by cats every day. They are also game craftsmen who use code to deliver warmth. The original intention of creating this game stems from our dual love for food and cats. In reality, we may be novices in cooking, but in the game world, we want to build a healing haven under the stars for everyone - there is no real pressure here, only bubbling soup pots, bouncing cats, and magical fairy tales under the stars at your fingertips. 
In the game, you can unlock 300+ magic recipes by dragging synthetic ingredients, and use stars to upgrade the tree house. From the dilapidated wooden house to the Aurora Dome, every step is full of surprises. Interacting with 50+ cute cats is the core fun: putting a wizard hat on a ragdoll cat, repairing kitchen equipment with a mechanical cat, or listening to Grandma Yang reading to you on a rainy day. There are healing Easter eggs hidden in every frame. 
In the future, we plan to launch Chinese-style theme updates: Chinese pastoral cats, blue and white porcelain soup pots, and solar term limited recipes (such as Dragon Boat Festival rice dumpling soup) will be launched one after another. At the same time, the social gameplay is optimized to allow more friends to experience the healing starry sky fairy tale together. 
May this magic kitchen under the stars become your haven when you are tired. We look forward to working with you to light up the light in your heart with food and cats.

devnote-737243:
"Let every corner hide the malice of the developer, let every boss have the experience of fighting to the death, and let every save point hold the excitement of first seeing it." 
These are my daily nagging thoughts - 
＼＼\\٩( 'ω' )و //／／ 
Hello everyone~ I am Chiba, the game producer of "Fuya's Soul". I am a post-95 generation working in the game industry. I am also an avid fan of the Dark Souls series and Elden's Ring~ 
Today, I am taking the opportunity of making an appointment to share my creative ideas about "Fuya's Soul"~ [Talk about Fuya's Soul] 
I have always believed that the essence of an open world game should be [exploration]. If it is an open world game, but the fun does not come from exploration, then it should not be considered qualified. 
In order to achieve this goal, I focused all development resources on the open world exploration experience with limited costs, such as carefully designed open maps + box garden maps, various bosses that fit the map art, various unique weapons hidden in hidden corners, and a large number of NPCs with full dubbing and high-quality vertical rendering... 
Of course, the most important point is that I invested most of the game's resources in the open world, so that players can continue to become stronger while immersed in exploration. [Difficult project decision] 
In fact, the idea for the project of "Fuya's Soul" actually came up as early as 23 years ago. 
At that time, I felt that there had never been an open-world mobile game on the market that focused on souls and exploration experience, so I prepared a development plan with my development partners very early. However, due to insufficient game development experience and a serious lack of funds, I quickly recognized the reality and could not shelve this plan forever. 【Decided to start work】 
In early 2024, thanks to the first pot of gold I earned from developing various small games in a year, as well as the accumulated experience in game development, I began to be unable to hold on any longer. Yes, even though there were still many practical obstacles, I still made up my mind to start trying. "Fuya's Soul" was officially started at this time~! 
Thanks to the previous accumulation, the construction started smoothly this time, and the combat system and so on began to gradually improve. 
But after a period of game production, I began to have higher and higher requirements for "Fuya's Soul". For example, the number of monsters was not enough, the types of weapons were not enough, the map design was not reasonable enough, and there was basically no balance, etc.; various reasons led to repeated delays in the development of the game. 【Reservation starts】 
So after late 2024, in order to be able to provide a trial demo version during the Chinese New Year, I started a work mode of taking half a day off every week, determined to work until this version was released. 
Finally, the demo version appeared as scheduled. Although it is still far from my ideal "Soul of Fuya", it can at least be announced that it has entered the optimization stage (crazy polishing of details. 
And now at least I have successfully made a taptap reservation as I wished, which is quite gratifying. 
Come on, work hard, fight! 【Final Conclusion】 
As a developer, everyone’s recognition is our biggest motivation for development (✧∇✧)~ 
Every time I think about every detail that we have put so much effort into during the development process, it is such a blessing to be discovered by everyone inadvertently... 
In short, I sincerely hope that everyone can find the touch and joy of playing the game in "Fuya's Soul"!
desc-739110:
In this lively and wonderful universe, you have to rely on your wit, confident expression, coquettish moves, and hard work to survive. Cut down trees, plant fields, mingle with the cute and weird Waixing people, build exaggerated and weird equipment, and finally stand up and challenge the big guys who have been oppressing us. As the saying goes, when you are thrown into poverty and lie flat, you decide to quit your job angrily, return to your second home planet Warnop, have wine and talk with your Homies, and return to the pastoral life. However, there are many dangers along the way. Your car was hit (again?) by a mysterious explosion before it could stop, Pia! With a loud sound, he fell facedown into the wilderness, and a new adventure began...Building an aircraft carrier of friendship 
The planet Warnop is inhabited by colorful residents, and hidden under their crooked appearance is endless wisdom and strange technology. As long as you have a pair of eyes that strive to discover beauty, a compassionate heart, and the mental preparation to be like a cow or a horse, you can build an aircraft carrier of friendship with them and explore the starry sea of ​​Wonopu together. Renovate your warm dream new home 
After a long day, you need a cozy little nest to recuperate and relax, and there are thousands of properties on the planet Warnop waiting for you. Prime location, quiet in the bustle, enjoy the life of opening the curtains every morning, cosmic radiation shining on your body like a close-fitting cotton jacket, and the air filled with the aroma of meteorites. The colorful flowers are also exuding the fragrance of gunpowder, and the amiable NPCs can't wait to guide you to retrieve their lost treasures (po), treasure (tong) and strange (lan) (tie) in the dragon's pond and tiger's den.

desc-791973:
In ancient times, there was no way to become an immortal. In response to the petitions of thousands of sentient beings, the powerful man forged a sword with his own body. 
Since then, thousands of monks have developed countless sword techniques based on divine weapons, slaying dragons and demons, and becoming the world's master in swordsmanship. 
Among them, the best ones cultivate their swords with their spiritual thoughts and temper their weapons with the charm of the Tao. As time goes by, the divine weapons generate their own spiritual intelligence and transform into thousands of sword spirits. They coexist with people and jointly control the world of swordsmanship. 
However, due to different ideas, the monks established their own sects. 
After hundreds of thousands of years of development, Zixiao Jianque, Daozong, and Chengtian Pavilion are at the top, followed by the Yuhai Alliance, a casual cultivator alliance, and the Xuansha Sect, where evil cultivators gather, cannot be underestimated. 
A martial arts swordsman accidentally steps into the Zixiao Sword Palace, becomes acquainted with immortals, makes Taoist friends, sharpens his practice, and asks about the path to immortality... This is an oriental fairy tale adventure game, following the path of mortals to attain enlightenment, freely exploring the vast world, and forging magical weapons with the Taoist heart. Among them, strategic duels, intertwined adventures, and the companionship of swords and spirits... invite you to step into a world of immortals where mortals are on the road to immortality. Starting from a mortal body, you will search for paths, refine weapons, set up formations, and form spirits in the world, and finally become a generation of immortals! [Mortal body asked, overcoming the tribulation and breaking through the realm]

◆There are all kinds of Taoism, there are thousands of techniques in the vast world, spiritual roots and five elements are in conflict with each other. It is up to the Taoist friends to decide whether to follow the will of God or go against fate. [Wandering around the world, searching for everything] 
◆The sky and the earth are boundless, the fairy mountains in the sea of clouds, the secret realm of hidden dragons, the deep caves...many scenes create various scenes, hiding the mysteries of the world. Fellow Taoists, please explore freely with your heart. 
◆Thousands of adventures and rich branch lines build up the wonders of the fairy world. Regardless of bizarre anecdotes or opportunities on the path to fairyland, the destined people are waiting for their Taoist friends to meet by chance. [Burn the furnace to forge the front and forge the magic weapon] 
◆Forging a sword in a furnace, from mining for materials to quenching and sharpening, the sword body, hilt, sword grid, inscriptions, and sword tassels complement each other, creating a unique magic weapon with ingenuity. 
◆Condensing spirit and shaping charm, refining and upgrading bring special attributes and entries, which are suitable for the role positioning to deal with all things in the fairy world. The three-foot green blade can cut through the world and defeat all laws. [Adventures on the Immortal Journey, Thousand Chapters of Plot] 
◆The ups and downs of the main plot, mortals' search for the path intertwined with sect disputes, the plot progresses layer by layer, giving insight into the game pattern of multiple forces. 
◆Various branch lines, including fairy secrets, mortal fireworks, and monster anecdotes, allowing you to experience the love, hate, and hatred in the world of fairy tales. [Xuanzhen sets up chess, and all positions complement each other] 
◆Qimen array, strategic duel, classic war chess integrates thousands of immortal world skills, formations, counterattacks, five elements, elixirs, talismans and many other battlefield elements, and one step at a time can reverse the situation and determine the outcome. 
◆All roles complement each other, the sword penetrates the green dark world and destroys dryness and decay, sacrifices one's body to resist the enemy's counterattack, and the dripping water turns into ice to add power to the wings. Each role is positioned to perform their own duties, and the joint efforts are invincible to defend against the enemy. [Sword Soul Channeling, Soul Sword Unity] 
◆The spirit is connected, and the unique sword spirit is condensed with hard work. Listen carefully to the whispers of the divine soldiers and feel the wonder of the spirit being connected. 
◆Spirit companions side by side, the sword spirit and the sword master have the same mind to fight against powerful enemies and overcome all difficulties together.
devnote-791973: To all fellow Taoists: How lucky we are to meet each other on the road to immortality. This game was born out of our sincere love for the world of cultivating immortals. We have always longed for the world where adventures and opportunities are hidden, and we also want to restore the most authentic appearance of ordinary people cultivating immortals - the hardships of making progress step by step, the surprises of the dark and bright flowers, and the persistence of starting from a humble beginning and moving forward towards the great road. We hope that we can use this as a boat to carry every Taoist friend on a journey of cultivating immortality with warmth, surprises and hardships. We are a small team, limited by financial resources, material resources and production conditions, so the game still has many imperfections. There is still a long way to go in terms of content thickness, gameplay polishing, detail optimization, and operating experience. Here, we apologize to all fellow Taoists with the most sincere heart, and we also ask for your tolerance and guidance. The road to immortality is long, and it is difficult to go far alone, but only by walking together can we get far. We always firmly believe that a truly touching immortal cultivation game is never the work of one person or one room, but a world that works together with thousands of fellow Taoists to build a world together. In the days to come, we will listen carefully to every voice from the community, value every suggestion and feedback, walk side by side with everyone, and move forward steadily on this magical path that is exclusive to us.
devnote-739697:
Hello, all eager would-be hunters! 
We are the development team of "Time Hunter: Awakening", and we would like to pay tribute to all the brave men with adventurous hearts! At the same time, we sincerely disclose for the first time our journey in developing this game. 
"Time Hunter: Awakening" is the orthodox sequel to the "Time Hunter" IP, focusing on replicating classics and upgrading the experience. While we are proud of the previous game, we also feel a lot of pressure. It is a benchmark for original mobile games in China, and it is also what we strive to surpass. 
With respect for the previous game and the fans and players who love "Time Hunter", the first thing we did in the early stages of development was to think about the pain points that players were most concerned about. 
The reason why the first thing is to think about the players' pain points, rather than thinking about how to play, is because players have a deep understanding of "Time Hunter". We must thoroughly understand that people like it because it is good; people feel unsatisfactory because it is not good enough. This is not a problem that can be solved by upgrading the graphics or optimizing the gameplay behind closed doors. 
We surveyed many players through online chats, phone calls, and offline conversations, and compiled a research report worth tens of thousands of words. We discussed and argued repeatedly, and finally focused our attention on two words - classic and experience. Before "Time Hunter: Awakening", "Time Hunter" also had other sequels. After our review, in fact, the sequels did not solve the two pain points that players are most concerned about. 
Either the experience is not adequate and it still cannot be played smoothly and happily, or it is too unrestrained and does not restore the classics, which is "not the inner taste". 
Therefore, during the entire development process of "Time Hunter: Awakening", we adhere to disciplines - fully restore the classics and fully optimize the experience. 
To put it bluntly, players want to go on adventures on the familiar continent of Adala with the classic Uncle Wolf, Dragon Spirit, and Ice Soul, crush the arrogant Bill, smash Lilith’s skeleton mount, and overthrow Anubis who enslaves the miners! 
Players want no lag, no lag, no disconnection, no damage, real impact, sharp and smooth movements, and timely response to operations! 
Players most want to restore the classics and optimize the experience, so we will go all out to do this. 
We will do whatever the players want, this is the principle, and it is also the service attitude that game developers and operators should have! 
With this attitude, we have made a trial version of "Time Hunter Awakening", which is not only about "restoring the classics" and "optimizing the experience", but also doing more work. The space here is limited and it is difficult to fully explain the details of the game "Time Hunter Awakening" in a few words. In the next period of time, we will continue to release new news and explain the contents of the development version to everyone one by one. 
At the same time, we will also prepare many activities and benefits. In the process of looking forward to the open test, we will interact with everyone frequently and give back to our new and old friends who support us to express our sincerity and respect. Please pay attention and make an appointment, you will definitely not lose money! 
In addition, the development team has set up a special rapid response team to collect everyone's opinions and suggestions. Whether it is support or criticism, we will carefully record it, digest it carefully, integrate everyone's expectations into the subsequent development plan, and respond in a timely manner. 
Everyone is welcome to leave us messages and we’ll take your advice! 
The achievements of the past represent that the peak is in the past and far away. I hope that from now on, we will embark on the road of adventure together to conquer higher mountains, travel further through time and space, and write more passionate stories. 
Youth is still there, and passion will never die. I look forward to pursuing love with you!
desc-739697:

Looking forward to the adventure of "Time Hunter: Awakening" to resume, and running towards love with you! Game features:

Tyr Forest, Alcatraz Island, Sky Fortress, Desert Maze... all familiar maps are back, challenge the powerful nightmare enemies such as Lord of Light Bill, Lilith, Serena, etc., and save the world from them! 〓Experience upgrade, cool pictures〓

The newly designed skill tree system restores the hunter's signature skills, with richer skill routes, a more solid strike feel, and more elegant combos to awaken your fighting genes! 〓Challenge the group version and get the best set〓

More competitive gameplay and events, passionate clashes between powerful teams, and dark horses rushing to break through! 
Comprehensively optimize the cross-server mechanism, severely crack down on cheating, and flexibly adjust event progress and benefits. You no longer have to worry about a slow start and falling behind. In the end, all servers will have the same starting line and the same battlefield, and the war will begin! Rely on strength and strive for glory! 〓Reduce the burden on the liver and make it easy to develop〓 
Optimize the ARPG development system, focus on reducing the burden of resource acquisition gameplay, release time and energy, focus on experiencing battles, and return the game to its origins of refreshing graphics, surprise equipment explosions, and passionate battles!
devnote-718397:
[Word from the developer] 
Hello everyone, it has been 10 months since the last time "Codename: Zhan" was open for trial play on TapTap. In the last trial, we collected a lot of opinions and saw many people create various "flower activities"! Therefore, we are constantly optimizing the design and improving the quality of meat pigeons (which is very bumpy). Due to various reasons, it took me so long to reopen the Tap page. First, I want to say sorry to everyone--! "Can you make meat pigeons?" When faced with this voice, we were confused at first. After careful analysis, we found that we were indeed not doing a good job. We hope to communicate more about the design of meat pigeons with everyone, and ultimately make the game more and more fun. 
Closer to home, regarding Meat Pigeon, in the past 10 months, we have mainly done and are continuing to do the following things: [Polishing and supplementing the construction system in the game - making it more enjoyable than before] 
We have always believed that meat pigeons play with amplifiers. We get different fragments in the game and make up many amplifiers. In the end, an ant can easily trample an elephant to death. Everyone will definitely look forward to building more fun, which is hard to reach the upper limit of fun, so we continue to try to make an in-game construction system that is more sophisticated, has a better patching experience, and has more amplifier layers. To this end, while retaining the original design, we have adjusted the value multiplication zone. For example, changing the number of small rockets from one to multiple ones will add more damage to the water charge, allowing the thunder stack speed to increase to a faster start, etc. [Optimize the rhythm of the level - it will be faster and more exciting, and the upper limit will be deeper] 
"It's too jail-breaking!" "You can't play the established genre!" "It's not fun!" We received many such opinions during the development process. 
"The front is too simple, won't it be broken through quickly?" In fact, no, the meat pigeon should not become a fig leaf with little content. The fun meat pigeon itself has strong replayability. We should not worry about players completing the level too quickly. What we should worry about is that meat pigeon is not fun and players are not willing to play it again and again. Therefore, we have made some in-depth adjustments to make the game more enjoyable and increase the upper limit of enjoyment. For example, it will be easier to form basic genres and smoother in the early stages of levels. We will reduce the complex mechanics of monsters in the early stages while retaining the tense experience, making it easier for everyone to experience genre construction. We are currently optimizing and will not rush to recover costs. 
We may still receive a lot of complaints, but we also look forward to encouragement. These are the sources of power for us to make the game more fun. 
Hope you all have fun! !
desc-752128:
Players play the role of prisoners and survive every day in prison by drawing cards! Working, eating, relaxing, sleeping, and having to deal with fevers, beatings, and extortion by prison guards. Choose Animal Mask, use luck and strategy, and collect 100 bail cards to get out of jail. Drawing cards feels good for a while, but I keep drawing cards and sitting in jail - can you escape? 
In "Drawing Prison 2", you are a newly imprisoned prisoner, wearing an animal mask, relying on drawing cards to survive until the day you are released from prison. The goal is to collect 100 bail card fragments - don't think that just working hard is enough, the prison will give you trouble every day. You work, eat, relax, and sleep according to your schedule every day, but random events will teach you how to behave at any time: fever and infection, fractures and insomnia, prison guards raiding and confiscating your belongings, and you must obediently submit your confession every week. The inmates are also not good at dealing with each other. They threaten to beat them violently at every turn, causing their three points to drop wildly. Fortunately, you are not just relying on face. Choosing a mask (strength, agility and other attributes) at the beginning determines the success rate of the event, and the stunts affect the way to make money - moving bricks honestly, making money by trading stocks, or making a big gamble and drawing cards to turn the tables (not recommended, it is easy to end up in jail). The core gameplay is to draw cards and make choices: draw from different prize pools such as food, medicine, and gift cards, and make up for what is missing. The only way to survive is to survive. If you survive the early stages, you can join a gang, change jobs, gain friendship with the prisoner, and finally escape. Remember: small bets make you happy, but big bets can lead to jail time. Do you dare to try it?
desc-718397:
Game introduction: 
"Codename: Zhan" is a 2.5D action pigeon game in the Chinese style. It uses unique Chinese aesthetics and destiny choices to form a growth trajectory, leading players into a thrilling adventure. The story of the game is set in a virtual alternate time and space. The Ming Kingdom captured the Xicang Kingdom, and the princess of the Xicang Kingdom was also seriously injured and lost her memory during the war. The player becomes the princess of the Xicang Kingdom who has lost her memory. With the help of her uncle who went to Chang'an in the Kingdom of Ming, she wanders in the illusion of her mind, undergoes countless recastings and trials of her sanity, and finally recovers her memory and discovers the truth. The game introduces the legendary story "The Ancient Mirror" and combines it with a series of original Sanyuan Wuyao concepts to provide help to the princess in the process of challenging the heart knot, assisting the princess to obtain new combat moves, forming a variety of combination relationships between moves and elements, and ultimately presenting a variety of combat abilities and combat skills. Game features: 
(1) The artistic expression of the combination of folk scenes and traditional white porcelain 
The game art design incorporates ancient Chinese traditional aesthetics, drawing inspiration from porcelain, murals, and other traditional Chinese folk cultural elements. The game interface resources are processed using hand-fired porcelain, and then a camera is used to capture high-precision photos under lighting, and processed into interface resources through software, making the in-game interface like a flowing and glorious porcelain painting. The delicate colors and elegant shapes are natural, conveying the charm of a thousand-year civilization. (2) Rich genre experience brought by free combination of skills and limited construction 
The game combat provides time for observation and thinking in terms of operational rhythm, and also adds high-attack skills, which not only slows down the battlefield, but also allows the character to be protected by the invincible and dominating mechanism when releasing these skills. Players need to move and attack quickly before the skills are built. After the skills are built, they can destroy enemies in a large area with one attack and gain a more refreshing combat experience. 
The game specially integrates elements into combat changes and builds 2 layers of [Change Seeds]. The first layer of seeds corresponds to the five elements, and also corresponds to the five types of resistance against monsters: lightning paralysis to break the hegemony, flame ignition to penetrate the shield, wood and vines to wrap around to control maneuvers, wind shield to block bullets, and water wall to block and divide the monsters; the second layer of seeds corresponds to each of the five types of resistance against monsters. The growth of various fighting mechanisms, such as thunder, lightning chain, thunder punishment, rockets, bombs, ground fire, etc. Each mechanism corresponds to a "three walls" to form skill moves, and then the genre under this mechanism can be improved through the growth of the corresponding element "Yao". In addition, the game's skill construction has a strong sense of purpose. When the same element reaches a certain number, powerful formation skills can be activated. (3) A narrative method that makes one or two characters more vivid and engaging 
Compared to large chunks of information push, this game hopes that players can gain plot and association plot through experience. This game uses the form of a stage play to express and present the fierce conflicts or strong emotions in each story slice. In terms of narrative method, fragmented forms are used to allow players to obtain information while growing up, allowing players who are interested in the plot to experience the fun of discovering the plot. Players who are indifferent to the plot are not forced to read the plot content. They only need to focus on the combat experience. Therefore, this game has designed a story room to tell the story of the princess, and a strange story to complete the background and easter eggs of the story. When players face the choice of the plot room, they use a diary-like form to record the player's choices, and give players different combat prop rewards based on the accumulated choices. There are many other features, just play around and you’ll find out!

desc-750407:
Kick shells with Leonardo, Raphael, Donatello, Michelangelo or other familiar friends in this completely tube-like 80s-style beat 'em up game. Cowabunga! They're skinny, green, and mean! Battle as a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtle to thwart Kraang and Shredder's latest twisted plan. Fight your way through a righteous collection of classic Ninja Turtles locations in this beautifully rendered retro beat-em-up action game. Fight your way through more than a dozen different levels and use dangerous ninja combos to defeat classic enemies like Baxter Stockman or Triceratops! -- Full version -- 
The Dimension Shellshock and Radical Reptiles DLC are both included with the main game and can be used while playing. Features 
• Play with iconic TMNT characters, including our Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles heroes Leo, Raph, Donnie and Mikey – or choose April, Master Splinter or Casey Jones as a playable character for the first time! 
• Enjoy old-school gameplay enhanced with super fresh combat mechanics.

desc-730887:
In the wasteland where civilization remains, mechanically modified alien behemoths are rampant, and the last survivors of mankind are struggling to survive in the broken city. You will become the leader of the apocalypse, and by hatching alien behemoths and building bases and fortresses, you will personally rewrite the fate of mankind as the behemoths hunt and fight against each other. 
Game features: 
Alien Era・Four Cores 
Behemoths attack and rewrite the battlefield pattern: From prehistoric dinosaurs to mutated behemoths, every alien species can become the core of your war. Their appearance will help you completely subvert the traditional SLG tactical logic. 
Alien species capture and hatching: Cultivate and hatch new alien behemoths through exclusive serum, unlock exclusive skills and forms, and create your own doomsday army. 
Embers of Civilization: Heroes of the End of the World: Rebuild your base in the ruins of a dilapidated city, unlock the technology tree of the end of the world, and rebuild civilization from the ruins in an epic process. 
Strategy comes first and camp confrontation: Form alliances or confrontations with players. In the competition for resources and the defense of beast tides, use your wisdom to compete with the behemoth army for doomsday hegemony. Core gameplay 
Alien species hatching and cultivation: Collect materials, hatch behemoths, upgrade their combat power and form through mecha transformation, and evolve from ordinary war beasts to battlefield masters. 
Base construction and management: On the land where civilization remains, build fortifications, research and develop technology, and train troops to create an impregnable human fortress and rebuild a civilized home. 
Behemoth Hunting and PVP: Go deep into dangerous areas to hunt wild behemoths, or compete with other players’ legions in real-time on the beast battle battlefield to plunder resources and glory. 
Beast tide defense and camp warfare: Resist periodic alien beast tides, cooperate with allies to fight for key strongholds in camp confrontations, and expand your survival territory.
desc-839961: Incarnate as the resurrected Demon King's head and embark on the road of revenge and rebuilding the kingdom. This is an action roguelite game that doesn't require hand speed: the enemy will only act after your actions, allowing you to enjoy the thrill of dodging, rebounding, building chains, and fighting bosses.
devnote-730887:
Hello everyone! I am very happy that "Beast Battlefield" is finally going to meet the domestic players. Behind "Beast Battlefield", we are a group of game developers who are full of endless longing for the science fiction world. To put it bluntly, we are a group of otakus who watch science fiction movies over and over again when they have nothing to do. The "Jurassic" and "Transformers" series are our favorite works, so we thought that if we combine ancient dinosaurs with sci-fi mechas, there should be nothing cooler than this. Science fiction is a brave exploration of unknown boundaries; dinosaurs are vivid witnesses of the ancient history of the earth; and mechas are the crystallization of human wisdom and power. By integrating these three, we aim to create a game world that is both retro and avant-garde, both real and fantastic. Here, players can not only feel the shock and primitiveness of the dinosaur era, but also experience the advancement and miracles of future technology. This blend across time and space is the original intention of the birth of "Beast Battlefield". We have added capture, domestication, and transformation to the SLG game, not only to add more interesting gameplay to the SLG game that is opening up wastelands and paving the way to siege cities~ This is also due to our deep thinking on the theme of "symbiosis and evolution." At the edge of doomsday, humans are no longer isolated, but need to coexist with these behemoths and use their power to fight against the threat of AI. We know that every detail is related to the player's gaming experience, so from the model design of the behemoth to the setting of skills, from the optimization of the capture mechanism to the formulation of combat strategies, every step embodies the team's hard work and wisdom. In the days to come, we will continue to listen to every player's voice and continue to improve and optimize our products. Finally, we sincerely invite all of you who love science fiction, dinosaurs, and mechas to join us in "Beast Battlefield". 
——Producer of "Beast Battlefield"
devnote-219259:
I really wanted to make a game that was full of love and positivity. In my opinion, Venice is a romantic city on the water. I remember that when I was very young, I watched a love movie "Everyone Says I Love You" set in Venice. From then on, I always had a small seed in my heart that I wanted to visit Venice, but due to various reasons, I never had the chance to go. "How do you play this game if you've never been there?" Someone must be curious. In the past three years, I have seen every corner of Venice using Google Maps and piles of travel books. We designed a girl named Sofia who loves life, music, and food. We hope that through games, she can take us to experience the local customs of Venice. 
"Traveler Sophia" official Q group: 897459854 
"Traveler Sophia" official Weibo: MewoGogo Studio
desc-219259:
Game features 
Adopting a unique and interesting picture book style. We strive to make every picture in the game reach the illustration level, allowing players to take unlimited screenshots and save them as screensavers. Have you all watched "Where's Wally?"? Does playing our game bring back childhood memories? This version contains 10 scenes, more than 1,800 character materials, more than 300 sets of character animations, more than 100 sequence animations and special effects, more than 100 European buildings (8 landmark buildings in Venice), and nearly 300 dubbing materials, creating a complete and realistic Venice fairy tale world in our hearts. 
About details 
Dubbing in various languages: I have recorded human voice dubbing in multiple languages, including Mandarin, English, Italian, French, Cantonese, Hokkien, etc. (I am from Fujian, so my hometown dialect is a must). Interesting animated easter eggs: Many interesting and funny little easter eggs are designed, which will surely surprise you during the game. Follow-up works: China's Tang Dynasty, France, the Netherlands... come to our community to vote and choose where you want to go next! 
Original intention of the game 
I really wanted to make a game that was full of love and positivity. In my opinion, Venice is a romantic city on the water. I remember that when I was very young, I watched a love movie "Everyone Says I Love You" set in Venice. From then on, I always had a small seed in my heart that I wanted to visit Venice, but due to various reasons, I never had the chance to go. "How do you play this game if you've never been there?" Someone must be curious. In the past three years, I have seen every corner of Venice using Google Maps and piles of travel books. We designed a girl named Sofia who loves life, music, and food. We hope that through games, she can take us to experience the local customs of Venice.
devnote-793415:
Hello everyone! We are the development team of "Dungeon of the Brave". 
Thank you very much for your willingness to play our game. 
Without exception, the friends in the project team are all loyal fans of the search, attack and extraction genre: we have evacuated tens of thousands of people in top-secret operations at the space base, captured bounties in the Louisiana swamps, and hunted ice dragons in increasingly dark dungeons. 
We are deeply fascinated by the strong feedback pleasure of the three links of "search-attack-withdraw", and firmly believe that "search, attack and withdraw" is the most promising gameplay prototype in recent years. The core members of the project team are all practitioners who have been involved in the game industry for many years. We took the initiative to leave the big manufacturer platform and came together for a common goal - to create a "lightweight, highly adaptable" minimalist search, fight and withdraw game. 
In "Dungeon of the Brave": 
1. There is no complicated learning cost, anyone can get started quickly and enjoy the pure charm of search, attack and withdrawal; 
2. You don’t need to take up a lot of time, you can start a game in a fragmented period, easily and without burden; 
3. Winning or losing has nothing to do with the disparity in operational skills, it all depends on strategic decision-making. This is a minimalist search, fight, and retreat experience that we tailor-made for players, retaining the original flavor of the gameplay while also being unique. 
The current version of "Dungeon of the Brave" is still very crude, just a small seed of our dream of searching, fighting and removing. But it is precisely because of the play of all players that this seed has a chance to germinate. If you have any dissatisfaction or suggestions during the game, please feel free to tell us, we will listen carefully and respond with all our strength.
desc-793415:

Here, you will bring all your wealth into a shrinking chessboard of destiny. Should you search for treasures and strengthen yourself, or secretly assassinate and become the final winner? Every roll of the dice is a life or death decision! 
【Core Features】 
🎲 Destiny chessboard, strategic entry: 
√ Gambling games with capital: Freely match skill decks and mysterious keys to enter the game. Each game is a new strategic start, with risks and benefits coexisting! 
√ Chessboard shrinking circle: The map collapses over time, the living space is continuously compressed, and the sense of oppression reaches its peak, forcing the final decisive battle!
