This is Last Train Radio, and I am your radio host Momo. 
Regarding the latest developments of Icefield and Last Train, Momo will regularly report to you in the future. If you have any questions, please leave a message to Momo~ 
There was heavy wind and snow, but the engine was lit. Looking forward to seeing you in the car!
desc-826592:
Dear passengers, welcome to the "last train". "Codename: Rebirth" is a top-down search and rescue shooting game. Here, you can team up with cute little animal agents to carefully search and fight fiercely in the snowy apocalypse, and evacuate with priceless supplies. I hope you can enjoy the pure fun of "search, fight, and retreat" from a bird's-eye view here, and personally build your own doomsday shelter. 【About "Last Train"】 
On this endless ice sheet, it is the only safe haven that is not controlled by the "Enterprise" and the "Legion". As long as the "fire" in the engine is still burning, the little animal agents have a mobile steel base. Maybe one day, the "last train" will take them to a warm and safe place. [About our small business on the ice sheet] 
It is not easy to survive in the ice and snow apocalypse - the furnace is waiting for firewood, the engine is in urgent need of fuel, and "tinder" and parts will not jump into the car on their own. 
So, please put on your cold-proof clothes, call your most trusted companions, and go to the ice fields outside for a hearty "search, fight, and retreat" together! The rules are not complicated: look for fire, search for supplies, stay vigilant and act according to the situation, and finally stop when you are ready and withdraw when you are done. 
You don't need to be very good at shooting to do this. When adventuring in the ice field, guidance, reconnaissance, medical treatment, or reminding teammates that "it's time to retreat" when they get up are as important as marksmanship. Being able to bring people and materials back from the ice field is the key capability that "Last Train" needs most. [Close the car door and welcome home] 
When you return to the "last bus" in the wind and snow, and open the car door, you will understand the meaning of going out for adventure—— 
The full bags of supplies brought back will be turned into larger carriages, more exquisite and rare furniture, and better equipment for the next departure. 
You can take off your cold weather clothes, choose a record of your choice, put it in the gramophone, and invite your teammates who took a bullet for you to sit around the heater. Share stories, talk about snowy nights and distant places. This will be the beginning of a beautiful friendship. 
Everything you and your companions experience on the last train will make this car more and more like the warmest home before the extreme cold comes. And this is exactly the meaning of our "last train" existence.
devnote-226183: Hi! I am the producer of "Time Order": Li Wanglin, and I am very happy to meet you! "Time Order" is a mobile game that inherits the classic PC MMO gameplay. As a small R&D team with less than twenty people, our dream is to allow mobile players to experience the original large-scale MMORPG game experience on mobile devices. To this end, we have done a lot of design and preparation in terms of visual effects, map editing, rich gameplay, etc. We hope players will like this product. We have created a new high-degree-of-freedom 3D action combat system in the game. Weapon switching, vital damage, and awakening finishing moves can be matched at will. Unique back weapons can unlock exclusive skills. Players can switch between "melee" and "long-range" modes during combat, use cold weapons or light machine guns to deal with rich and varied boss battles, and can also summon "drone" to perform special functions such as throwing grenades. The game supports multi-player teams, making team tactics the key to victory. You can freely customize your character and match it with luxurious mecha costumes. By freely exploring and fighting on the big map, you can collect different materials, carry out equipment forging, upgrade core inscriptions to strengthen your combat power, open rift dungeons, and participate in camp PVP to compete for glory. There is also a complete guild and friend system to help you meet comrades to fight the crisis together. The game supports mobile/computer multi-terminal Internet server competition and team formation, allowing players on different platforms to go on expeditions together. I hope that all loyal fans of MMORPG games will move forward with us in the order of time in 2026, and harvest their own enthusiasm and emotion on the planet Traal.
desc-226183:
"Time Order" is an action game with a chaotic science fiction theme. The background of the game is set in the future when the earth is annihilated. After a long era of wandering in the universe, humans who have long been far away from the solar system finally discovered an earth-like planet - Traal, and planned to rebuild their glory here. However, behind the seemingly hopeful world lies a huge secret, which can even be traced back to the most ancient era of the earth's history, tens of millions of years ago. At the beginning of the game, human technology has advanced and evolved into a new branch of the race - the new humans and the awakened ones. Players need to decide the camp they will be born into from the beginning and fight for it to win honor. In the face of the crises facing the planet and the interests of their respective camps, many tests are coming one after another... [The race battle is about to begin] 
A battle for survival across the stars and races! Fight for the hope of ending interstellar wandering and continuing the lifeline of the race! 
New humans or awakened people or aborigines, who can fully embrace "Tral"? [Super Burning Showdown, Extreme Fingertip Operation] 
Fierce and passionate fight without locking, burning the soul of the universe in your heart! 
A variety of weapons + ftg skill combos to stimulate your operational potential. [DIY combination to create exclusive mecha] 
Exclusive equipment & dazzling skills & multi-style suits, you can freely match them as you like. 
Build a mecha that only you can control, and a galaxy-level warrior is about to be born! [Freely pinch your face to compose your story] 
Personalized plate + shaping slider, customized face pinching in various styles, 
From skin color and facial features to hair and voice, you define the protagonist of your sci-fi story. [Interstellar Voyage Exploring the Mysterious Realm] 
The super giant monster comes from a foreign land, and the mysterious promoter is in the dark. 
What exactly are "them"? Why are you here? 
"Challenge" new species, "explore" a huge map, and "find" unknown treasures, your journey will be a sea of ​​stars!
devnote-840771: A single-player UE5 production of a campus-themed open world game with an abstract and interesting plot just to make you laugh. (This work contains plot lines about poor children and rich children. I hope you like it)
desc-840771:
Start with one billion! You will transform into the male protagonist of Shuangwen and go to school. Sports cars and airplanes are just your means of transportation. Villa beauties are also your standard equipment. With the ability to make money, you will go to school as the richest man! 
Open world with high degree of freedom 
All NPCs can attack each other and even pee! The open world is about doing whatever you want and doing whatever you want. 
Beautiful women like clouds 
As a student at Weilong, the school I go to must be the top university! Not only is the school environment beautiful, but the students are all as beautiful as gods, very eye-catching. 
Beautiful picture 
The game is made with Unreal Engine 5 and uses many next-generation technologies. For example, Nanite can make the model have movie-level high precision. Lumen can provide light and shadow comparable to the natural environment to make the day and night cycle in the game real and delicate. In addition, the game is first-person, which allows players to better experience the game immersively.
desc-397030:
Follow the WeChat public account [Lechen Game] to receive the exclusive gift package code for the game! 
"Super Storage Hall 2" is a casual level-breaking game that allows you to happily relieve stress and challenge your brain. In this joyful storage world, you will become a master of organizing and collecting, using a variety of tools to clean the room or dirty items. 
The storage hall in the game is full of surprises and challenges. Each level in the game has its own unique charm. It may require you to clean off the years on an old rag, or it may require you to assemble various electronic products yourself. 
By unlocking new levels, you will face increasingly challenging room layout and storage tasks. You can find the best storage order through observation and reasoning, optimize your storage strategy, and get the highest scores and rewards. 
There are also various cute cats in the game to accompany you in completing storage tasks. They have skills that bring good luck to their owners. By interacting with cats, you can hear their voices and realize true cloud-raising of cats, making the process of tidying up the room more joyful and meaningful.
devnote-59439: In order to make this game, I planned for my sister to grow old overnight, and she went out to collect art and has not returned yet, huh? Operation students, wake up! Move your little hands and click to download. You can neither suffer a loss nor be fooled...
desc-59439:
"Wind Story" is a turn-based strategy mobile game with an Eastern fantasy theme. It combines classic Chinese style charm with innovative strategic gameplay, and is committed to creating a fairy world for players that can not only immerse themselves in adventure, but also easily socialize. 
"Revisiting the classics will never end" 
The game takes you back to a world full of legends. Here, you can stroll among the picturesque ink landscapes, experience the classic plot of catching monsters, hunting for treasures, cultivating true companions, and start a happy journey of your own. 
Come on! Come with me back to Chang'an to hunt for monsters and treasures 
"National style fairy turn-based system" 
Well-paced turn-based combat + designed friendly growth route. In-game mechanisms such as "direct level promotion" allow new players to skip the boring development period. Every scene is poetic and picturesque, whether it is mountains, flowing water, towering ancient trees, or mist-shrouded, waterfalls and springs, it can make you feel fully immersed. 
"Seven professions and hundreds of skills" 
The game provides seven distinctive professions, from "Tiangang" who is good at defensive counterattacks to "Xianxia" who is good at saving lives and healing wounds, to meet different combat preferences. There are hundreds of special partners to collect and develop. You can freely match partners, spiritual pets, and mounts based on innovative formations such as the "Nine Palace Grid" to create ever-changing tactics and experience the fun of strategic formation. 
"Vouchers are given every day" 
Get 648 every day when traveling! There are also various login and growth benefits, 
The game has prepared generous login and growth benefits to help you get started smoothly. In addition to single-player adventure, the game emphasizes a relaxed social experience. Whether you find teammates instantly through the convenient teaming system, or make friends with like-minded friends through the unique interactive gameplay, your path to immortality can be filled with laughter.
desc-540005:
Buried in the ashes of Ginkgo Mountain are seeds waiting to sprout. 
A wildfire took away our home, but it couldn't take away the greenery in our memories. 
Now, please follow the red panda Chacha and her friend Chiujiu to return to this heart-warming mountain forest. ◆◆◆Game Features◆◆◆ 
☆Rebuild your home and build the prosperity of the past☆ 
Follow Chacha’s footsteps and return to Ginkgo Mountain that was devoured by fire. Every step of synthesis injects new life into this land. As areas continue to be unlocked, the mountain and forest scenery of the past will be recreated bit by bit in your hands! ☆Cultivation and planting, it is urgent to harvest food☆ 
Get all kinds of vegetables through synthesis, cultivate a vibrant farm with your own hands, harvest enough food, and make home construction and mountain forest reconstruction self-sufficient. You no longer have to worry about going hungry! ☆Happy decoration, healing mountains and forests are defined by you☆ 
Every detail of your home is decorated by your own hands. Obtain various national-style furniture and decorations through tasks to create a unique mountain and forest house, and also provide a beautiful corner for returning friends to rest in peace. ☆Cure synthesis, simple operation and one-click storage☆ 
Simply drag your fingertips to synthesize items and easily store them while advancing the reconstruction progress. Reasonably allocate physical strength, choose synthesis paths, and enjoy the healing pleasure of organization and creation in orderly synthesis. ☆Gather your partners and collect surprises on mountain view furniture☆ 
During the reconstruction journey, you can meet a variety of partners, each with their own unique story. Through collection and interaction, you can gradually light up the exquisite illustrations and unlock hidden plots, making Ginkgo Mountain more lively and lively due to various encounters. ☆Fun games, multiple ways to play and relax☆ 
In addition to the main line synthesis, the game also prepares relaxing and interesting mini-games. While rebuilding, experience various easter egg gameplay and gain extra rewards and fun time. With the light touch of your fingertips, scattered hope can be synthesized; with patient cultivation, the scorched earth can be rejuvenated. 
You will not only rebuild your house, but also bring back your separated relatives and friends, and welcome new neighbors from afar. 
In every healing cycle of synthesis and decoration, I personally light up a warm and noisy tomorrow that belongs to all life~ Here, all things are reborn, just waiting for you to come.
devnote-540005:
Dear mountain people: No, the cuteness ahead is overwhelming, please evacuate quickly. 
Warning, warning, no further! "Drip——" 
Your heartbeat signal has been captured by Ginkgo Mountain, welcome to Ginkgo Mountain Red Panda Paradise! hello! Come and smoke red pandas with us! 
The beginning of this story comes from a common and somewhat sad thought in our hearts: What if one day the most beautiful mountain forest in our memories disappears? Thus, Chacha, Chiujiu, and many other small animals were born from our care. What we want to do is not only a game, but also a warm "invitation" - inviting you to join us in turning a scorched "impossible" into a vibrant "new home" with patience and a little bit of "magic" (just a few clicks of your fingers!). In the process, we ourselves were healed many times. Drawing each newly grown ginkgo leaf, designing furniture with the scent of grass, imagining Mr. Capybara walking slowly with his luggage on his back... These moments make us believe that as long as we work together, hope and bustle can grow again in desolate places. So, take your time and relax. There are no fierce battles here, only warm reunions and construction. I hope you can find your own peace of mind and sense of accomplishment here like Chacha who returned. The door of Ginkgo Mountain is always open, and hot tea and friends are ready. "My Little Panda" Ginkgo Game
desc-199489:
Winner of the 2020 IndieCade Visual Award, winner of the Game Connection Asia International Game Show Asia's Best Art Style Award, and shortlisted for the indiePlay Best Overseas Work Award~ Unique painting style and exquisite levels~ TapTap reservations and Steam Wishlist are now open~ Everyone is welcome to add us to your reservations and wish lists! 【Introduction】 
Something bad is happening! The magic gem in the museum was stolen by the criminal thief Mr. In order to recover the lost gem, the great detective Pierre must embark on a path of no return through the maze. Bypassing obstacles and passing through difficulties and obstacles, the great detective Pierre is bound to win! 【Game introduction】 
"Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective" (full name "Labyrinth City: Pierre the Maze Detective") is adapted from the best-selling book "Pierre The Maze Detective". In this game, you will travel through 10 beautifully painted maps to find the thief Mr. On the way of searching, you can interact with passers-by and dig out the details of the side story. At the same time, you can also collect treasures on the map and discover unexpected surprises ~ [Game Highlights] 
-Adapted from IC4Design's popular children's picture book "Pierre the Labyrinth Detective", the exquisite childlike hand-painted style takes you into a colorful world full of life and intricate details! 
-More than 100 objects collection and hidden puzzle games, with different map styles and hidden mysteries. 
-500+ interactive points, making the background, objects and characters in the game more dynamic~ 
-Original music will take you back to the world of childhood fun! 
-The plot of the story is complicated and confusing. Experience the whole process of tracking the suspect to retrieve the gems and solve interesting puzzles! 
-Supports Simplified and Traditional Chinese, English, French, German, Japanese, Russian, Spanish, Italian, Korean and other languages. Labyrinth Detective Labyrinth City official QQ group is now open, group number 645020246, welcome all detectives to join!

desc-586353: "The Realm" is a fantasy-themed open world adventure shooting game with a high degree of freedom. If a world is not worth saving, then destroy it. If the world is a house that is not protected from wind and rain, then it is better to tear it down and rebuild it than to live in ruins. Even those who think they own the house will attack you. Even if those cowards huddled among them try to stop you. Even if those sleepyheads who don’t know the truth will curse you. But you understand, but you know - the so-called gods are just rotten masks, the so-called prayers are just desperate gestures, the so-called faith is just useless persistence. The human soul is the power to reshape the world; the gun in your hand is the weapon to kill the gods. One day, a bullet will pierce God's forehead, and the echo of that gunshot will wake up the first morning of the new world.
devnote-586353:
"So, what kind of game is "The Realm"?" First of all, it should have the purest happiness, the most intuitive refreshing, and the most interesting gameplay. And most importantly, "The Realm" needs to be a fun game. This is the answer I gave myself. 
For developers, such a simple goal may be a bit naive; but it is because of this ultimate goal that we gathered a group of like-minded friends and started the production of this game. 
Maybe every player has a different definition of "fun"; but we believe there are always some beautiful things that everyone hopes for. Even if there is only one moment that makes you smile, it is worth our efforts. 
Compared with other games, for me, the "fun" of "The Realm" may lie in the free adventure in the magnificent world; it may be the sensitive and smooth operating feel and combat experience; it may be the gorgeous and unrestrained combat performance; and of course, the gripping plot - at least it must be non-toxic and selfless (no direction, do not cue friends). 
oh! By the way, it is also indispensable to be able to have an intense battle with friends, make fun of each other or complain about each other. 
You see, our expectation that "The Realm" will definitely be "fun" doesn't seem to be very difficult to achieve. 
After all, we have worked so many extra classes, constantly optimized and adjusted, and finally made so much fun content. We will definitely have to show off on behalf of all the friends in the development team (akimbo). Don’t worry, "The Realm" will indeed be fun! But the cases in the past period have all sounded the alarm to us, telling us with facts that one shortcoming is enough to destroy the entire bucket! 
Indeed, in everyone’s eyes, “The Realm” at this stage is just one of the games that has no name and is waiting to be launched. 
However, for us, "The Realm" is like a biological child. We have put so much effort and emotion into it, and it is inevitable that we have a little filter of "hope that the son will become a dragon and the daughter will become a phoenix." 
And that's exactly why we need you: players' suggestions, feedback, and criticism will give us more to think about and help us do better. 
Just like comfortable clothing needs to be tailor-made, how can an excellent game be separated from the players? 
Fortunately, there is still a long way to go. The game is currently in early development stages (not a new folder!). 
The development team is working hard to become Palu who works hard and looks forward to meeting you all soon!
devnote-739389:
Dear villagers of Shiguang Village, hello everyone. We are an independent team from a small southern town. Our independently created independent game "Shining Light Courtyard" will be launched this summer. 
This is an interesting journey through time, telling the story of a quaint little courtyard, just like living at your grandma's house in the countryside when you were a child, carefree. This is also our original intention of making this game. After traveling in the city, we were tired of the hustle and bustle of feasting and feasting. With full sincerity, we completed our first game - Shiguang Xiaoyuan in more than 3 years, and also fulfilled our long-held game dream. Our favorite gameplay, painting style, and feelings have all been written into this game. 
We sincerely invite you to try out and evaluate the game. Please click to make an appointment and look forward to the first closed beta of "Shiguang Xiaoyuan" with us. We need your valuable opinions so that we can do better.
desc-739389:
Invitation letter from Shiguang Xiaoyuan 
Dear villagers: 
The "Once upon a Time Slow" time machine is about to set sail. Passengers please fasten your seat belts. The destination of this time journey is my mother's childhood courtyard. Let’s go back to the midsummer night of the 1970s, go to the rocking chair with a hand-operated cattail leaf fan, listen to the stories of my mother’s childhood, and open up the long-lost memories. 
Watch the spring plowing and autumn harvest, and listen to the chirping of cicadas in the summer night. (Growing vegetables) 
Looking forward to the golden autumn, my warehouse will be full, so I can exchange for two taels of spare money. (order) 
Accompanied by flocks of cattle and sheep, chickens and ducks crow together. (breeding) 
The smoke from the small courtyard is rising, and the aroma of wild vegetables and rice is tasted. (cooking) 
Recalling the spring breeze of the past, drunken childhood dreams. (memory) 
In this village where time meets, I wonder if my mother and I have chased the same chicken, pulled the same radish, caught the same firefly, and watched the same sunset...
desc-173128: "Dinosaur Island: Sandbox Evolution" is the first 3D sandbox survival game that realistically simulates the life of dinosaurs. In this vast dinosaur world, there are also a variety of ferocious dinosaurs and animals that you can fight, kill, and conquer! Experience the difficulty of surviving in nature, and constantly improve your dinosaur level, genes, etc. What's more interesting is that here you can find your dinosaur partners to survive and fight with you. Come and experience the difficulty and fun of survival! In the game, there are two different types of dinosaurs for you to choose from, one is the carnivorous dinosaur "Velociraptor" and the other is the herbivorous "Parasaurolophus". Velociraptor moves quickly and has high attack power. It is suitable for players who like challenges. Velociraptor can also evolve into Oviraptor and Therizinosaurus, and finally it can evolve into one of Tyrannosaurus Rex, Oxaurus and Spinosaurus. Parasaurolophus is tenacious and has high defense, so it is suitable for casual players. Parasaurolophus can also evolve into Pachycephalosaurus, Chasmosaurus, and ultimately into one of Stegosaurus, Ankylosaurus, and Triceratops. Come and experience the free life of Dinosaur Island together!
desc-157201:
Welcome to Cyclonus! Are you ready to challenge your limits on the highway with a sports car! 
In the game, you need to master the handling skills of the car, surpass other drivers as much as possible, and avoid collisions and illegal driving to accumulate mileage and set the highest record in history. 
You can also purchase and unlock a variety of luxury sports cars and choose the model that suits you for racing. 
You can customize the color and appearance of the vehicle according to your preferences, and improve the performance of the vehicle to better cope with the challenges of different scenarios.

The tired working life makes him embark on a journey to pursue retirement life, and he accidentally enters the magical world on the magical magic train. 
Are you ready to welcome customers? Store manager. You can use raw materials to make a variety of drinks 
Let brave men from all walks of life fall completely under the spell of magical coffee drinks! Make money and upgrade! Decorate shop 
Arrange more tables for more small animals to dine in, and customize your shop! Through conversations with various adventurers and customers, learn about the life experiences of each small animal. 
Learn step by step the history of this glorious royal city! From the beginning of business to the end of the world

desc-155287:
Do you like sushi? 
Sushi is a traditional Japanese food. In this fun sushi making game, you play as a sushi chef. Make more than 5 different kinds of sushi, hand roll sushi, sashimi sushi and more. 
Game features: 
1.4 different characters, cat, duck, frog and bee. 
2. Make more than 10 different kinds of sushi, with different flavors, different ingredients and making methods. 
3. Earn enough gold coins to unlock the next sushi, you need more than 5 gold coins to unlock the next level. 
4. The placement of sushi ingredients and the time you spend making it will affect your score. 
5. Provide various tools for you to make better sushi. 
Enjoy our game.
devnote-739286:
Welcome to "Tiny Isle", a relaxing and healing game that combines leisure, strategy, and simulation! ●Planting and Harvesting: Start from a small block island, plant crops, harvest crystals, complete tasks to obtain more resources, and continuously expand your island. 
●Elf companion: There is a cute elf living on the island. It will wander around the island, transport crystals, or play, eat, and sleep leisurely, adding vitality to your island. 
●Diverse unlocking: Use crystals to unlock props and obtain unique crops. The combination of different crops can optimize resource output. Design the layout of your plants as you like and explore more efficient production strategies. 
●Multi-functional buildings: Build a variety of facilities, adjust the art style of the island, and make every scenery unique. 
●Rich activities: fishing, interaction, and receiving mysterious visitors. Each fish and visitor has unique abilities or rewards, bringing unexpected experiences. 
●Dynamic environment: Enjoy changing weather and different moments of the day, and immerse yourself in a warm and rich natural environment. 
In "Little Island", achievement is not just a goal, but also a process of exploring, unlocking, and growing together with the island creatures.
desc-739286: "Tiny Isle" is a healing simulation construction game, where you will become the manager of a small island. There is no need to directly control the character, just plant, harvest, and unlock magical crops to explore more natural mysteries. Accompany the elves to live together, expand the island, complete tasks, and create your own exclusive island world in the changing weather and warm atmosphere.
desc-803113:
I am a security guard, protecting the safety of a party. 
Once you were just a carefree and happy little security guard. One day, happiness came suddenly! 
A distant relative in your family wants to invest in some projects. Maybe because you have ten years of rich security experience, he is ready to invest in you and let you open a security company. 
To open a security company, you need to 1. Recruit security guards: Recruit a wide range of security talents to form your security team. It undertakes security and patrol tasks in various types of places such as communities, shopping malls, and hospitals, and can also deploy smart devices such as drones for security tasks. 
2. Welfare benefits: Provide employees with competitive labor allowances, commercial insurance, holiday gifts, and arrange accommodation and meals. 
2. Check for surprise express delivery: Every once in a while, you will receive a mysterious express delivery. When you open it, you can get a variety of practical items - from training equipment to high-tech equipment, which can be given to employees to quickly improve the strength of your team. 
3. Security training: systematic training, arranging training, award distribution, income ranking, etc., to comprehensively improve security strength through various methods. 
4. Emergencies: Handle various emergencies and team activities, such as barbecue parties, group viewings, live CS, participation in various competitions, etc., to improve security capabilities. 
5. Challenge: You can challenge other companies and win generous rewards to make your company stand out in the market. 
6. Arrange the assessment: Arrange the security guard to participate in the assessment. If you successfully pass, you can upgrade the security level. After upgrading the security level, you can earn more money income.
devnote-835980:
"Even though we are separated by time and space, we look forward to meeting the investigator again." 
Hello fellow travelers, we are the development team of "Travelers from the Black Hole". 
As the two-dimensional card market becomes more and more crowded, we are always thinking: How to break away from numerical involution and repeated development, so that players can truly enjoy the thrill of strategic gaming and combat? 
Many works on the market are either too over-the-top, or the combat is superficial, the operation is laggy, and the gameplay is simple, reducing the strategy to a decoration. We hope to make a work that returns to the fun of gaming: using smooth operations to carry in-depth tactics, using rich gameplay to bring lasting freshness, and giving every battle the pleasure of strategizing. 
With this original intention, "Traveler from the Black Hole" officially meets with you
desc-835980:
"Traveler from the Black Hole" is a high-looking 3D real-time combat card placement mobile game. It is full of benefits and there are no routines. Download it and experience the 220 bonus for signing in! 
Dr2057—— 
Many years have passed since the catastrophe that nearly destroyed human civilization. Although the influence of subspace still exists and monster invasions occur from time to time, people have adapted to a new way of life. 
The modern city under the neon lights is full of buildings and bustling. However, behind the prosperity, in the dim streets, there is a crisis. 
Female supernatural beings called "War Princesses" were born in this era of spiritual recovery. Compared with male supernatural beings, they have more stable spiritual coordination. Although the danger of losing control still exists, the power of extraordinary beings is needed to protect the world and fight against the abyss. 
Here, you are a traveler from the earth, serving as the investigator of the "Spiritual World Investigation Bureau", discovering and looking for "war girls" with different abilities: lively and casual martial arts girls, martial arts bow girls who swear to destroy monsters, dream weaver girls who control dreams, magic bullet hunters who walk in the night... 
You will use the neighborhood where snakes and dragons are mixed as your base to establish your own power. Recruit Zhan Ji, organize a demon hunting team, hunt abyss monsters by exploring the abyss and competing for territory, defeating competitors, gradually strengthening yourself, and finally participating in the war that determines the fate of the world. 
Whether you want to become the devil who rules the world or the hero who saves the world is all in your mind. 
But no matter what choice you make, the Warriors will be by your side and follow you until the end of the world. 
This is a story about life, dreams, responsibility and love, and we look forward to your reading. 
Two-dimensional strategy card + 3D real-time battle mobile game, 3D real-time battle without lag and smooth gaming experience 
Five professions: warrior, assassin, support, mage, knight 
Breaking through levels in an abandoned city brings you the exhilarating thrill of mowing the grass, guarding energy escorts, and working together in an opera house to purify your inner demons, among other rich gameplay options, and multi-level strategic challenges.
desc-738909:
Combining strategy and deck building elements, you can embark on an adventure in a barren land! Trials_of_Fire is a single-player turn-based strategy game. The story takes place in the fictional world after a catastrophe. 
Brutal conflicts and difficult decisions await you. The game combines many elements such as free exploration in the open world, multi-character, card-driven combat, innovative loot-equipment mechanism, and DBG (Deck Library Building). While having quite deep gameplay, each game can bring you different strategic opportunities. In addition, you will also face the test of many "trials", weighing the moral pros and cons in a world without laws, trying, ruling or executing people. 
The strategic Roguelike design, randomly generated events, and heroes and cards that are constantly unlocked as the game progresses will give you more choices. Every decision you make as you travel across this dying continent is crucial... Never give up hope. 
Only hope can save your abandoned people, allow you to survive in the dangerous wasteland, and can unite your team of heroes to fight for a new day. During the battle, you can give orders to each hero based on their hand status. The random card drawing mechanism will bring you new and interesting challenges every round. 
You need to choose the best real-time tactics by considering each hero's unique abilities and position on the battlefield, constantly optimize their offensive and defensive capabilities, and take advantage of any possible synergistic effects to fight. 
Between battles, you can adjust the weapons, items, and equipment of the heroes on your team at any time, thereby changing their decks. Properly distribute supplies or exchange items among heroes to maximize the team's strength. 
Search ancient ruins or ambush and loot camps to obtain new items and weapons. You need to deal with various challenges and reasonably allocate equipment and materials to the team. A new epic weapon might even bring new opportunities to your combat strategy. 
You will travel across a vast continent, choose your goals and decide on your own adventure. Travel across a vast and changing wasteland, navigating dangers to find supplies vital to your settlement's home. 
The threat of ambushes and conflicts never ends. Lead your three heroes to fight against wandering natives, legendary monsters and the ruthless continent of Ash!
devnote-738909:
Hello everyone, we are an independent game development team based in London, England - Whatboy Games. 
The two main creators in our team, Adam Doherty and Dax Ginn, are core members of the former "Batman: Arkham" development team. They have both worked at Rocksteady for more than 7 years and have considerable and professional game development experience. Based on the concept of developing high-quality games, they used their experience in AAA game development to personally design all systems. In the end, this highly personalized card game "Trial of Fire" was born. 
We cleverly integrated many elements into the mechanism of "Judgment by Fire" and created a unique strategy and fun in the card system. We hope that each round of the game can bring a different experience, allowing you to experience and feel the most authentic fun of the game. 
If you like strategy games, role-playing, war games, card games or Roguelike games, you might as well take advantage of the upcoming mobile version of "Trial of Fire" and make a reservation. I believe it will bring you an impressive gaming experience.
devnote-799117:
Dear brave men, welcome to the world of meat pigeons where everything depends on dice. Here, a fair-faced person can do whatever he wants, and a dark-faced person can use strategy to change his fate. Every round is a new experience, and every roll of the dice is full of surprises. 
We will continue to make progress and use our efforts to bring a better experience to every player. We are also grateful to every player who is willing to experience it and leave a review. Your feedback is our biggest motivation to continue to polish the game. I wish you a happy game and a happy life!

On the weekend, you prepared your favorite milk tea, paired with fruit-cut cake snacks, and clicked on a familiar fruit short play. The ancient-style handsome man and beauty on the cover were very satisfied. This was the perfect weekend you were looking forward to. Until the next second, you were so angry at the plot that your blood pressure soared, and you left a passionate message: "I can write it better than you!" You didn't expect... the system took it seriously. It has selected the best time traveler. Congratulations, you have time traveled. You and this unreliable system travel through story dungeons.

… 
Multiple identities, each one is you. 
This time, the script is written by you.
devnote-823156:
Hello, "travelers"! Thanks for coming to the little "world" we are working hard to build. 
At first we just liked the idea of ​​"I am reborn and make games in a game company", but we thought it would be better to make a real "time travel" game, so that's how we started. This time, we want to make a fun time travel game. 
The time-travel game we imagine is not just "Rebirth: I am in XXXX" in the opening 30 seconds, but contains a lot of time-travel memes. It must have a "golden finger" to easily read the minds of NPCs; it must also have an infinite space, and there must be spiritual springs for planting flowers and fields; it must also have a system that is not too smart but cute...etc., here it is more like a relaxing moment full of fun and fun. 
We hope that in this game you can use your "gold fingers" to write your journey through time, and hope that this journey will make you have fun. 
If you think there is something wrong with the rhythm or something that is not exciting enough, please tell us in the comment area and we will definitely change it immediately!

Jump into the thrilling first-person shooting experience with Call of Duty®: Warzone™ Mobile! Experience exciting PvP survival gameplay and first-person shooter multiplayer gameplay for a true Call of Duty experience, with the same combat and weapon systems as Call of Duty: Warzone with authentic graphics. Form a team to participate in PvP battles and win in the mobile survival game! Experience competitive play on classic Call of Duty maps like Easter Island, Melee Docks, Training Grounds, and Scrapyard. Bringing Call of Duty to mobile devices 
The world's top "Call of Duty" engine and cross-platform progression technology allow players to carry weapons, task forces and battle pass experience from the PC and console versions of "Call of Duty: Warzone" with their mobile phones. Plunge into the exciting survival game anytime, anywhere and enjoy first-person shooter multiplayer battles together. An unprecedented multiplayer experience

From the air to the ground, omnidirectional movement brings immersive speed, explosiveness and responsiveness to Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 and Call of Duty: Warzone Mobile. Refined map

desc-41333:
"A ray of harmonious light is waiting for you in that lost world intertwined with strife." "Memories" fill the pure white world, and two girls wake up under a dome with many floating fragments... Arcaea is an innovative three-dimensional rhythm game on the mobile terminal. The exciting sound effects and plot are combined, so that both experienced gamers and new players who want to experience rhythm games can be immersed in it. By playing different songs and participating in different activities, you can experience the emotions conveyed by the story, unlock more stories, and keep pace with the development of the plot. More difficult tracks and rank trials are also waiting for you who have the courage to challenge yourself and climb to the top. The online function of competing and communicating with other players will also bring you more happiness. Arcaea, the source of rhythm, can be played offline and is compatible with mobile phones and tablets of all major brands and models. The game itself comes with a large and rich library of free songs, and you can also choose to pay to get more songs and music packs. ==Game Features== 
- Continuously improve your personal skills through a rich and challenging music library and an arcade-like game experience 
- Contains more than 350 famous songs by more than 200 creators 
- Each track has three difficulties to challenge 
- The music library will be continuously enriched with regular updates 
- Colorful music game linkage activities 
- Grow your friend team and improve your position on the leaderboard 
- Supports multi-player real-time online team play 
- Play a set of topic tracks continuously in the rank challenge mode to challenge your limits 
- Experience the main story: follow the two protagonists and experience this profound and fascinating journey from their perspective 
- Experience side plots and short stories: Discover more characters’ stories and colorful experiences in the huge world of Arcaea 
- Get to know and cherish each other with your partner: Whether it is an original character or a linked character, they will accompany you across the mountains, grow with you, and use their own strength to bring more color to your journey and challenges. 
- Gorgeous visual effects bring a unique immersive plot experience. At the same time, your skills and level will also be severely tested like never before == Game Story == 
Two girls wake up in this colorless world full of memories, but their own memories are nowhere to be found... 
So, they each embarked on a journey to discover the truth behind this beautiful and dangerous world. The plot of Arcaea runs through the entire main plot, branch plots and short stories, and is a story about every character in this world. The seemingly independent and unrelated stories all have one thing in common: the world called Arcaea. How the characters and the world view each other builds an ever-evolving plot of grief, joy, and mystery. As they take steps to explore this heavenly world, please join them, follow the footsteps of the fragments, and experience the sadness they feel... "The gentle pure white light is waiting for you in the melody struggle of the lost world." Touch, press and slide along with the melody in this challenging arcade-style music game; listen to songs written by composers from all over the world, including Japan! Experience the new note type "Sound Arc": make full use of screen space to slide and follow the flowing melody. Lost myself in this lost world where light and struggle are intertwined. ⚏Play anytime, anywhere, no internet connection required⚏ 
Can be played on mobile phones and tablets! 
There are both free songs and paid songs. Unlock tons of free songs or pay for more exciting songs - the choice is yours! 
Contains original and independent songs from the game. ⚏Features⚏ 
- Extremely wide range of difficulty levels 
- Watch your abilities and skills grow in an arcade-style music game 
- Contains more than 160 pieces of music and invited more than 100 famous musicians from all over the world. 
- Constantly updated track list 
- Beautiful illustrations that perfectly match the music 
-Support online world rankings and friend rankings 
Download now and experience this unique and innovative music game! ⚏Story background⚏ 
Two girls wander a broken world. They are surrounded by the remaining material from the original world - Arcaea. 
These melody-filled fragments call to the girls, but they seem to be consciously separated into two groups, each of which only allows the designated girl to listen to its own voice. 
Time flies, and the girls gradually become aware of the disharmony in this world. By this time, Arcaea has given them conflicting ideas about what the world was originally like.
devnote-41333: After a long wait, we are very happy to announce that the Arcaea national server will be officially launched soon! We are well aware of your long-standing expectations, so we have always strived to bring you game content that is consistent with the "Arcaea" experience accumulated over the past eight years. In the officially released national version, our primary goal is to present you with the same high-quality experience that is as meticulously crafted as ever and without compromise. There is still much to discover in the world of Arcaea: a gripping story, suspense and conflict resolution (such as the climax of the second act of the main story), and many more surprises and unknown secrets. We are very much looking forward to presenting this content to you as soon as possible, and hope that you will continue to pay attention to Arcaea's future journey! lowiro

A true record of the survival of cows and horses on the American streets, focusing on hard-core search, attack and elimination! 
You walk into the neon city with empty pockets, rummage through trash cans to collect scraps in exchange for meal tickets, compete for territory with your peers without hesitation, and when encountering a swindler or ruthless person, just rub oil on the soles of your feet - withdraw! 
When you're hungry, you eat a cold burger, when you're sleepy, you squat under a bridge. Your health and satiety levels are both in danger. Every step is an extreme push to "survive today"! 
American begging, survival is king!

Krafton, the developer of "PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds", announced that it has signed an agreement with Pocketpair, the developer of "PocketPair", and will be responsible for developing the "Pallu" mobile game. Officials stated that they plan to faithfully reinterpret and implement the main interesting elements of the original work to adapt to the mobile platform environment. Palu can fight, breed, assist you with farm work, and work for you in factories.

"The Strongest Fighter" × The King of Fighters is officially authorized! All members of the classic fighter Q have been rejuvenated, and childhood idols such as Mai Shiranui and Kyo Kusanagi have reunited to take you back to the exciting days of arcades!

There is also a "no waste card in the card pool" setting, all fighters can be deeply developed; the placement method is easy to protect the liver, and you can create your own strongest lineup without a lot of operations. desc-751349:
"JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Ora Ola Ripple" is a strategy RPG based on the classic animation "JoJo's Bizarre Adventure", recreating the fierce battle scenes between Ripple and the avatar. Players can enjoy in-depth strategies through simple operations and embark on an adventure beyond destiny with JoJo characters from all generations. Game features 
Simple operation × in-depth strategy: 
Combat through the "OraOra Simulation" system, coupled with the automatic battle function, even novice players can easily experience the fierce fighting charm of the JoJo world. Characters from past generations × Comprehensive collection: 
From "Phantom Blood" to "Stone Sea", all the popular characters in the animation series appear. Whether they are the protagonist or the old enemy, they can become one of your combat strengths. Plot reproduction × Animation highlights: 
Completely contains the storylines of each JoJo animation, with encyclopedia functions and character relationship diagrams, allowing you to gain an in-depth understanding of the character's background and bond settings. Free team formation × Create the strongest lineup: 
You can freely match "friends" and "enemies" in the JoJo world to form an exclusive team and experience unique strategic combinations and bonding effects.
desc-503953: Dear brave men, we are finally here! Welcome all brave men to come to this new continent for adventure, make friends, create your own legend like all brave men do, and then break the ultimate mystery of this continent! Heroes of the Lost City is a 2D vertical version of the real-time RPG adventure game, but with a little more strategy, a little more thinking and a lot of excitement: every battle is not only a contest of force, but also a struggle of wits. Carefully choose partners to maximize team synergy; use real-time strategic instructions to engage in a swift and thoughtful duel with the enemy; think about skill combinations to unleash powerful burst attacks. In the end, you will reap a spectacular chain reaction and break through the enemy's defenses!
devnote-503953: Hello fellow brave men! As this game is open for testing and meets more and more people, please allow us to introduce this game and share our thoughts. The idea of ​​making this game actually stems from a very simple idea - we want to make a treasure-grabbing game that is "fun to use your brain". Many treasure farming games turn into pure numerical competition in the end, and strategy and operation are not important. This is not the game we want to make. We hope to truly integrate strategy and thinking into the victory or defeat of every battle. Carefully match the pet lineup to bring out the best synergy; issue strategic instructions in real time to engage in a swift and thoughtful showdown with the enemy; ponder the combination of skills, find the optimal solution, and penetrate the enemy's defense line - the feeling of pleasure at that moment can never be given by simply stacking data. The moment the strategy is in place, the feeling of pleasure is doubled. This is the direction the team has been honing countless nights. The current version of "The Brave Enters the Lost City" is not the perfect form in our minds, and we still have a lot of things we want to do. But we don’t want to work behind closed doors – we want to work with the brave men to build this continent better. Every piece of advice, every piece of feedback, and every word of complaint you have is precious to us. We are not a big company and our team is not big, but we have devoted all our passion to this game. If you are willing to give us a chance to step into this continent, meet partners, challenge the maze, and create your own legend - that will be our greatest encouragement. The horn of adventure has sounded, we are waiting for you at the entrance of the Lost City 🎺Let’s go together! ——The development team of "The Brave Enters the Lost City"
desc-809109: Enter the world of subway city and play the latest endless parkour game. Conquer new obstacles, challenge new heights, and collect new characters! Jack, Tricky, Fresh and Yutani will take you on a new adventure in the subway parkour city. Subway Parkour City brings arcade parkour missions with stunning visuals, new characters, exciting missions, and more. Start the game now and experience running like never before!
desc-157463:
"A Dance of Ice and Fire" - a difficult single-button rhythm game. two stars, 
a flame, 
A glacier. 
In a musical universe full of rhythm, 
Following the drumbeats and beats, 
entangled and circling each other, 
Like a pair of footsteps bound to each other, 
Lead the other person forward. Follow every beat button, 
Let the binary stars move forward along a line. Each line type has a corresponding melody. Encounter difficult challenges unexpectedly. This is a music game born for rhythm: listen carefully to the music and understand the game operations corresponding to different types of rhythms. This will allow you to master the game faster than pure visual feedback. This is a highly difficult rhythm game with strict judgments. If you are not sure whether this game is suitable for you, you can try the online trial version first. 
If you are an old player of the Rhythm Paradise series, congratulations, in this game you will have the opportunity to challenge music game levels of the same difficulty. Explore the music universe: Each galaxy corresponds to a completely different type of music. Follow the entangled binary stars to wander in a universe full of beautiful music. Predictable mechanics: You can predict the upcoming track tempo by recognizing the road ahead. The game does not rely on quick reactions, listen to the music, practice repeatedly, and master the operations to deal with different types of rhythms. Future music levels will be updated for free: We will continue to update more new levels after the game is released, and players who have already purchased the game do not need to pay again for these updates. But the price of the game may increase with updates. Remember to calibrate the game according to the different devices you use and your feel: you can calibrate manually at any time with the press of a button, or use our automatic calibration feature. As music creators, we know very well that out-of-sync tracks can greatly affect the experience of a music game, so this game adopts an extremely strict timing method.
devnote-766058:
"What would life be like on an island with good friends?" 
I sleep until I wake up naturally in the morning, watch dramas and play games at noon, surf and bask in the sun in the afternoon, and play guitar by the campfire in the evening. 
Regarding the ideal life, everyone may have a different answer. 
We want to share our ideal life with you, and we also want to know the ideal life in your heart. 
In the future, we will meet thousands of ideal lives on this small island. How many sparks will this create? It’s exciting just thinking about it! 
We hope that Youyoutang will become an ideal home in your pocket, 
Your friends live here, you have interesting shared memories in every corner, and you are always welcome to come back. 
We are a warm R&D team, making games with love, and want to touch the beautiful you~

desc-796088:
"Eternity, Stars and Everyday" is a text adventure game. You will play the role of an ordinary office worker named Lin Xiaomin, and start living together with two girls from another world who accidentally break into your home. In this relaxed and joyful daily life, can everyone find happiness that belongs to them? ▌Story Introduction "In this world, there are things you can't do but can do, and there are things you can do but shouldn't do." When the elegant vampire and the reckless witch suddenly break into your peaceful life, as an ordinary person, how should you get along with them? 
During the short but precious cohabitation, you will live a joyful, interesting and unexpected life with them. 
Whether it's going out shopping, playing games together, or sharing each other's thoughts late at night, every moment quietly brings you closer together. 
You gradually get to know each other - seemingly completely different life trajectories are intertwined because of this unexpected encounter. 
You feel the warmth of home, but you also have to face the test of life span gap and real pressure. 
Every choice you make will affect the development of the story, ultimately leading to four completely different endings. Will you risk eternal life and become their partner? 
Or should we cherish the present and protect the agreement that belongs to each other in a short time? 
It's all up to you to decide. ▌Basic information script: 30,000 words

"Lost Star Ring" is an American comic-style card placement RPG mobile game. After the living universe was invaded by an unknown race, the civilization led by the Federation of Technology galaxies united with the civilized races of other galaxies to rebuild the cosmic ecology. As time has passed, a new round of disasters is about to return, and you will lead the heroes of all races on a sci-fi adventure to fight against the unknown races and save the universe! ——Game Features—— 
【Collect featured heroes】 
Classic American comic style, colorful race settings, and hundreds of epic heroes. During the adventure in the sea of ​​stars, collect your favorite hero characters, develop them easily, and your combat power will soar! 
【Explore the interstellar world】 
The vast background of the galaxy will take you to experience the sci-fi romance unique to the universe. The unique level design and various challenges will give you a different interstellar journey! 
【Enjoy various battles】 
Change the traditional layer-by-layer tower climbing mode, the battle process can be placed freely, you can play freely in your spare time, relax and easy to get started, and refuse to work for cirrhosis of the liver! 
【Cultivation of powerful monsters】 
Cultivate powerful monsters, assemble your own super lineup, use strategies flexibly, find weaknesses, easily reverse the deadlock, and defeat powerful enemies in one fell swoop! 
【Strategy Guild Battlefield】 
Join a guild to make friends around the world, join hands with guild companions to compete for energy resources, use careful strategies to compete in wisdom and strength, and resist the invasion of the multiverse!
desc-815120:
People choose to climb a mountain for different reasons. 
Some people want to leave their worries in the mountain breeze, some people want to see the sea of ​​clouds for old friends who cannot reach them, and some people just want to leave their worries in the mountain breeze. But in "Cute Friends Mountaineering Team", the best reason is - someone to accompany you. 
This is a healing multiplayer cooperative mountain climbing game. You will play the role of a cute little animal and climb over cliffs, walk through rainforests, and conquer snowy peaks with your friends... You will meet, accompany each other, and climb to the top of mountains with different styles. 
Unclimbable rock wall? Give your teammates a hand. Platform just out of reach? Step on your partner to build a personal ladder. You always find your own way. The scenery at the top of the mountain is beautiful, but the best scenery is the moment you arrive with your friends. 
When we were tired of climbing, we returned to the camp at the foot of the mountain. The bonfire has been lit, the starry sky is above your head, and your little nest is waiting for you to come back. 
There is adventure on the mountain and life below. Pack your bags and let's set off together. 【Game Features】 
Healing Adventure: Play as various cute little animals and embark on a warm mountain climbing journey. More friends are on the way! 
Real physical interaction: pull, hold, build a personal ladder... every cooperation is full of laughter and surprises. 
Multi-player teaming: Match with friends or enter the room code to form a team, no matter how high the mountain is, you are not afraid. 
Multiple routes: Each mountain hides different routes and scenery. Cliffs, rainforests, snow-capped mountains...more wonderful peaks are constantly unlocked. 
Warm Camp: After climbing the mountain, return to your own camp and relax with your friends by the campfire.
devnote-710765:
Dear Legion Commanders, 
It's a pleasure to meet you all here again. Due to some reasons, "Lost Star Ring" was temporarily removed from the shelves on TapTap, which made many friends who liked it feel confused and disappointed. We have always kept it in our hearts, and we always feel that we owe you a solemn apology. Now that the game is on the shelves again, the familiar plot and characters—those things we once enjoyed together—are still there. This is our original connection with you. This time around, we have added some new benefits while retaining the core experience. This is a little bit of our thoughts - we hope that our friends can have a more relaxed start when we start again. We know that trust takes a long time to build. So this time we launch it, we don’t dare to make big claims, we just want to slowly prove ourselves with longer-term companionship and more sincere operations. If you have any ideas or suggestions, please tell us in the comment area. We will read every one of them carefully. Thank you again for your willingness to give us a second chance. Welcome back and welcome new friends.
devnote-815120:
Hi, thank you for clicking "Cute Friends Mountaineering Team"! 
We are a small team. We created this game because we like climbing mountains, furry animals, and being with friends. We want to create a place where you can climb mountains with friends, look at the scenery, sit by the campfire and feel some simple happiness in your busy life. 
Frankly speaking, the current version is still very early, the content is not rich enough, and many places are not perfect yet. But we want to bring it to you first, because rather than polishing it behind closed doors, we want to hear your voice - what do you think is fun, what is not fun, and what else you want to see. These are all particularly important to us. 
Next, we will continue to update: more mountains with different styles, more cute animal companions, richer home gameplay, and many other things that we are already imagining but haven’t had time to tell you yet. We will carefully review every feedback and strive to do better with every version. 
This mountain is very high and we are climbing up. Thank you for your willingness to set off with us.

Well done to me, Lao Guo, ACE 2.0 is here! 
I had liver disease for more than a month. I have set a flag for everyone before and put it out. Let me introduce you: 
1. First, add the work square. From now on, everyone no longer has to release their inspiration alone. The works they create can be posted to the square, and they can also like and comment to communicate with each other. 
2. The image has been upgraded, the original painting no longer stretches the crotch, Xiaoye Xiaomo has become more beautiful, and the excellent artist DM Baomiao was hired to draw it (Xiao Ai is still bald because there is no budget for the time being. I am saving money, and it will be done soon) 
3. Added audio game mode, please pay attention! The audio game mode will be different from ordinary audio games! ! First of all, it corresponds to the key and the sound. Secondly, the singer will sing only when the note is clicked, and if you click on the note earlier or later, the song will be finished earlier and later. The purpose is to let everyone learn to play the singer through this method and become familiar with the feeling of singing and creating the song. And get a feel for other players’ work.

The big version update that has been awaited for a while is here! You can pause, rewind, and pinch out, and feel the "mobile version of V family" ACE~~ I hope everyone likes it. 
Because the changes in this version are very large, if you encounter bugs, please feel free to report them via QQ: 138906241 
======= (I am the pigeon line)====== Good luck to me, Guo: ACE is about to start testing (April 22)~ The tension of the production team can be described as "a lot of panic"... Because we know that ACE will be more unique (strange). It is not a music game in the general sense, but also different from previous virtual singer games (such as Muta), and professional virtual singer editors such as V Family. There is really no type on the market that can be used as a reference~ Although we ourselves (and the old guys who have followed since the closed beta) think ACE is very fun, I am worried that everyone who is eager to look forward to it will find that ACE may be different from what you expected~ Here I would like to explain a few issues first to adjust everyone's expectations for ACE~ 1. ACE is a little difficult to get started, and may not be as easy as it seems~ 
Although "swipe your fingers to sing" seems simple, if you want to create a melody that suits your heart, it is best to turn on the "key display" and "free mode". At this time, you will find a new world where you can more accurately control the melody you want to "play", and you can play with pitch, portamento, etc. 
However, because the focus of ACE is "creation", just like "Minecraft" does not provide a blueprint for a specific style of building, allowing players to build a house according to the blueprint, ACE does not provide "music scores" for specific songs, or "click prompts" like music games. Some students are used to "where is the highlight, where is the highlight", and may be a little confused when starting ACE~ 
But it doesn’t matter. Here I suggest you first find a BGM, fill in the lyrics of a familiar ancient poem, and then follow the rhythm of the BGM, imagine that you can really play the piano and compose music, and follow your free trial. As a result, you will find that you can actually "play music." 
The principle here is that ACE provides a "scale" that matches the BGM. No matter which note you click, it is basically harmonious. All you need to care about is whether you want a faster rhythm or a slower rhythm, a higher pitch or a lower pitch. Don't worry about hitting a specific note accurately. 2.What is the difference between ACE and other music games in general? 
The essence of most music games is that "music drives the player's actions." 
Players press specific keys at specific times according to the rhythm of the music and click prompts, and are scored based on the accuracy of the clicks. This kind of gameplay allows players to experience the pleasure of "as if they are playing music". 
But ACE is actually "the player's operation drives the music." 
Clicking and sliding on the screen are really "playing" the little singer. Compared with a game, ACE will be more like a "vocal instrument" and is designed to allow ordinary people to quickly learn it and use it to compose songs. 
Therefore, when playing ACE, it is not like "playing a music game", but more like "playing music". 
If ACE is fun, it will be because the music itself is fun, and the high degree of freedom in creation itself is fun. But correspondingly, this will also bring some discomfort when getting started ~ 3. What is the difference between ACE and Muta's family (Yan tide, please come back soon) and Pocket Diva? 
The core gameplay of Muta and Pocket Diva is "lyric writing", which is to adapt the lyrics of existing songs; while the gameplay of ACE is to create lyrics and music at the same time, which will pay more attention to the creation of melody. 
The advantage of the lyric writing method is that it is easy to get started, which is great, but I think that just adapting lyrics will not bring more songs to the world. And I think that for most people who have never studied music, it is a cool thing for them to be able to "compose" one day~ 
Therefore, ACE will pay more attention to the creation of melody, or in other words, the creation of lyrics and music at the same time. Therefore, it may be a bit uncomfortable for players who only want to write lyrics~ 4. What is the difference between ACE and editors like V? In other words, there is already such a professional editor as V, why should we use ACE? 
The standard answer to this question is that editors like V are too professional, expensive and complicated, while ACE is simple to play and can be opened anytime and anywhere~ 
Indeed, this is the fundamental difference between a mobile game and a professional-grade vocal synthesis engine. 
But apart from that, I have some different ideas. I think the main purpose of a singing voice synthesis engine like V is to "synthesize singing voices" rather than "create songs." In most cases, after "the rough melody of the song has been created", a singing voice synthesis engine is used to write the "melody" into it, and then the singing voice is played out. 
But how was this "rough melody" created? Generally, musicians will first use the keyboard to improvise along with the accompaniment, look for "motivation" and "inspiration", record and modify while playing, and finally create a melody. In fact, this kind of creative process is more intuitive. We follow the music and find the inspiration of the melody with our fingers. The design idea of ​​ACE is to restore this creative process~ Although I have written so much seriously, there is only one core idea, which is to hope that ACE can become a game that "helps people who have never studied music to create songs anytime and anywhere and express themselves through music"~ Because we believe that everyone has musical inspiration hidden in his heart, but there is a lack of good ways to help him discover it~ There are still many areas in ACE that have not been perfected. What do you want to do next? 1. Make the core "making music" good enough. 
It is possible to pause and rewind during creation, and to fine-tune the recorded content. It is indeed a bit demanding to complete a 3-minute song in one go without making mistakes; 
Implement diatonic scale + import BGM, support 12 key scales and a wider range, which can make the creative space larger; 
Achieve secondary rendering of the singing voice, or one-click tone modification. After recording the song, click one-click tone modification to re-render the singing voice to make the singing voice more natural and real; 
Make an AI automatic composition system to provide everyone with endless accompaniment. 2. To be a community that publishes and exchanges works. 
Let dalao have a place to display his works, and newcomers also have goals to learn from; 
You can collaborate (you write the lyrics and I will compose the music), secondary creation (change the words to the boss’s god-level melody), etc. 3. Add Japanese and English singers, as well as male singers (singers?). 4. Integrating the gameplay of "reading music and playing" means that it can not only be "original" but also "cover". 3. More personal content. For example, you can make your own singer (pinch people, import your own live 2D model, change clothes, import your own sound source, change the background, etc.), for example, you can control the singer's dance movements (imagination: enter emoji in the lyrics, such as 😁, and the singer will cheer and dance when you click on it). 4. More real-time social gameplay, such as The Voice of Diva, where all the singers get together, take turns singing songs on stage, and the audience votes; the singer band can not only sing, but also play the piano and drums, and play in a band together. So many flags were set up at once. Although it sounds like nonsense, in fact, the purpose of these functions is the same. They all allow everyone to use the digital avatar of a virtual singer to enter a virtual music world, where everyone can (and has the ability) to create music, release albums, hold concerts, play music with good friends, etc. It will be a wonderful thing ~ End. At 1 a.m. on April 20, Haidian, Beijing, 
A 24-year-old young man named Guo who is over 50 years old (already bald)
