devnote-825852:
This game is permanently free! There are no ads forever! It will be updated synchronously with the Steam Demo version. The game is currently in the early stages of testing. 
Values and game experience will be continuously adjusted based on player feedback. 
Welcome everyone to try and give feedback 
Each of your opinions may have a permanent impact. The author of this work is a Potato Brothers enthusiast and a survivor-like game enthusiast. 
But compared to Vampire Survivor, I prefer Potato, a gameplay that is very easy and requires some thinking. 
But after playing more, I always feel that the depth limit is still almost meaningless. 
Once a character clears Difficulty 5, the interest in playing this character again will be greatly reduced. 
I recently played the new dlc again and felt that there was something wrong with the numerical design and that the balance of the original version was somewhat lost. 
I don’t want to touch it anymore, but after I came into contact with potatoes, I became very interested in this kind of gameplay. 
So I have an idea, can I make a survivor game that expands in depth? 
It not only retains rich attribute linkages, but also ensures the same relaxation and leisure as survivors. 
So I made such a game and talked about the design ideas 
Compared to other survivor games 
In terms of in-depth expansion, I mainly did three aspects. First, the most important, I added talents that can change the gameplay, and the mechanism is similar to other game talismans. 
I kept the differentiated character design like the Potato Brothers 
And on this basis, a large number of talents that change the gameplay have been added. 
This will cause the strength of the same talent to have a wonderful chemical reaction in the hands of different characters. 
As a result, the playability of a character is greatly improved. 
I can combine a character with different talents to play several ways 
The playability is greatly improved. Live to win? You can win if you brush enough values. 
That would be a bit boring for rouge. 
In order to ensure that there is always a sense of challenge, I designed a special talent growth mechanism. 
If you can pass the difficulty, your talent level will take off and directly catch up with the difficulty of keeping up with you. 
However, if you repeatedly gain experience through low liver difficulty maps, your talent experience will increase very slowly. 
But the liver experience is not completely written down, mainly to reduce the frustration of consecutive failures. 
At least the character still improves after failing, but it's not as full as other games. 
This design is to maintain the difficulty curve and always keep it within a reasonable range. 
Encourage adjustments to the combination of talents by finding new construction ideas to break the situation and match this talent upgrade system. 
It is a highly customizable difficulty module with only one main difficulty required. 
Other difficulty modules are optional 
You have to consider which module is easiest for your genre and has a high enough experience multiplier. 
(For some characters with only one equipment slot, reducing the equipment slot again is not a penalty.) This successfully builds a new gameplay loop: 
Build talents and challenge higher difficulty levels. Unlock more talents and challenge higher difficulty levels. 
Successfully retained the challenge and fun in each time period of the game. Secondly, the equipment positioning was deeply expanded. 
I differentiated their damage patterns, growth curves, and whether they are functional. 
There are some early-stage weapons that are used for excessive early-stage use. They are cheap and easy to use, but lack stamina. 
The later weapons, without exception, require precious resource BOSS treasure chests to upgrade. At the same time, due to rarity, subsequent upgrades are even rarer. 
Weapons are also divided into multiple modes such as monster clearing, single-target melee, long-range, attribute-added, and control. 
The advantage of this is that the degree of freedom in equipment design is greatly improved. 
I can easily make highly distinguishable weapons 
And there are many high-definition weapons 
The choice of weapons in the game becomes more interesting. Third, the trade-off between survival and development, the BOSS treasure chest that can evolve over time. 
It turns out that I was thinking about it when I played vampire and waited until the weapons were fully leveled before eating treasure chests to evolve. 
It would be great if the longer I waited, the greater the benefits I would gain. 
So I made the boss chest upgradeable by waiting 
The boss chest is upgraded every four minutes and can be upgraded twice. 
My game time is limited to 999S 
It basically takes half the game time to get a full-level box 
Then you need to think carefully about how to survive these eight minutes. 
At the same time, the boss treasure chest is linked to talents and equipment. 
Level 5 equipment requires level 1 and 2 treasure chests to upgrade. 
The top level 6 equipment requires level 3 treasure chests to upgrade. 
Some talents can affect the upgrade time of the BOSS treasure chest to compete for the rhythm. This is the most important three aspects of expansion. 
No matter what aspect, you need to think more 
But I intentionally limit these brain-burning decision points to keep the Survivor game light and fun. 
The most brain-burning talent and difficulty module selection, no need to think in the game 
The number of choices between equipment and boss treasure chests is limited. 
For most of the properties of the props, I kept them as relaxed as the Potato Brothers. 
Mainly designed with balance and fun in mind 
Of course there is linkage, but the decision won’t be tiring. 
It would be difficult to come up with the optimal solution unless the previous three points are intertwined. 
The tightness should be moderate, but I am also worried that with so much expansion in depth, might it be a bit too innovative?
desc-227296:
"Auto Mechanic 2021" is another new chapter in the game series based on the good foundation that already has a large number of players. Players start as a small owner of a new auto repair shop, and through your continuous efforts, you build a huge empire serving customers. In an immersive, ultra-realistic simulation, use your oily hands to perform every incredible and realistic detail. Get ready for service with over 4,000 unique parts and over 72 luxury cars. Roll up your sleeves and immerse yourself in a hyper-realistic workshop environment. Continuously expand your service offerings by investing in new workshops and equipment. Repair, restore, test, paint, tune and reassemble those great cars. Participate in more new auction house events and buy cars in various conditions. If you're feeling lucky, you can also try looking for them in the barn. There may be hidden treasures in some places - waiting for you to discover them. The unlimited number of orders you can generate is sure to keep you busy for a while. If you want to take on a greater challenge - you can try yourself in a specially developed storyline. What you'll need to face in each mission is a unique set of requirements and challenges. After you complete the upgrade of the workshop, you can gradually consider the luxury car plan. Use your hard-earned money to buy your own car and make it shine in your hands. Transform from a rusty car shell into a dazzling top-end luxury car. It’s time to dip your hands in a pile of motor oil! Product Features 
72 vehicles to be repaired 
More than 4,000 parts 
Unlimited randomly generated orders 
vehicle auction 
barn find 
Junkyard Hunting 
Hand-designed story missions 
Skill and garage upgrade system 
vehicle tuning 
Comprehensive game guide 
Track with time trial 
New version of Auto Mechanic Simulator 2021 
vehicle fluids 
New vehicle descaling and cleaning equipment 
Spacious open garage 
New Body Damage - Dent 
Paintable Mechanical Auto Parts 
new engine sounds 
mini games 
brake lathe tools 
Quality upgrade system 
fuse box 
new parking system 
salvage auction 
Corrected parts inspection mode 
Visualized custom body parts 
vehicle configurator 
rusty bolts 
Game introduction: 
Use your way to build an empire of customer service. Pay attention to every detail with oily hands in this highly immersive simulation game. Participate in the new auction house and buy cars in a variety of conditions. By investing in new workshops and equipment, your service range can continue to expand.
desc-842728:
"Xianni: Fighting the Way of Heaven" is the first officially authorized mobile game of Xianni meat pigeon tower defense. The game reproduces the original plot and integrates random adventures and strategic tower defense gameplay, allowing you to start a new adventure in the familiar world of Xianni. 
Here, you can call on familiar monks, use the innovative "bond" gameplay, flexibly match, build your own tactical lineup, and experience the strategic fun of continuous advancement. Every time you start, you will encounter different adventures and challenges. 
There is no need to set aside a large amount of time, you can play a game while waiting for the bus and resting. You are both a leisurely observer of the painting, and also a layout maker - in the relaxed and colorful rhythm, you are embarking on your own path of reverse cultivation.
desc-726271: "Rainbow Six" is a tactical PVP shooting game developed by Ubisoft and represented by Tencent. Players play the role of elite operators of the most high-end special forces "Rainbow Squad" in the game. Each operator has unique abilities and participates with other players in 5v5 indoor offensive and defensive competitions and other combat missions.
desc-768956: "Mechanical Origin" is a post-apocalyptic mechanical beast survival game that combines free construction and competitive confrontation. The game creatively designs a "dual world" structure inside and outside the game. Players can choose a high-risk and high-confrontation war zone world and exchange risks for scarce supplies; at the same time, it retains a completely safe personal base world where players can obtain basic resources to meet basic survival needs. All resources collected in the war zone can be sent back to the base world and traded in the market to be converted into wealth, which can be used to upgrade equipment, reserve supplies and strengthen construction. At the same time, players can configure tactical equipment, reserve consumables, and optimize battle configurations in the safe base world in advance to prepare for the departure of the war zone. The entire internal and external structure gives the game greater strategic depth and freedom of survival. You can choose to cooperate with teammates, search for scarce resources in the vast world, super-control various mechanical beasts, or engage in exciting competitions and transactions with other players.
devnote-768956:
Hello everyone, we are the development team of "Mecha Generator". Like everyone, we love open world survival and confrontation games very much. Our goal is to create a full-platform mechanical beast survival game with free construction, survival confrontation, and exploration and gold search as the core elements, presenting players with a game world full of challenges and excitement. 
The mechanical beasts of different shapes wandering around the map will serve as your best support, accompanying you and protecting you in your exploration. Remember, no matter which way you fight, there is always only one ultimate goal: to keep all the loot for yourself! 
In terms of the world view of the game, we have built a doomsday world where the awakening and mutation of artificial intelligence have led to a full-scale outbreak of nano-virus, the erosion of human beings, and the alienation of machinery. The art style of light science fiction in the near future will carry our imagination of various light science fiction gameplay settings such as mechanical dynamics, firearms and weapon characteristics, virtual imaging technology, and energy technology.
desc-186932:
Demon Slayer VS Oni 
A life-and-death fight begins! The game type is asymmetrical combat competitive action. It is a multiplayer game in which players are divided into demon slayers and demon camps to compete. 
The Demon Slayer Team must help each other with its teammates with the goal of killing demons. 
The ghosts need to hunt down the members of the Ghost Slaying Team. On a map that reproduces the original world view, use skills and weapons to start a duel between ghost hunters and cannibals! Fight for the opposite fate!
desc-823582:
Still playing old-school tower defense? Try the refreshing feeling of "synthetic + meat pigeon"! "Kingdom Clash: Frontline" is a real-time strategy synthesis tower defense mobile game with summon synthesis as its core innovation. As the guardian of the kingdom, you will embark on an epic journey. By recruiting heroes with different abilities, cleverly combining pigeon cards in battle, you will experience the refreshing grass-cutting feeling brought by hero synthesis and brawling, and enjoy the endless fun of the pigeon tower defense game. ⚔ Core innovation: "Summon synthesis" at your fingertips, defining a new way of playing tower defense 
Say goodbye to boring fixed upgrades! This game is the first to introduce the core mechanism of "random summon synthesis", giving each hero unlimited evolution possibilities. Every synthesis is an unknown game. The growth within the game is full of Roguelike-style variables, making every game of your defense unique. 🎲Strategy without boundaries: Roguelike random events, you can turn the tables even in desperate situations 
No two campaigns are exactly the same! On your journey deep into the forest, across the mountains, and across the wasteland, you will face a dynamically changing battlefield: Should you choose to strengthen your existing defenses, or take a gamble on synthesizing legendary reinforcements? Facing waves of monsters, adjust tactics in real time based on randomly synthesized hero and skill cards. Fire and rain wash the ground? An army of elves is approaching? Or use the terrain to create special traps? It's all up to you to decide instantly! 🎨 Classic reappearance: familiar game style, the ultimate audio-visual feast 
Continuing the aesthetic genes of classic tower defense, the delicate hand-painted scenes restore the grand world view. From the lush and quiet forest to the desolate and tragic ancient wasteland, every scene records the story of your growth and transformation. In the exciting game, witness your synthetic army crush the enemy forces into powder! 🌟 Differentiated development: collect heroes and customize your own legion 
In addition to the refreshing synthesis within the game, there is also an in-depth character collection system outside the game. Recruit necromancers, fallen angels and human knights with different personalities to develop exclusive talents. Use your favorite lineup to conquer those seemingly impossible levels! 🔥 Lord, the fate of the kingdom lies in your hands! 
Stop repeating the monotonous placement and experience the trio of "synthesis + meat pigeon + strategy"! 
Follow us to start your journey of summon synthesis and create unlimited possibilities in Kingdom Come: Frontline!
devnote-823582:
To all lords: 
Hello, fellow lords! Our original intention of creating this game stems from a wonderful imagination. If we combine traditional path tower defense with random synthesis of meat pigeons, so that the tower defense game can also have the joy of meat pigeon RPG, what kind of collision will it be? So "Kingdom Confrontation: Frontline" came into being. We hope to build it into a "happy stronghold" that not only allows you to immerse yourself in the intelligent game of tower defense strategy, but also allows you to easily decompress. I hope it can become a "safe haven" in your busy life, allowing you to temporarily escape from the suffocating "steel forest" and "KPI anxiety" during your commute, between classes, and after work, and find the purest gaming fun. Now, it has come to you with its nascent childishness. We know very well that it is not perfect yet, and those hidden flaws and corners that need to be polished are like small bumps in the road of growth. But we promise that we will carve it out with the greatest enthusiasm and patience. I implore you to tolerate its youthfulness, and I look forward to your sharing with us every heartbeat and suggestion you have - your voice is the most precious starlight on our journey forward, guiding us to a better shore together. Sincerely, the development team of "Kingdom Clash: Frontline"
desc-221775:
Kind and enthusiastic residents, a prosperous and happy town, and a long-abandoned ranch are waiting for its new owner. I hope that when you and your companions open up new pastures in the future, you can still recall the old times of holding puppies and riding horses. 
Game features: 
1. Slow-paced ranch life 
Players can freely choose to spend time by farming, fishing, picking up, shopping, etc. There will be no mandatory behavioral requirements and they can freely experience ranch life. 
2. Free farming 
With a large initial cultivated land area, you can freely choose the location and area of the cultivated land. There are different crop seeds to choose from in different seasons, so pay attention to planting in season. 
3. Animal module 
Currently, in the animal system, dogs, horses, chickens, cows, and sheep can be raised and fed. You can name the animals you raise and have corresponding outputs. Regarding animal riding and skin systems, they are still in progress and will be followed up in subsequent versions. 
4. Rich NPC experience 
NPCs will have their own behavior patterns, and they will change due to different situations, which will also bring about changes in the character's dialogue and other content. The benchmarks here include Sanzi Village, Animal Crossing and other products. It is expected to be completed in the second half of 2024. 
5. Elf module 
Farm life is always tiring, and you can use elves to help you, such as watering and harvesting. The abilities of elves can be improved by increasing their favorability and cultivating their abilities. 
6. Friends connection 
Players can go to other people's pastures to help, helping others with reclamation, watering, harvesting and other operations. 
[In the current version planning, the offline access function has not been developed] 
7. Ranch Decor 
You can collect ores and other resources to make decorations and put them into the ranch for decoration.
devnote-221775:
The Ranch Breath Project is a project based on the gameplay prototype of Ranch Story Ore Town. 
This is my first time making a game of this type, so I lack experience and many problems are being gradually solved. The second half of the year is mainly about enriching the gameplay content and advancing the scenes in the game, as well as various UI iterations and bug fixes. 
Project progress: 
2021-8 first test; 
2022-1 Second Test; 
2023-10 third test; 
2024-2 Fourth Test 
2024-6 Fifth Test 
2024-11 Sixth Test 
July 2025 The seventh test! 
The overall project team plans to basically complete the content in September 2025 and launch a non-deleted test version. 
It is expected that it will take 5-8 months to polish the content and then officially launch it. 
Never give up, the team will work hard to complete the project 0.0 
Love you all, thank you to all the players who like our games, thank you!
desc-830294: "Canlong Mahjong" is a two-dimensional cyber-style casual mahjong game created by Canlong Interactive Entertainment for mahjong lovers. In a futuristic virtual cyber world, the game combines traditional Chinese mahjong culture with a cool two-dimensional style, bringing players a unique quintessence of Chinese experience. They can experience a new interpretation of traditional culture on the card table where neon lights and technology intertwine.
devnote-830294: Dear owner! I am Afan, and to be honest, the starting point of this project is a bit "unprofessional" - because I am a deep mahjong addict. If you can’t get enough of it offline and can’t find the right one online, you might as well make one yourself. So, Canlong Interactive Entertainment, a group of guys who also love playing cards, listening to cards, and playing cards, got together and spent countless nights to type this love into lines of code. We pieced together "Canlong Mahjong". Of course, the game is currently produced based on our imagination of mahjong, so there will inevitably be some unsatisfactory aspects. However, players who are familiar with us know that the biggest advantage of Canlong Interactive Entertainment is to listen to advice. You are welcome to correct any shortcomings. Let me briefly introduce this product to you: "Canlong Mahjong" is a two-dimensional cyber-style casual mahjong game. You may want to ask, how do cyber style and mahjong go together? To put it simply, the card table is suspended in the neon urban night sky, the special effects are a bit cool like holographic projection, and the characters are the kind of two-dimensional painting style that can be salty or sweet, and comes with its own emoticons. But at the core, we focus on the fun of the game - the refreshing feeling of eating bangbanghu, so that you can also touch the fireworks of traditional Chinese culture on the virtual card table. Regarding the gameplay, in the early days of the game’s launch, only one rule was introduced, which is also the most classic and exciting one - Sichuan Mahjong bloody battle to the end. In addition to ordinary room games, the early version of the game also added a ranking match: the rankings will match similar ranks, and the four players will add or subtract rank points based on the win-loss multiplier. The current ranks are divided from Silver to King. Upgrade to unlock rewards, purely technical battles, no props. We promise: We will not sell any props that affect your winning rate. There are no "must-win tricks", no "card changers", and no "see-through glasses". Winning or losing all depends on your card recording, card counting, psychological game, and a little bit of luck. We have also struggled with profitability for a long time. In the end, it was decided to only sell three things: bean booster packs, skins, and character unlocks. Beans are admission tickets, and free beans will be given out every day. If you lose all, you can wait for recovery or watch ads. The supplement pack is just a shortcut for players who can't wait. Skins and characters are purely for appearance - card table skins, special effects skins, and two-dimensional characters with different personalities, which do not affect any card luck or attributes. We promise: We don’t sell numerical values, we don’t sell “guaranteed winning props”, winning or losing all depends on skill and luck. In addition, I want to tell you something important: We will update the mahjong gameplay from time to time in response to player requests. Do you want a bloody battle between Kawasaki and Ma? Or is it Guangma’s trick? Or some niche local rule? Go to the TAPTAP comment area and leave a message. We will count the most popular gameplays every week and then schedule them to be implemented. After the game is launched, a new rule will be implemented regularly so that you will never get tired of playing it. Finally, say something from your heart. Whether you can make money by making this game comes second. The first is whether it can allow people who really love mahjong to have a "cyber hometown". "Chanlong Mahjong" will soon open for reservations at TAPTAP. If you also like the crisp sound of touching cards, the brainstorming when counting cards, and the urge to slap the table after playing cards - please give us a chance to make an appointment. You are also welcome to criticize us. As long as the criticism is correct, we will correct it overnight. May your fortune always be as bright as a dragon. ——Afan & all the “Mahjong Brains” of Canlong Interactive Entertainment
devnote-842728:
A letter home to all fellow Taoists 
Fellow Taoists, Zhan Xinjia. 
We are the development team of "Xian Ni: Battle of Heaven". Without our status as developers, we are actually just a group of old bookworms who have stayed up all night long because of the fate of Wang Lin, a stubborn young man, in the bizarre world written by Er Gen. 
We wrote this letter several times, deleting, editing, and revising it. Not because of lack of words, but because of awe. 
Do you remember the numbness of your scalp when you saw "Being obedient is a mortal, and going against the will is an immortal, just in a thought in your mind"? Do you still remember how Li Muwan's words "Wang Lin, I don't blame you" before disappearing made us burst into tears and choked with words? 
Wang Lin's arrogance, Situ Nan's wildness, Zhou Yi's infatuation, Tianyunzi's weirdness...these names have never been cold code names, but old friends who have accompanied us through those green years. 
It is precisely because we understand this heaviness that we dare not slack off even a little bit. 
People in the world only know that they seek immortality through cultivation, but they don’t know that most of them are just pawns on the chessboard of heaven. What we want to do is the ‘Heavenly Inverse Pearl’ that can reverse cause and effect and jump out of the chess game. In this world of cultivation, what we want to create is not another work on the assembly line, but a real world that can carry the heart of fellow Taoists that "if you go against the grain, you will become immortal." " 
What we want to do is not a product that can be exchanged for money, but a practice that is "worthy of the word 'reverse'". We want you to feel Wang Lin's unwillingness and persistence from an ant to the sky the moment your fingertips touch the screen, and experience the difficulty of crossing the cycle of life and death. 
In this world of cultivation, we don’t want you to be just a lonely passerby. I hope that in "Immortal Rebellion: Fighting the Way of Heaven", you can reunite with your old friends, step into the unknown territory side by side, change your fate against the will of heaven in every decision, and jointly write a legend of cultivation that belongs to everyone. 
Fight the way of heaven in reincarnation, and find the true self in obsession. 
Waiting for you to enter the game, the immortal will reverse the world and continue the relationship.
desc-639165:
"Edge Planet" is a development simulation business game. In an unknown galaxy, you will serve as a pioneer and build your own interstellar base in the universe. Lead your adventure team to explore new planets in the universe, defeat alien creatures, pick up materials and turn waste into treasure, make friends, discover adventures, and join in an unprecedented exploration journey together! Game features 
【Create a cosmic home】 
Gradually build your interstellar base station from the edge of the desolate planet, produce and process to enrich your cosmic materials, and make your cosmic home the coolest place to check in. 
【Explore alien adventures】 
Lead your partners on a thrilling alien adventure. The power of scavenging cannot be underestimated. While obtaining resources, you will also trigger various wonderful adventures. 
【Get a powerful partner】 
Lone Star Exploration But you are not alone. Go to the planet signal station to transmit cosmic electromagnetic waves and invite capable partners to join your team. You will never be alone on your adventure. 
【Immerse yourself in VR fantasy】 
Make full use of the power of technology, immerse yourself in the VR fantasy world and break through the levels. There is no conflict between real-life exploration and simulated combat, and you can easily realize the universe version of resource accelerator.
devnote-639165:
Please note - there is an unknown planet ahead! 
As someone who is keen on all kinds of business simulation and infrastructure games, after experiencing mobile games with various themes, I can't help but think - I have played the ones with the theme of cultivating immortals, and I have experienced the ones with the modern theme of opening a store. Some people are fed up with the daily working and management of the industry on the earth. Why do people work on the earth, and games also have to work on the earth! I thought about going to the universe to see it, so I began to conceive of a business simulation infrastructure game based on an interstellar theme, named "Edge Planet". 
Why is the game called "Edge Planet"? As the name suggests, the protagonist of the game finds a deserted land from the distant edge of the interstellar world. From here, the infrastructure construction process from 0 to 1 begins. As he slowly watches his planet gradually become shining and vivid, a sense of accomplishment will emerge in his heart. 
In the game, you can slowly beautify your interstellar base, and you can also lead your team to explore different planet scenery and gain some interesting adventures. I hope that in the distant universe, you can slow down the pace of life and experience a game experience that is different from that on earth. 
Finally, we sincerely hope that "Edge Planet" can become a shining star in your hearts, accompanying you to explore the unknown interstellar world and experience the joy of adventure and achievement!
desc-235696: "Bond" is a 2D side-scrolling pixel style game. It tells the story of a protagonist who is frustrated in life in the real world. He travels back to his childhood by accident, in order to relive his past life and make up for his past regrets. You will once again dominate your childhood as the protagonist, experience the joy and tears of the 1990s, relive the things you miss, or realize your unfinished wishes. You can play until dawn in the arcade without worrying about the constraints of your parents; go through the college entrance examination again and choose your life again; experience the missing childhood, this time, your parents will accompany you to grow up; you can even travel back in time to textbooks, chat and laugh with the ancients, and compete with mathematicians. Come on a grand magical journey.
devnote-235696:
Hello everyone, I am the developer of Fetters. For most people, childhood should be the most precious time in their lives. Everything in childhood is so pure and innocent. I can always think of my childhood summers, the time I spent playing with my friends in the yard in front of my house. When we were children, we were always full of fantasies and expectations for the future, as if nothing was impossible to achieve. However, as we rush through one spring and autumn after another, we suddenly find that we are no longer the carefree and playful children we used to be. Childhood is like a video tape, carefully placed in the most precious place in our hearts. Unfortunately, this tape has become increasingly blurry with age... 
I really want to go back to my childhood again, to that pure, carefree time, so I made this game. This is my childhood video. I hope it can also bring back the feelings you once felt. --R.J.
desc-189932:
"I Am a Navigator" is a stand-alone game with a navigation theme. Our goal is to do our best to restore that magnificent era of navigation. [Seamless Map: Around the World Sailing Adventure] 
Changes in the weather, the ups and downs of the waves, and the random appearance of whirlpools and tornadoes in the ocean, U3D will bring a more realistic sailing experience. Malnutrition, sepsis, homesickness, fire, rodent infestation and other special conditions encountered during the voyage require players to deal with them in time. [Global trade: free trade in 180 ports to build a maritime business empire] 
180 ports around the world are available for players to trade freely. You can also invest in and develop the port, and the investment will bring more inventory and new goods. [Legends Side by Side: Writing a New Era of Navigation] 
How can we sail on the sea without companions! Columbus, Edward Teach, Jack, and many legendary celebrities from the Age of Discovery are waiting for players to recruit, and the right position will allow partners to play a greater role. [Domination of the Seven Seas: Obtain historical ships to build the strongest fleet] 
Legendary ships such as the Victory, Sea Sovereignty, and Black Pearl are available for players to acquire, and they can also be modified to build the strongest fleet. [Explore the world: a thrilling treasure hunt] 
Historical sites, deep-sea shipwrecks. Travel across seven sea areas and seek unknown things on the other side of the sea, such as secrets, treasures, and ancient civilizations. The world is so big, there are many ruins and treasures waiting for players to explore.
devnote-189932:
Captains, long time no see. 
Beyond the known seas, at the end of the world, lies a frozen land that has never been recorded. 
There are no warm ocean currents, no noisy ports, only ice and snow that never melts all year round, howling cold winds, and the ultimate silence that is enough to freeze everything. 
No one knows how long this continent has existed, and no one knows what secrets are sleeping under the ice - are they lost ancient ruins, unprecedented polar creatures, or amazing treasures that can change the entire maritime world? 
It is remote, dangerous and mysterious, but it also issues an irresistible call to every true navigator. 
A new continent is about to set sail. 
Do you dare to sail to the end of the world?
desc-768965:
You were once a superstar in the football world, and a time-travel allows you to rekindle your passion as a "manager" on a familiar green field! You will take on a new identity and work with a group of talented and energetic beautiful girl players to save this team that is about to go bankrupt! ▶The fate is reversed, and the girls go together! 
Top SSR girl players will be given as a gift at the beginning! Say goodbye to the long wait, meet your destiny partner, and form your dream starting lineup! Their extraordinary skills and unique charm will be the strongest cornerstone for you to compete on the green court! ▶Visual feast, high-energy showdown! 
Each beautiful girl player has a beautiful vertical painting, and there are also cool full-screen ultimate animations when releasing special moves! Feel the super dynamic visual impact of the collision between football and the two-dimensional world. Every game is like watching a passionate anime! ▶strategic and versatile tactics! 
There are a large number of beautiful girl players with distinctive personalities at your disposal! According to the characteristics of the opponent, flexibly match the lineup and formulate tactical strategies to defeat the enemy. Is it a fast break or an iron wall defense? Every formation of troops is a game of wisdom. Experience the pleasure of control brought by in-depth strategy! ▶Easy profits and zero-pressure growth! 
Offline resources continue to accumulate, and you can easily collect them online with one click! Say goodbye to exploding resources and get what you need for development easily. Using fragmented time can also steadily improve the team's strength and enjoy the pleasant experience of "becoming stronger when you wake up"! ▶Resonance is achieved quickly, and the combat power soars! 
New to your favorite player? "Resonance System" helps you close the gap in combat power instantly! Core player levels are shared, new cards don’t need to be trained for a long time, and you can immediately shine on the field with zero investment of resources! Building an all-around team has never been easier and more efficient!
devnote-707692:
We are the R&D team of "Cage Dream". We are determined to bring players a new experience and aim to broaden the boundaries of the game. 
The inspiration for this game comes from everyday waiting. Daydreams when you are bored, fantasy games in your mind, and many things you only dare to think about but dare not do. 
Waiting is the ultimate goal of the game. The process is to help you spend your time better. We advocate that you can pass the level smoothly without doing anything. Please don’t play this game with a strong purpose. After all, as long as you can wait for the result, you are the best! 
There is no tutorial in the game, and you have to discover many things by yourself. This process of discovery is the game itself. 
The demo version is now online on steam. Welcome to try the web link.
desc-707692:
This is a game about waiting and life. In the game, you will play the protagonist Ah Dan and experience various waiting scenes in life. Waiting for get out of class to end, waiting for the rain to stop, waiting for the elevator, waiting for the bus... 
You can choose to do something to kill time while you wait, or... do nothing. 
During this short yet long waiting time, let your imagination run wild! 
Game features: 
Experience life in many levels: waiting for the bus, waiting for get out of class, waiting for interviews, waiting for surgery results... Face various situations from birth to death, and comprehensively explore the various waiting moments in life. 
Doing nothing is the fastest speedrun: there are all kinds of things you can do while waiting, but there are no shortcuts or actions that can shorten the waiting time. 
The coexistence of comedy exterior and serious core: this is a funny farce and a journey of life. Be born, grow, grow old, and delve into every aspect of life with the protagonist. 
Interesting easter eggs hidden in boring waiting: During the seemingly ordinary waiting process, discover a lot of hidden surprises and hidden elements, turning boring moments into collections full of accomplishment. 
Learn to be patient and embrace every day: On the journey of play, understand the art of patience and embrace and accept every moment of life.
desc-321376:
"Bobo Chicken Story" is a simulation roguelite RPG game in which players need to save a boba milk tea shop that is in trouble. In the game, you can use the ingredients of Boba milk tea to fight enemies, build interpersonal relationships, complete town tasks, play mini-games and fishing tasks, and experience unusual adventures. A relaxing game set in a cozy town 
When you enter this game, you will be in a small town full of warm atmosphere. Your mission is to help a struggling milk tea shop become the most popular shop in town. You'll use a variety of boba milk tea ingredients to create delicious drinks and help the store owner by attracting customers from around the world. 
Use boba milk tea ingredients to fight 
When the sun sets, you will face a mysterious and dangerous world. Use your reliable milk tea weapon-Pearl Boba to defeat enemies and gain inspiration for new milk tea creations. 
Play at your own pace 
Not only that, the game also provides a lot of interactive content. You can establish relationships with various NPCs, develop friendships, and maybe even experience a romantic love story in the game. In the game, you can also complete various town tasks, participate in mini-games and exciting fishing tasks, which will allow you to fully experience the fun of life in the small town. Come and explore this town full of surprises and creativity!
devnote-321376:

desc-269659:
Official Q skirt: 258788848 
I have been waiting for Him to pick me up, 
Now He has finally come, 
You see, they are all on this black ship! But where will the "Cihang" that man has been looking for finally sail to? Perhaps the reason for all this can only be answered by the "nothing". Go deep into the "land of resentment" where the resentment of the dead arises, solve the mysteries in the abyss, and explore the true past hidden deep in people's hearts. In addition, maybe... you can change something... Features "The Lost Us 2" is a local original realistic illustration-style horror adventure game. The game style is mainly Chinese-style thriller and horror. The game not only contains a lot of Buddhist and oriental elements, but also those appalling customs and the people who once lived in this world. This time there is something even more terrifying lurking in the "Resentful Land". Explore and follow the footsteps of the heroine "Nothing", step into the black ship named "Cihang", and uncover the truth hidden inside step by step. 
Multiple roles 
In addition to "Nobody", you can also alternately operate several other characters in the incident to restore the truth behind the tragedy through different perspectives. The gameplay is rich in local cultural color and experiences strange things in remote towns. Improved ※Music: Each character’s exclusive BGM appropriately shows their own character and destiny. 
※Buddhist music: Integrating Buddhist scriptures with various styles of music, each scene and each Bodhisattva contains rich meanings. 
※Screen: No longer limited to traditional 2D game graphics and transition methods, a large number of cinematic lens language expressions are used to enhance players' gaming experience. 
※Story: Not only does it have a fuller story, but there are also many secrets hidden in that town waiting for you to discover.
desc-791491: This time we will play the role of a king to repel the enemy's invasion. You must make good use of the resources and soldiers in your hands to build your own army and fortress to resist the enemy. It is time to show your strategizing wisdom and repel the enemy's attacks again and again.
devnote-791491: Our game draws on one of our favorite games, "Nine Kings", and the content is also being intensively produced. I believe it will be available to you soon. We also look forward to your experience and feedback. We will actively follow up and optimize it.
devnote-177131:
A long time ago, I wanted to make a unique mobile game: in a fantasy continent, players find a place to settle, recruit admiring travelers, and build towns with them. It is entirely up to the player to decide what to build. If you have played Magic Baby before, you should enjoy the fun of production. Then consider what production services you will ultimately provide to other players, then build related production buildings in the town, and finally arrange for suitable travelers to find employment in the buildings. There should also be many interactions between players and their travelers, especially in terms of cooperation, which is not limited to cooperation between battles. For example, a player who focuses on production can provide equipment for players who focus on combat, and a player who focuses on combat can provide protection for players who focus on trade... 
I'm sure you've never seen a game like this, and I'm also sure that this kind of game is not suitable for all players. Maybe more people would rather find their way automatically on their mobile phones, level up on the phone, and engage in endless battles. However, I am more certain that there is a group of players who have been waiting for a different game. Maybe "Traveler's Diary" is still not ideal, but please give us some time to make this game for you.
desc-177131:
"Traveler's Diary" is a mobile game for cultivating "workers" in urban construction in a different world. Players inherit a territory from their ancestors and begin to recruit craftsmen and travelers with their own unique skills in order to restore its former prosperity. In addition to building town facilities, craftsmen can also cook food and craft equipment, providing comprehensive bonuses to travelers. Travelers go out to explore and fight, bringing back useful resources for craftsmen. These "workers" thrived under the wise leadership of the lord, and worked hard for the revitalization of the territory day after day. 【Game Features】 
——Building territory 
Start from scratch and recreate the prosperity of our ancestors - Recruit residents 
Hundreds of craftsmen and travelers with different skills and functions - traveling 
Residents can go to other players' territories to provide assistance - join a guild 
Expand your social circle and build a community of interests - sign up for the competition 
The traveler profession competes in combat power, and the craftsman profession competes in craftsmanship———————————————— 
#Lord, what are your orders today?
desc-831809:
"Codename: Team2" is a 2v2v2v2 double row brawl light competitive mobile game. 
In the fantasy world where the God's Crystal was born, you will play the role of the president of the newly established adventure guild, recruit heroes who can resonate with the crystal as the team leader, select partners, form a team, and participate in the treasure hunt competition. Squad brawl: easy to get started, multiple strategies, win the game in one game 
Minimalist button operation makes it easy for novices to get started; fast-paced circle shrinking to win treasures, and fighting in fragmented time. Form a team, compete for resources, and upgrade out of the box. Strategy games and smooth operations are both online. Light competition without burden, the brawl can't stop! Duo team ranking: 2v2v2v2 real-time competition, hot-blooded black game 
Four two-player teams are fighting in the same field. Grab your friends and start the black game immediately. Develop separately or join forces to attack together, victory or defeat can be achieved in an instant! Taking into account the excitement of competition and social fun, it is easy to unlock the fun and excitement of team fighting. Team Build: The team leader and partners strategically match each other, and the genre is formed. 
Team leaders and partners can combine freely to find the optimal solution and gain a huge boost in combat power! Either build a balanced team battle system, or play the explosive raid style. Every combination and upgrade is a tactical game. Upgrade and grow: free choice of experience + attributes + BUFF, soaring enjoyment 
Open the treasure chest to continuously upgrade, your attributes will be improved, your partners will be upgraded, and you will receive random blessings and blessings. The combat power increases step by step, and the team becomes stronger as they fight. Even though there are variables in the growth path of each game, the sense of incremental improvement runs through the entire process. Diverse team leaders: 20+ team leaders each with their own characteristics, and exclusive national server leaders and partners join the battle! 
The strict priest, the sinister loli, the honest bear... 20+ team leaders have distinctive styles and unique skills. There are also Chinese characters such as Sun Wukong and his disciples on the stage, and a melee between the East and the West is about to break out!
devnote-831809: Hello fellow adventurers! "Codename: Team2" is a 2v2v2v2 double row brawl light competitive mobile game that we carefully created. We hope to use fast-paced, high-strategy, and strong social team confrontation to bring you a stress-free, joyful competitive experience - a 5-minute round, fight side by side with friends, and experience the purest fun of brawling through strategy and coordination. The game is now open for pre-order, and the first limited-edition, no-charge file deletion test recruitment has started! This is our first official meeting with you, so we are both nervous and looking forward to it. We know that the first version still has many shortcomings, and the experience, balance, and details need to be polished, but we are willing to work with players to make the game better with the most sincere attitude. We hope that everyone will make an appointment, fill out the questionnaire to qualify for the test, and provide suggestions and feedback after the experience. We will listen carefully to every feedback, quickly iterate, and strive to live up to everyone's expectations and bring you a more refreshing and interesting light sports world. Thank you all for your support and patience, and I look forward to meeting you on the battlefield! ——"Codename: Team2" development team
desc-667660: "Fights Breaking the Sky" novel + animation IP dual authorization, animation-level 3D card mobile game "Fights Breaking the Sky: Alien Fire Comes to the World" is rekindled! Incarnate as a descendant of the Xiao family and conquer the Qi Continent alongside Xiao Xun'er, Medusa, Zi Yan, Yao Lao and other powerful people. Animated 3D high-precision modeling, every frame is a visual feast; the plot branches are written by yourself, and it is up to you to rewrite your destiny. The benefits are generous at the beginning. You will get a little doctor fairy when you log in the next day. You will get extra gifts when you sign in in the first month. With multiple krypton reduction benefits, you can easily dominate even if you have zero krypton or even a small amount of krypton! Different fires can be advanced freely, fighters can be combined as desired, alliances compete for cross-server PK, and the peak showdown is never-ending. Thirty years in Hedong, thirty years in Hexi—this time, your legend of Dou Di begins with your own hands!
devnote-744415: King of Glory World is scheduled to be released on the mobile version on April 17th, and will be pre-downloadable on the mobile version at 8:00 on April 15th.
desc-798643:
In Selaria, which was originally peaceful, the evil god of the demon race has made a comeback. In order to protect Selaria, you came to the "Devil Land" to "break the conspiracy of the underworld and reignite the war in the human world." 
The evil god was unwilling to fail and started causing trouble in Selaria again. It's time to take action, form your card team, this demon world invasion, we will take advantage of it. Adventurer! Guard Salaria with me! "Log in every day and get 648" 
Really! Log in and get 648, spend all your money to plan and receive benefits! There are no routines, the game is all about "taking off right from the start", allowing you to quickly build your favorite lineup without having to worry about resources. "One shot into the soul, free wishing without waste card" 
The original wish list system allows you to choose your own camp and choose your own hero. Every draw will give you a full sense of experience. What card pool guarantee? I just ALL IN heroes. "Special card formation gameplay" 
Say goodbye to cookie-cutter lineup templates! The game is embedded with extremely deep card formation logic, inspired by classic card games. You can pursue the ultimate attribute linkage like a "flush", or you can form a "full house" style comprehensive suppression lineup. There are over 100 kinds of giant lineups to choose from. There is no best lineup, only your favorite lineup! "BP Gameplay Tactical Showdown" 
What should you do if you encounter a "toxic" version of a hero? Send it directly to the class to buy a house! The arena is not only a numerical competition, but also a psychological game.
desc-731367:
[It is not necessarily the case that there is no one before, but there may be people who come in the future with a wonderful style of painting] 
If it doesn’t strike you at first glance, then let’s take a closer look and see such a unique painting style and countless outrageous details, from the layout of the street to the swaying of each tree, all of which are sacrificed by fine art with hair! 
[Weird tricks, breeding monsters just to make it happy] 
Plant different seeds and make them bloom to attract different mysterious monsters. In addition to their stunning appearance, the little monsters also have a variety of imaginative behavioral animations. Play with them and perform different interactive operations to obtain the ingredients needed for cooking. 
[Unpredictable food development without any reference] 
Arrange your troops and think of different processing methods to develop various magical dishes. Not only do the ingredients come from strange sources, but the appearance of the dishes is also exciting, ensuring that diners who have eaten once will never leave you again. 
[Three gangs of heroes, recruiting employees who contribute to the restaurant] 
A busy restaurant cannot be without helpers. Recruit employees with ulterior motives, and let these employees with different appearances and vastly different backgrounds use their talents and skills to help you take care of monsters, serve plates, and attract customers. 
[The world is so big, why not explore it on a map] 
In addition to Huiyu Town, where Sunshine Kitchen is located, you can also drive to other cities to enjoy the beautiful scenery of different cities and meet interesting customers; while promoting the dark cuisine you make to the world. 
[Extremely high degree of freedom, supports random decoration and construction] 
Whether it's the ceiling or the floor, whether it's the table or stools, everything in this sunny kitchen belongs to you, and you can modify the layout at will until you create a restaurant you're satisfied with. 
In addition to the restaurant, the plants, trees, flowers and stones in the little monster farm can also be arranged according to your wishes. Live in your fantasy land with the little monsters. 
[Restaurant management that relies solely on the consciousness of employees and customers as if they were hands-off as a shopkeeper] 
In general, you are welcome to come, scan the QR code at this door and there, and don’t forget to get up and leave after scanning and eating. Of course, what kind of dishes are available depends on the inventory of ingredients today, the owner's thinking about the future, whether the customers step into the restaurant with their left foot or their right foot... Omakase is a difficult thing to say, but to put it simply, you eat what you have. As for wanting something special, that’s all up to you.
devnote-731367:
It’s really expensive to make a game that satisfies players’ curiosity but never satisfies it!
